AbandonedShip_CaptainsOffice_Text_NoSucc: I'm investigating this ship on behalf of CAPT. STERN. / He also asked me to find a SCANNER, but I haven't had any success…
AbandonedShip_CaptainsOffice_Text_ThisIs: This ship is called S.S. CACTUS. It seems to be from an earlier era.

AbandonedShip_Corridors_1F_Text_IsntItFu: Isn't it fun here? I get excited just being here!

AbandonedShip_Corridors_1F_Text_CharlieP: It's not easy throwing POKé BALLS while hanging on to an inner tube!

AbandonedShip_Corridors_B1F_Text_DuncanP: The ship's bottom has sunk into the depths. / If a POKéMON knew how to go underwater, we might make some progress…

AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F_Text_DanPostBatt: DAN: We can't find any treasures… I wonder if someone got them already?

AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F_Text_KiraPostBat: KIRA: Where could the treasures be? / I've already decided what I'm buying when we find the treasures!

AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F_Text_GarrisonPos: In a cabin somewhere on board, I saw something sparkle.

AbandonedShip_Rooms2_1F_Text_JaniPostBat: Walking around barefoot in this ship is kind of gross.

AbandonedShip_Rooms2_B1F_Text_PerfectPla: This is a perfect place to go exploring! It's exciting here! / I bet there're amazing treasures on board.

AbandonedShip_Rooms_1F_Text_TakingALookA: Ships of this sort are rare, so I'm taking a look around. / Hmhm… There appear to be other cabins…

AbandonedShip_Rooms_1F_Text_ThaliaPostBa: The man next door… / He says he's just sightseeing, but I don't know about that.

AbandonedShip_Rooms_1F_Text_DemetriusPos: I'm in trouble with my mom, so I ran. Keep it a secret where I am!

AbandonedShip_Rooms_B1F_Text_GettingQuea: Urrrrppp… / I'm getting queasy just being aboard this ship… / It's not even moving, but…

AquaHideout_1F_Text_OurBossIsSnatchingSo: What? What? What do you want with TEAM AQUA? / Our BOSS isn't here! He's gone off to snatch something important! / … … Where did he go? / Wahaha! Do you really think I'd tell you something that crucial?
AquaHideout_1F_Text_BossWentToJackASubma: What? What? What do you want with TEAM AQUA? / Our BOSS isn't here! He's gone off to jack a submarine! / … … Where did he go? / Wahaha! Do you really think I'd tell you something that crucial?
AquaHideout_1F_Text_WhereMightMagmaHideo: What? What? Are you a TEAM MAGMA grunt? / I hear that TEAM MAGMA is trying to awaken an awesome POKéMON at their HIDEOUT. / But where might their HIDEOUT be?

AquaHideout_1F_Text_BossIsOnRoute122: What? What? What do you want with TEAM AQUA? / Our BOSS isn't here! He's on his way to MT. PYRE on ROUTE 122! / … … Why did he go? / Wahaha! Do you really think I'd tell you something that crucial?
AquaHideout_1F_Text_BossIsInSlateportCit: What? What? What do you want with TEAM AQUA? / Our BOSS isn't here! He's on his way to SLATEPORT CITY! / … … Why did he go? / Wahaha! Do you really think I'd tell you something that crucial?
AquaHideout_1F_Text_TeamMagmaAtMtChimney: What? What? Are you a TEAM MAGMA grunt? / I hear that TEAM MAGMA is after an awesome POKéMON at MT. CHIMNEY. / But what is that POKéMON like?

AquaHideout_1F_Text_Grunt1PostBattle: I took the loss for the TEAM, but I did my job…

AquaHideout_B1F_Text_Grunt2PostBattle: Our HIDEOUT's secret? / Well, let's just say… There's a submarine at the far end! / But, by now… Kekekeke…

AquaHideout_B1F_Text_Grunt3PostBattle: Humph! This was supposed to happen! / My mission was to just hold you up!

AquaHideout_B1F_Text_Grunt5PostBattle: If you scurry too much, other TEAM AQUA members might get you.

AquaHideout_B1F_Text_Grunt7PostBattle: If you have a cool uniform, you look good even in a loss, don't you think?

AquaHideout_B2F_Text_MattPostBattle: Hehehe! / Our BOSS has already gone on his way to some cave under the sea! / If you're going to give chase, you'd better search the big, wide sea beyond LILYCOVE. / But will you find it then? Hehehe!

AquaHideout_B2F_Text_Grunt6PostBattle: That reminds me… I can't remember where I put the MASTER BALL. / If I fail to guard it, our BOSS will chew me out…

AquaHideout_B2F_Text_Grunt8PostBattle: I'll have to learn about how I can battle more effectively…

BattleFrontier_BattleArenaLobby_Text_Wel: Where the battling spirit of TRAINERS is put to the test! / I welcome you to the BATTLE ARENA! / I am your guide to the Set KO Tourney!

BattleFrontier_BattleArenaLobby_Text_Ord: In the BATTLE ARENA, the order of POKéMON is totally important. / For example, if your first POKéMON has certain type disadvantages, try making your second POKéMON one with moves that are super effective against the first one. / I think that will be a good way of making an effective team.

BattleFrontier_BattleArenaLobby_Text_Lan: I won in judging! / Landing hits consistently on the opponent's POKéMON worked!

BattleFrontier_BattleArenaLobby_Text_Mat: Our match was declared a draw. / When we ran out of time, both my POKéMON and the opponent's had about the same amount of HP left.

BattleFrontier_BattleArenaLobby_Text_Bad: I lost on the REFEREE's decision… / I don't think it was a good idea to only use defensive moves and not attack…

BattleFrontier_BattleDomeLobby_Text_Need: I would've won if I'd kept this POKéMON held in reserve. / You need to check your opponent's POKéMON carefully before choosing your battling POKéMON.

BattleFrontier_BattleDomeLobby_Text_Winn: When a TRAINER chains tournament wins at the BATTLE DOME, he or she gains a reputation as a star. / Tough TRAINERS are drawn by that reputation to the BATTLE DOME. / A true superstar is a TRAINER who can keep winning tournaments.

BattleFrontier_BattleDomeLobby_Text_Tras: I ran into one of the tournament favorites in the very first round. / Of course I got trashed…

BattleFrontier_BattleDomeLobby_Text_Last: Did you see it? The last Battle Tournament? / The winner, , was seriously tough. / You should check out the results on the monitor beside the PC.

BattleFrontier_BattleFactoryLobby_Text_N: Hi! You, there! / Are you thinking that the events here are easy since you don't need to have a raised team of POKéMON? / I wouldn't be too sure about winning that easily. / If you don't have thorough knowledge about POKéMON and their moves, it will be tough to keep winning.

BattleFrontier_BattleFactoryLobby_Text_S: I swapped for a weak POKéMON… I thought it was a good kind to have… / They wiped the floor with us…

BattleFrontier_BattleFactoryLobby_Text_N: Things haven't been going my way at all. / You need to check your opponent's POKéMON during battle to see if they're any good.

BattleFrontier_BattleFactoryLobby_Text_C: You know how the staff here give you a few hints about your next opponent? / Well, I'm a full-grown man, but I have trouble figuring out their hints.

BattleFrontier_BattlePalaceLobby_Text_La: For a hardy fellow like me, hardy POKéMON are the best. / Offense is the best defense! A relentless attack is the ultimate! / But that's not what I wanted to chat about. / Every so often a really cute lady swings by here. / She says that she can tell what POKéMON are thinking. / I don't know about that part, but she is really cute. / Huh? Why are you looking at me like that?

BattleFrontier_BattlePalaceLobby_Text_Wh: I wonder what sort of nature a POKéMON would have if it favored enfeebling its opponents and chipping away slowly. / I'd be surprised if it was a LAX nature. / But, nah, that can't be right.

BattleFrontier_BattlePalaceLobby_Text_Na: Hmm… / It appears that the nature of POKéMON and the moves that they have been taught are the keys to battle here. / To be more precise, it's how well the moves match the nature of the POKéMON. / If your POKéMON is in trouble and unable to live up to its potential, you may need to examine how well its moves match its nature.

BattleFrontier_BattlePalaceLobby_Text_Mo: My POKéMON is usually very docile. / But when it's in a BATTLE HALL, it sometimes seems to become transformed into something wicked! / It becomes totally intimidating. It's shocking, even.

BattleFrontier_BattlePikeLobby_Text_Welc: Where the luck of TRAINERS is put to the test… / Welcome to the BATTLE PIKE… / I am your guide to the BATTLE PIKE…

BattleFrontier_BattlePikeLobby_Text_OneR: Arrgh! I blew my chance! I was one room away from the goal! / In this place, you'd better watch out for poison, freezing, and so on.

BattleFrontier_BattlePikeLobby_Text_Neve: I've completed the challenge 10 times now, but I've never had to battle a TRAINER once.

BattleFrontier_BattlePikeLobby_Text_Thin: Listen! Listen! / Don't you think that the special abilities of POKéMON will be useful here?

BattleFrontier_BattlePikeThreePathRoom_T: I beg your pardon, but… / Are you perhaps finding it difficult to choose your path?

BattleFrontier_BattlePyramidLobby_Text_W: Where the courage of TRAINERS is put to the test! / Welcome to the BATTLE PYRAMID! / I am your guide to the Battle Quest.

BattleFrontier_BattlePyramidLobby_Text_T: Welcome… / I shall be pleased to tell you what misfortunes await in the PYRAMID…
BattleFrontier_BattlePyramidLobby_Text_B: Whether you believe my fortunes or not, the choice is yours… / The future can be changed anytime… I wish you safe passage…

BattleFrontier_BattlePyramidLobby_Text_T: Did you know? / If you run fast, TRAINERS may notice and come after you for a battle. / So, if you want to avoid TRAINERS, don't catch their eyes, but sneak cautiously and quietly past them.

BattleFrontier_BattlePyramidLobby_Text_L: Awaaaaaaarrrrgh! / I had a whole lot of items, but I lost them all when I lost! / Awaaaaaaarrrrgh!

BattleFrontier_BattlePyramidTop_Text_Rea: It is a delight to see you here! You have reached the summit of the BATTLE PYRAMID! / Above here is the PYRAMID's lookout point. / It is a place open only to those who have conquered the PYRAMID. / Now, please! Up you go!
BattleFrontier_BattlePyramidTop_Text_Pla: The PYRAMID's new conqueror! Let the name [PLAYER] be known!

BattleFrontier_BattleTowerLobby_Text_Wel: Where the talents of TRAINERS are put to the test! / Welcome to the BATTLE TOWER! / I am your guide to the SINGLE BATTLE ROOMS.

BattleFrontier_BattleTowerLobby_Text_Des: Excuse me, do you have a moment? / Can you describe your feelings when you're about to begin a BATTLE TOWER match, or when you've either won or lost a match?

BattleFrontier_BattleTowerLobby_Text_Win: The number of matches you win in a row is recorded. / I'd better not get beaten in an embarrassing way!

BattleFrontier_BattleTowerLobby_Text_Can: Once you've entered the BATTLE TOWER, you can't leave until you either lose or you beat seven TRAINERS in a row. / You'd best be certain that you're up to the challenge.

BattleFrontier_BattleTowerLobby_Text_Wel: Where the talents of TRAINERS are put to the test! / Welcome to the BATTLE TOWER! / I am your guide to the DOUBLE BATTLE ROOMS.
Where the talents of TRAINERS are put to the test! / Welcome to the BATTLE TOWER! / I am your guide to the MULTI BATTLE ROOMS.
Where the talents of TRAINERS are put to the test! / Welcome to the BATTLE TOWER! / I am your guide to the LINK MULTI BATTLE ROOMS.

BattleFrontier_BattleTowerMultiPartnerRo: [PLAYER], you have not found a partner for your tag team. / Would you like to quit looking and return to the reception counter?
Then, please find a partner from the TRAINERS gathered here.

BattleFrontier_ExchangeServiceCorner_Tex: Hello, this is the EXCHANGE SERVICE CORNER. / We exchange the Battle Points you have collected for lovely prizes. / Please choose a prize from this list.
Oh, they're so nice! I wish I had them! Cute cushions! Big plush DOLLS! Little plush DOLLS! I wish I had them all!
Leave it to your mommy! / If it's anything you want, I'll go through anything to get it, honey!
If I can get hold of the items here, my POKéMON will get tougher. / You bet they will! No question about it!
Hah? What are you gawking at? / I don't like you staring at my plush doll like that. / If you want it, go get one yourself! Isn't that right, SMOOCHUM?
Hello, this is the EXCHANGE SERVICE CORNER. / We exchange the Battle Points you have collected for lovely prizes. / Please choose a prize from this list.
Hello, this is the EXCHANGE SERVICE CORNER. / We exchange the Battle Points you have collected for lovely prizes. / Please choose a prize from this list.
Hello, this is the EXCHANGE SERVICE CORNER. / We exchange the Battle Points you have collected for lovely prizes. / Please choose a prize from this list.
Did you know? / If you stretch your record at any of the BATTLE facilities, they start giving you more and more Battle Points.

BattleFrontier_Lounge1_Text_PokemonBreed: For 70 years I have raised POKéMON! I am the man they revere as the legendary top POKéMON BREEDER! / If you ever become as seasoned as me, you'll see the abilities of POKéMON at a glance. / You're a TRAINER. Doesn't it interest you to know your own POKéMON's abilities? / Here! Let's have a look at your POKéMON!
BattleFrontier_Lounge1_Text_LetsLookAtYo: Ah, youngster! Do your POKéMON's abilities intrigue you? / Here, here! Let's have a look at your POKéMON!

BattleFrontier_Lounge1_Text_SaidMyMonIsO: He said my POKéMON is outstanding! I'm glad I raised it carefully!

BattleFrontier_Lounge1_Text_DidntDoAnyth: He said my POKéMON is outstanding! But I didn't do anything special raising it…

BattleFrontier_Lounge2_Text_FrontierMani: Howdy! When it comes to news about the BATTLE FRONTIER, I'm no. 1. / You can think of me as the FRONTIER MANIAC. / Just checking, but you are a TRAINER, isn't that right? / I'll happily share the hottest news I gathered about the BATTLE FRONTIER.
BattleFrontier_Lounge2_Text_SwingByForTh: Howdy! Did you swing by to grill me about the latest word? Oh, all right!

BattleFrontier_Lounge2_Text_NewsGatherin: What amazing news-gathering power! My mentor's like none other!

BattleFrontier_Lounge2_Text_AmazingPower: What amazing powers of observation! My mentor's like none other!

BattleFrontier_Lounge2_Text_ThisPlaceIsS: …What is this place? It's scaring me…

BattleFrontier_Lounge2_Text_AmazingPower: What amazing power of persuasion! My mentor's like none other!

BattleFrontier_Lounge3_Text_YouLookTough: …Huh? You look to me like a tough TRAINER. / Heheh… Listen, I have this proposition. / We have a little group going here, and we play a little game with what goes on in the BATTLE FRONTIER. / The rules are really simple. / First, we pick one of the facilities in the BATTLE FRONTIER. / Then, we each pick a different TRAINER who's taking that facility's challenge, and bet with our Battle Points. / The guy who bet on the TRAINER with the best record takes all the Battle Points in the pool. / Sounds simple, huh? So, anyway…
BattleFrontier_Lounge3_Text_HowAboutEnte: I'll see to it that you benefit, too. So how about it? How about entering that event for me?
BattleFrontier_Lounge3_Text_SpotMeSomeBa: All right, that's perfect. So, uh… How about spotting me some of your Battle Points? / Trust me, I'll show you my gratitude afterward.
BattleFrontier_Lounge3_Text_HowMuchCanYo: Great, great! So, how much can you spot me?

BattleFrontier_Lounge3_Text_TrainerGoodB: That TRAINER… / He's good, but he gets rattled too easily to survive the BATTLE DOME…

BattleFrontier_Lounge3_Text_BackedWrongT: I backed the wrong TRAINER again! / Maybe I should be battling normally like everyone else…

BattleFrontier_Lounge3_Text_KnowWinnerWh: Giggle! I know a winner when I see one!

BattleFrontier_Lounge3_Text_ShouldBeTaki: Those TRAINERS… What are they doing? They should be taking challenges.

BattleFrontier_Lounge4_Text_WonderIfInte: I wonder if they'll be airing interviews with tough TRAINERS today?

BattleFrontier_Lounge4_Text_IfIOpenedRes: If I opened a restaurant here, it'd make money for sure.

BattleFrontier_Lounge4_Text_NeedBreather: Whew… / I need to take a breather after some intense battles… / But even now, I never take a break from plotting strategy and combos.

BattleFrontier_Lounge5_Text_NatureGirlGr: Ehehe! I can tell what POKéMON are thinking! / Please! Can I see your POKéMON?

BattleFrontier_Lounge5_Text_LadyClaimsSh: How charming! That little lady claims she can understand POKéMON!

BattleFrontier_Lounge5_Text_GirlSayingSo: I have this feeling that the little girl is saying something profound.

BattleFrontier_Lounge5_Text_GirlPlaysAtR: I know something! / That little girl plays at the red house a lot!

BattleFrontier_Lounge6_Text_WouldYouLike: My POKéMON is a . Do you know it? It's quite cute and rather nice. / This little one, I could trade with pride! / Would you like to trade me a for my ?
BattleFrontier_Lounge6_Text_PromiseIllBe: Oh, it's adorable! Thank you! I promise I'll be good to it! / Oh! I hope you'll be good to my , too!
BattleFrontier_Lounge6_Text_SkittySoMuch: Giggle! A SKITTY is so much cuter than I had imagined. I'm delighted!

BattleFrontier_Lounge7_Text_ThinkLadiesD: Those ladies, the way they bad-mouth each other, you probably think that they don't get along. / But if that were true, they wouldn't stay out here together, would they?

BattleFrontier_Lounge7_Text_LeftTutorInt: Buhahaha! / You couldn't tell it from looking now, but I used to be one tough TRAINER. / I had a reputation as the toughest BEAUTY around, I tell you! / … … … … … … / What is it now? You don't believe me. / I'm not like that blowhard woman over there. I'm actually talented! / Let me prove it to you. I can teach your POKéMON special and yet cute moves. / But my lessons don't come free. How about paying for the moves I teach with a wee bit of Battle Points?
BattleFrontier_Lounge7_Text_LeftTutorWel: Buhahaha! / Are you back to learn special and yet cute POKéMON moves?
BattleFrontier_Lounge7_Text_TeachWhichMo: Fine, fine, look here! Which move should I teach?

BattleFrontier_Lounge7_Text_RightTutorIn: Ihihihi! / I know it's hard to see now, but I used to be one fantastic TRAINER. / I had a reputation as the most invincible SWIMMER around, I tell you! / … … … … … … / What's wrong? You don't believe me. / I'm not like that buffoonish woman over there. I'm actually experienced! / I can prove it to you. I can teach your POKéMON hard and yet pretty moves. / But my lessons don't come free. How about paying for the moves I teach with a wee bit of Battle Points?
BattleFrontier_Lounge7_Text_RightTutorWe: Ihihihi! / Have you come to learn hard and yet pretty POKéMON moves?
BattleFrontier_Lounge7_Text_TeachWhichMo: Fine, fine, look here! Which move should I teach?

BattleFrontier_Lounge7_Text_LadiesWereSt: When I was just a wee YOUNGSTER, those ladies were strong and beautiful. / They were idols among us TRAINERS. / Even now, age hasn't dulled their abilities. / In fact, their POKéMON moves have grown even more polished. / But… For some reason, I can't help but feel this… / Time is so cruel…

BattleFrontier_Lounge8_Text_ToldMeIHaveT: At the BATTLE TOWER, an older girl told me that I have a lot of talent for battling! / I like POKéMON CONTESTS more! / But I'm no good at CONTESTS! / I guess having talent and liking something aren't the same.

BattleFrontier_Lounge8_Text_WhatATrainer: What a TRAINER needs… / Knowledge… Strategy… Luck… Guts… Spirit… Bravery… And ability… / Well, I'm all set in every way! I'll be unstoppable at every building! / Huh? POKéMON? What's that?

BattleFrontier_Lounge8_Text_KnowAboutFro: Do you know about the FRONTIER BRAINS? / That's what SCOTT calls the seven special TRAINERS that run the seven facilities in the BATTLE FRONTIER.

BattleFrontier_Mart_Text_ProteinMakeNice: Dear, what do you think of this? Wouldn't this make a nice gift? / It's…PRO…TE…IN? It sounds delicious, doesn't it?

BattleFrontier_Mart_Text_ChaperonGrandso: We came here to chaperon our grandson. / But since we're here, we thought we should get some souvenirs.

BattleFrontier_Mart_Text_FacilitiesDontA: A lot of the BATTLE FRONTIER's facilities don't allow the use of items during battles. / That rule makes things tougher than they already are!

BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_BattleTo: Wow! It's huge! / The BATTLE TOWER feels special. It's different from the others.

BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_ConquerL: My grand ambition is to conquer both the BATTLE FRONTIER and the POKéMON LEAGUE. / And if my dream comes true… / I… I'm going to ask MIMI next door if she will be friends with me!

BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_PyramidT: The BATTLE PYRAMID's too harsh! I just can't make it to the top! / Since I'm out of options, maybe I can climb the outside…

BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_ThriveIn: I thrive in darkness… Yes… What is worthy of me? None other than the BATTLE PYRAMID… / What say you to wandering in darkness and in utter and total desperation?

BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_PutToget: I didn't sleep for a week, but then I put together the ultimate team! / I can't see myself losing, no joke. We're storming the BATTLE ARENA!

BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_BelieveI: ZIGG! I believe in you, little buddy! / I'll make my little ZIGG any favorite tasty treats you like if you win!

BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_OnceBeat: I may not look that impressive now, but I once beat a GYM LEADER. / Who knows, maybe I should give it another shot at glory.

BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_DidScott: Did SCOTT bring you here, too? What is it with that guy? / It sounds like he really does know how to spot talented TRAINERS, but… / I've never seen him battling in person ever.

BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_PeopleCa: People call me a busybody, but I can't help it. / Your hat's on crooked! Oh, no, trash on the ground! Oops, it's almost dinnertime! / I don't know if I can stand to just watch at the BATTLE PALACE…

BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_FastOnBi: I'm fast on my BIKE, and that goes for the way I battle, too. / I win matches in the blink of an eye!

BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_BetterTh: I'm better than my daddy at POKéMON.

BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_GoRackUp: Go on, my baby sweetie! Go rack up some wins for Daddy! / You're just like your mother, so you'll be dominating!

BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_HeardPre: It wasn't easy getting here, but I'd heard about this knockout pretty girl at the BATTLE ARENA. / Instead of her, do you know what I found? / A whole teeming mob of sweaty, stinky, and primitive martial artists!

BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_Sometime: I sometimes see this really important- looking old man going in there. / He has these really awesome POKéMON. He seems really nice, though.

BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_LegendOf: Do you know it? The legend of the BATTLE PYRAMID? / When there comes a confident TRAINER reaching for the golden pinnacle, there shall appear a man among men. / Don't know that legend? Well, of course not! I just made it up! / What's it supposed to mean? That, my friend, I can't say!

BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_GotWiped: Man! Oh man! I've never lost once before! / But I got wiped out with no saving grace at all! / And then I'm told I don't have any talent?! Man!

BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_ToughTra: This guy ran into a horribly tough TRAINER while he was on the BATTLE TOWER challenge. / Now look at him… / You need to be cautious if you ever decide to go to the BATTLE TOWER.

BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_EnoughBa: Yes! I've finally got enough Battle Points! / I guess I'll trade for another giant plush DOLL!

BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_LikeToHa: Oh, yeah, okay! So this is the RANKING HALL! / I'd like to go down in history as a super champ and have my name recorded here for posterity.

BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_CanDoAny: With you by my side, I can do anything.

BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_PowerOfO: Ooh, darling, you are so wonderful! / Ooh, I just can't wait anymore! / Let's go to a MULTI BATTLE ROOM right this instant! / If we get together in the BATTLE SALON, the power of our love will overcome everyone we meet. / Why, before us, darling, everything will topple like dominoes!

BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_OddTreeH: Excuse me, young one. Have you good eyesight? / There is an odd tree past here, and to my tired eyes it seems to wiggle.
BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_OnceAnOd: Excuse me, young one. Have you a good memory? / I have this feeling there once was an odd tree past here.

BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_Frontier: The BATTLE FRONTIER isn't exclusively for tough TRAINERS. / Many people with special abilities have been invited, it seems. / That man SCOTT… / He may have built this place to serve a bigger objective…

BattleFrontier_OutsideEast_Text_StickyMo: I… I saw it! / There was a sticky sort of a POKéMON with a long tail up ahead! / It was hiding under a boulder, and it kept staring at me!

BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_BestOutO: I'm the best out of all my friends. But here… I've been useless!

BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_MayISeeY: Hello, are you here for the ferry? May I see your TICKET?
BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_WhereWou: [PLAYER] flashed the TICKET. / Perfect! That's all you need! / And where would you like to go?

BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_WontLetG: Ah, so this here is the BATTLE DOME? I won't let GENTLEMEN beat me! / But where is the entrance?

BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_OnlyToug: It's not as if just anyone can come here, you know? / Only those TRAINERS who've been recognized as tough are brought here. / That's why many TRAINERS don't even know about the BATTLE FRONTIER.

BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_FinallyA: I've finally arrived at the BATTLE FRONTIER! / I'm sure to grab attention with my looks and ability!

BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_SquareFi: Munch, munch… / It looks like this square's filled with tough people. / Munch, munch…

BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_YoureOff: Oh? You're off to challenge the BATTLE DOME? / I'll wish you the best of luck. Let us both win our way up and meet in challenges.

BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_SureWeCa: Hey, bro… / Are you sure we can make challenges even if we don't have any POKéMON?
BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_BigGuySa: Uh… I'm sure it'll be okay. / I think… / But remember that big scary guy? He said, “I'll lend you POKéMON!”

BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_SureWeCa: Hey, bro… / Are you sure we can make challenges even if we don't have any POKéMON?
BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_BigGuySa: Uh… I'm sure it'll be okay. / I think… / But remember that big scary guy? He said, “I'll lend you POKéMON!”

BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_NothingH: There used to be nothing here not all that long ago. / But, now look at this place! Amazing! I'll bring my mother out to see this.

BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_ScaredOf: I'm scared of going into the BATTLE PIKE because of SEVIPER… / B-but I came all the way here, so I will try to conquer everything! …Shudder…

BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_LetsPlay: Let's play rock, paper, scissors! One, two, three! / … … … … … …
BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_LostIllP: Oh, no… I lost. / I guess I'm not very lucky today. I'll put off my BATTLE PIKE challenge until tomorrow.

BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_WhosRais: That's the BATTLE FACTORY. You can rent strong POKéMON there. / But it makes me wonder. Who's raising those rental POKéMON?

BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_KeepBatt: Today, I'm going to keep battling, no matter what, until I get a Symbol.

BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_ChooseFi: I believe I'm the only person here who, for some unknown reason, would choose fishing over battling. / Huh? You can't catch anything here? That's disappointing…

BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_GotSeasi: I wanted to take a challenge as soon as I arrived here. / But on the way, I got seasick… Urrrrp…

BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_MetOlder: Crunch, munch… / A while back, I met this older girl at the BATTLE PIKE. / She had these eyes that were scary in a real ornery way. / Crunch, munch… / She got all furious: “Will you quit eating!” Then she whaled on me. / It was a hair-raising kind of scary experience, sure enough. / Crunch, munch…

BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_LastTime: Huh? Will you listen to yourself? That's nothing! / Why, the last time I cheered for him, our eyes met and sparks flew!

BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_DomeAceL: Whaaaaaat?! Pfft! / That only happened because I happened to be sitting next to you! / The DOME ACE only looked our way because my cheering was so loud!

BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_DomeAceI: Oh, shush! Keep that racket down! / You fair-weather fans should stick to cheering for some GYM LEADER! / The DOME ACE is mine! The only idol for me!

BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_FansOver: Those people squabbling over there… / It's hard to believe, but they once were TRAINERS, and good ones, too. / They used to be incredibly tough, and they were famous, too. / But they were obliterated by this certain TRAINER at a tournament. / They were so thoroughly whipped, they became smitten by the TRAINER. / Now they're just fans of the TRAINER. They go cheer for their idol at the BATTLE DOME every day now.

BattleFrontier_OutsideWest_Text_MonWithL: I heard a rumor that someone saw a POKéMON with an unusually long tail somewhere in the BATTLE FRONTIER. / It must be adorable. I'm sure of it… / Oh, challenges can wait. I feel driven to find the delightful creature!

BattleFrontier_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Nev: There was someone here using a POKéMON I've never seen before. / I never learned about it at TRAINER'S SCHOOL at least. / I wonder where you can catch POKéMON like that.

BattleFrontier_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Nex: Okay! Next stop, the BATTLE ARENA! I'd better get the right POKéMON from the PC Storage System.

BattleFrontier_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Goi: Giggle… I'm going to go through every challenge with just this baby!

BattleFrontier_RankingHall_Text_ExplainR: This is the RANKING HALL. / This is where we recognize the immortal TRAINERS who left great records in BATTLE FRONTIER events.

BattleFrontier_RankingHall_Text_IsYourNa: Hi, is your name on this list?
BattleFrontier_RankingHall_Text_WorkHard: Oh, is that right? / If you saw your friend's name up here, I bet it would make you work harder!

BattleFrontier_RankingHall_Text_MyNamesN: Hmm… My name's not up there… / Well, it's only natural since I haven't taken any challenges yet.

BattleFrontier_ReceptionGate_Text_Welcom: The front lines of POKéMON battling! Welcome to the BATTLE FRONTIER!
BattleFrontier_ReceptionGate_Text_EnjoyB: We hope you enjoy all that the BATTLE FRONTIER has to offer!

BattleFrontier_ReceptionGate_Text_YourGu: I'm your guide to the various facilities here in the BATTLE FRONTIER.
BattleFrontier_ReceptionGate_Text_LearnA: Which would you like to learn about?

BattleFrontier_ReceptionGate_Text_YourGu: I'm your guide to the basic rules that are common to all the challenges offered by the facilities in the BATTLE FRONTIER.
BattleFrontier_ReceptionGate_Text_LearnA: What would you like to learn about?

BattleFrontier_ReceptionGate_Text_YourGu: I'm your guide to the FRONTIER PASS.
BattleFrontier_ReceptionGate_Text_LearnA: Which would you like to learn about?

BattleFrontier_ScottsHouse_Text_SoGladIB: I must say I have the gift of knowing a good TRAINER when I see one. / I'm so glad I had the foresight to bring you here!
BattleFrontier_ScottsHouse_Text_Expectin: I'll be expecting to hear even greater things about you now!
I'm expecting great things from you!
BattleFrontier_ScottsHouse_Text_WelcomeT: SCOTT: Well, hello and welcome! Heheh… Sorry about the cramped space. / Anyway, [PLAYER], let me formally welcome you to the BATTLE FRONTIER. / This is my dream come true. It took me years and years, but I've finally given shape to my dream.
BattleFrontier_ScottsHouse_Text_HowMuchE: On reflection, it was a terribly long journey… / I left home alone on a quest to find strong TRAINERS. / No one can imagine how much effort or time it took to make this real.
BattleFrontier_ScottsHouse_Text_HaveThis: But that's all in the past. No point dwelling on that! / All I want for you is to enjoy battling to your heart's content here. / [PLAYER], I want you to have this as a memento for all the time our paths crossed on our journeys.
BattleFrontier_ScottsHouse_Text_YouveCol: SCOTT: Are you enjoying things in the BATTLE FRONTIER? / …Wait a second… Oh! / Your FRONTIER PASS! You've collected the full set of silver symbols! / That's more than impressive! You are tough, just as I suspected! / Normally, I wouldn't do something like this, but this is a special time! / I want you to have this. I'm sure you can put it to proper use.

SCOTT: I hope you're enjoying everything in the BATTLE FRONTIER. / …Wait a second… Oh, my disbelieving eyes! / Your FRONTIER PASS! You've gathered up the full set of gold symbols! / That's more than stupendous! You're incredible, just as I suspected! / … … … … … … / [PLAYER], you've got to accept this! / I think you will be able to appreciate the value of my gift!
BattleFrontier_ScottsHouse_Text_WhyIGoSe: SCOTT: Every TRAINER is an individual. They all lead lives of their own. / But when they're in a battle, it doesn't matter who they are. / They're all the same! / I love the purity of battle, where everyone is equal. / That's why I go everywhere seeking TRAINERS who are serious about battling, and invite them here.
BattleFrontier_ScottsHouse_Text_ExplainB: SCOTT: You can check your Battle Points on your FRONTIER PASS. / The more success you have here at the BATTLE FRONTIER, the more Battle Points you will collect. / Use your Battle Points the way you see fit, like trading them for items.

CaveOfOrigin_B1F_Text_WallaceStory: Ah, so you are [PLAYER]? I've heard tales of your exploits. / My name is WALLACE. / I was once the GYM LEADER of SOOTOPOLIS, but something came up. / So now, I've entrusted my mentor JUAN with the GYM's operation. / … … … … … … … … … … … … / GROUDON and KYOGRE, the two POKéMON wreaking havoc here, are considered to be super-ancient POKéMON. / But there aren't just two super- ancient POKéMON. / There is one more somewhere. / Somewhere, there is a super- ancient POKéMON named RAYQUAZA. / It's said that it was RAYQUAZA that becalmed the two combatants in the distant past. / But even I have no clue as to RAYQUAZA's whereabouts…
CaveOfOrigin_B1F_Text_WhereIsRayquaza: WALLACE: [PLAYER], do you perhaps know where RAYQUAZA is now? / If you do, please tell me.
CaveOfOrigin_B1F_Text_CantYouRememberSom: WALLACE: Huh? You don't remember? Hmm… That's a problem… / Can't you remember somehow?

DewfordTown_Text_TinyIslandCommunity: DEWFORD is a tiny island community. If something gets trendy here, everyone picks up on it right away.

DewfordTown_Text_WhereAreWeBound: MR. BRINEY: Ahoy! For you, I'll go out to sea anytime! / Now, my friend, where are we bound?
DewfordTown_Text_SetSailBackToPetalburg: MR. BRINEY: Have you delivered your LETTER? / Or were you meaning to sail back to PETALBURG?
DewfordTown_Text_GoDeliverIllBeWaiting: MR. BRINEY: Then you go on and deliver the LETTER. I'll be waiting.

DewfordTown_Text_GettingItchToFish: This is a renowned fishing spot. Are you getting the itch to fish?

DewfordTown_Text_XIsTheBiggestHappeningT: I like what's hip, happening, and trendy. I'm always checking it out. / Listen, have you heard about this new “”? / That's right! Of course you know! / I mean, sheesh, “”… It's the hottest thing in cool! / Wherever you're from, “” is the biggest happening thing, right?

DewfordTown_Gym_Text_BrawlyPostBattle: I can see your talent becoming a giant wave to cause a storm of astonishment among TRAINERS one day!
DewfordTown_Gym_Text_ExplainBulkUp: That TM08 contains BULK UP. / It's a move that raises both ATTACK and DEFENSE stats. / … … … … … …

DewfordTown_Gym_Text_TakaoPostBattle: Your skill overcame my strength! Your technique is commendable!

DewfordTown_Gym_Text_JocelynPostBattle: I'm not going to waste this loss. I'll use it to motivate me to train! / One day I'll become a GYM LEADER… / No, I'll become the POKéMON LEAGUE CHAMPION!

DewfordTown_Gym_Text_LauraPostBattle: I battle in the dark to make my heart stronger. / But because it's so dark, I can never see BRAWLY's face…

DewfordTown_Gym_Text_GymGuideAdvice: Hey, how's it going, CHAMPION- bound [PLAYER]? / DEWFORD's GYM LEADER BRAWLY commands FIGHTING-type POKéMON. / Going against him with NORMAL-type POKéMON is asking for trouble. / FIGHTING POKéMON will lay a serious smack down on NORMAL POKéMON, so be careful! / What's worse, the GYM is as dark as the ocean floor. / But it will get brighter after defeating the TRAINERS in your way. / Hey, okay, go for it!
DewfordTown_Gym_Text_GymGuidePostVictory: Whoah! It's turned too bright in here! / Your future is bright, too!

DewfordTown_Gym_Text_CristianPostBattle: You win! Go after that BADGE!

DewfordTown_Gym_Text_LilithPostBattle: You deserve to stay lost and end up back at the entrance again!

DewfordTown_Gym_Text_BrendenPostBattle: Oh, aye! You're worthy of seeing our GYM LEADER.

DewfordTown_Hall_Text_CantImagineLifeWit: What's in vogue? Why, it has to be “”! / I can't imagine what life would be like without “”!

DewfordTown_Hall_Text_TeachingMonAboutTr: I'm teaching my POKéMON about “,” but it's not going well. / It's a bit too much, I think.

DewfordTown_Hall_Text_DeepLinkBetweenXAn: I'm studying up on the hip and trendy “” now. / Is it true that there's a deep link between “” and “”?

DewfordTown_Hall_Text_TVShowAboutTrend: This whole business about “”… Isn't there a TV show on it?

DewfordTown_Hall_Text_IsTrendMorePopular: Across the sea… / Is “” even more popular?

DewfordTown_Hall_Text_CollectTrendMercha: I collect official “” licensed merchandise. / I have official “” DOLLS… / Official “” brand clothing… / And officially licensed “” picture books. / Heheh, I own! I'm not sharing anything with you!

DewfordTown_Hall_Text_GiveYouSludgeBomb: For me, SLUDGE BOMB is at the peak of popularity. It's the one. / Hunh? You're telling me that you don't know about SLUDGE BOMB? / That's outright pitiful. I'll give you one.
DewfordTown_Hall_Text_LoveSludgeBombButT: I love SLUDGE BOMB. / But POKéMON with the move “” are in, too.

DewfordTown_House1_Text_LifeGoesSlowlyOn: I left the major port of SLATEPORT CITY when I married my husband here. / Life goes by slowly on this little island. But being surrounded by the beautiful sea--that's happiness, too.

DewfordTown_House1_Text_LotToBeSaidForLi: There's a lot to be said for living on a small island like this in harmony with POKéMON and the family.

DewfordTown_House2_Text_WantYouToHaveSil: Gorge your eyes on this! / It's a SILK SCARF. It's right at the cutting edge of fashion, yeah! / Oh, I can see your eyes twinkling! You appreciate my dazzling style! / Oh, you're a delight! Here you go. I want you to have it!
DewfordTown_House2_Text_ExplainSilkScarf: The SILK SCARF raises the power of NORMAL-type moves. / It's a marvelous SCARF that will go with almost all POKéMON!

DewfordTown_House2_Text_BrawlySoCool: Wow, you bothered to cross the sea to visit DEWFORD? / Did you maybe come here because you heard about BRAWLY? / He's so cool… Everyone idolizes him.

DewfordTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_StoneC: There's a stone cavern at the edge of town. / I've heard you can find rare stones there.

DewfordTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Fainte: Even if a POKéMON faints and can't battle, it can still use a move learned from a HIDDEN MACHINE (HM).

EverGrandeCity_DrakesRoom_Text_IntroSpee: I am the last of the POKéMON LEAGUE ELITE FOUR, DRAKE the DRAGON master! / In their natural state, POKéMON are wild living things. They are free. / At times, they hinder us. At times, they help us. / For us to battle with POKéMON as partners, do you know what it takes? / Do you know what is needed? / If you don't, then you will never prevail over me!
EverGrandeCity_DrakesRoom_Text_PostBattl: You deserve every credit for coming this far as a TRAINER of POKéMON. / You do seem to know what is needed. / Yes, what a TRAINER needs is a virtuous heart. / POKéMON touch the good hearts of TRAINERS and learn good from wrong. / They touch the good hearts of TRAINERS and grow strong. / Go! Go onwards! The CHAMPION is waiting!

EverGrandeCity_GlaciasRoom_Text_IntroSpe: Welcome, my name is GLACIA of the ELITE FOUR. / I've traveled from afar to HOENN so that I may hone my ice skills. / But all I have seen are challenges by weak TRAINERS and their POKéMON. / What about you? / It would please me to no end if I could go all out against you!
EverGrandeCity_GlaciasRoom_Text_PostBatt: Advance to the next room. / And there, confirm the truly fearsome side of the POKéMON LEAGUE.

EverGrandeCity_PhoebesRoom_Text_IntroSpe: Ahahaha! / I'm PHOEBE of the ELITE FOUR. I did my training on MT. PYRE. / While I trained, I gained the ability to commune with GHOST-type POKéMON. / Yes, the bond I developed with POKéMON is extremely tight. / So, come on, just try and see if you can even inflict damage on my POKéMON!
EverGrandeCity_PhoebesRoom_Text_PostBatt: There's a definite bond between you and your POKéMON, too. / I didn't recognize it, so it's only natural that I lost. / Yup, I'd like to see how far your bond will carry you. / Go ahead, move on to the next room.

EverGrandeCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Lea: The POKéMON LEAGUE is only a short distance after the VICTORY ROAD. / If you've come this far, what choice do you have but to keep going?

EverGrandeCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Bel: The long and harrowing VICTORY ROAD… / It's like reliving the path one has traveled in life… / Believe in your POKéMON and give it your very best!

EverGrandeCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Sco: SCOTT: [PLAYER], you've clawed your way up to face the POKéMON LEAGUE! / I'm happy for you! You made my cheering worthwhile! / [PLAYER], if you were to become the POKéMON LEAGUE CHAMPION… / I'll get in touch with you then. / Okay, [PLAYER]. Go for greatness!

EverGrandeCity_PokemonLeague_1F_Text_Mus: Beyond this point, only those TRAINERS who have collected all the GYM BADGES are permitted to enter. / TRAINER, let us confirm that you have all the GYM BADGES.
EverGrandeCity_PokemonLeague_1F_Text_GoF: TRAINER! Believe in yourself and your POKéMON, and go forth!
EverGrandeCity_PokemonLeague_1F_Text_Hav: You haven't obtained all the BADGES. / If you're bound for the POKéMON LEAGUE, you must return with them.

EverGrandeCity_PokemonLeague_1F_Text_Mus: Beyond this point, only those TRAINERS who have collected all the GYM BADGES are permitted to enter. / TRAINER, let us confirm that you have all the GYM BADGES.
EverGrandeCity_PokemonLeague_1F_Text_GoF: TRAINER! Believe in yourself and your POKéMON, and go forth!
EverGrandeCity_PokemonLeague_1F_Text_Hav: You haven't obtained all the BADGES. / If you're bound for the POKéMON LEAGUE, you must return with them.

EverGrandeCity_SidneysRoom_Text_IntroSpe: Welcome, challenger! I'm SIDNEY of the ELITE FOUR. / I like that look you're giving me. I guess you'll give me a good match. That's good! Looking real good! / All right! You and me, let's enjoy a battle that can only be staged here in the POKéMON LEAGUE!
EverGrandeCity_SidneysRoom_Text_PostBatt: Well, listen to what this loser has to say. / You've got what it takes to go far. Now, go on to the next room and enjoy your next battle!

FallarborTown_Text_MyPreciousAzurill: See! Take a look! This is my precious AZURILL! / It's slick and smooth and plushy, too!

FallarborTown_Text_ShadyCharactersCozmos: Something's happening, and I don't like it! / I've seen shady characters wandering in and out of PROF. COZMO's home…
FallarborTown_Text_RegionKnownForMeteors: This region's been known for meteors since the olden days. / They say METEOR FALLS was gouged out by a falling meteorite long ago.

FallarborTown_Text_HaveYouChallengedFlan: Have you already challenged FLANNERY, the LEADER of LAVARIDGE GYM? / The girl's grandfather was famous. He was one of the ELITE FOUR in the POKéMON LEAGUE at one point. / It wouldn't surprise me to see FLANNERY become a great TRAINER in her own right.

FallarborTown_BattleTentLobby_Text_CameT: I heard something about some tent, so I came to camp out. / I didn't know that tents these days are so luxurious! / Since I'm here, I may as well try my hand at battling!

FallarborTown_BattleTentLobby_Text_MakeT: Fufufufufu. / I'm going to make everyone think I'm just a kid and let them play down. / Then, I'll shock them and grab the title!

FallarborTown_BattleTentLobby_Text_Falla: You know how BATTLE TENTS offer different events in different towns? / My favorite is definitely the BATTLE TENT in FALLARBOR TOWN. / I think it's fantastic how TRAINERS try to win with all their faith in their POKéMON.

FallarborTown_BattleTentLobby_Text_Scott: SCOTT: Hi, [PLAYER]! So you came out to this BATTLE TENT! / The people in these parts tend to be easygoing and laid-back. / But, you see, what I'm looking for are people with… / How should I say this? / Someone bursting with the desire and the drive to win. / If there were a TRAINER like that, I'd immediately… / Whoops! Never mind! Keep working at it!
SCOTT: Instead of wasting your time with the likes of me, why not make a challenge?

FallarborTown_CozmosHouse_Text_Meteorite: PROF. COZMO: Oh… I never should have let myself be conned into telling TEAM MAGMA where you can find METEORITES… / That METEORITE from METEOR FALLS… It's never going to be mine now…
FallarborTown_CozmosHouse_Text_ReallyGoi: PROF. COZMO: Oh, I can't believe it. This is really, really great! / This is really going to help my research!

FallarborTown_CozmosHouse_Text_CozmoWent: PROF. COZMO went off to METEOR FALLS on ROUTE 114 with some people from TEAM MAGMA.
FallarborTown_CozmosHouse_Text_CozmoIsSo: Look at PROF. COZMO… He's so happy! I think it's cute.
FallarborTown_CozmosHouse_Text_FeelSorry: Poor PROF. COZMO… He's so depressed… I feel sorry for him.

FallarborTown_Mart_Text_DecidingSkittyEv: I'm having a hard time deciding if I should make my SKITTY evolve or not. / I only have to use this MOON STONE, but it's so hard to decide… / If I make it evolve, it will become much stronger. / But it will look so different, too.

FallarborTown_Mart_Text_SellNuggetIFound: This NUGGET I found here… I suppose I'll have to sell it, seeing as how it has no other use.

FallarborTown_MoveRelearnersHouse_Text_I: I'm the MOVE TUTOR. / I know all the moves that POKéMON learn--every one of them--and I can teach POKéMON those moves. / I can teach a move to a POKéMON of yours if you'd like. / I'll do it for a HEART SCALE. I'm collecting those now.
FallarborTown_MoveRelearnersHouse_Text_T: Oh! That's it! That's an honest to goodness HEART SCALE! / Let me guess, you want me to teach a move?
FallarborTown_MoveRelearnersHouse_Text_H: [PLAYER] handed over one HEART SCALE in exchange.
FallarborTown_MoveRelearnersHouse_Text_C: If your POKéMON need to learn a move, come back with a HEART SCALE.

FallarborTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Foss: I wonder what POKéMON looked like long, long ago? / Maybe the FOSSIL MANIAC at the edge of town will know.

FallarborTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Plan: In the fields of FALLARBOR, we plant seedlings of hardy trees that thrive even in volcanic ash.

FallarborTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Lane: Oh, hello. You are? / Okay, your name's [PLAYER]. I can see that you're a TRAINER. / So that means you use the POKéMON Storage System I developed. / How I arrived at that conclusion is a simple deductive process. / You spoke to me because you wanted to access something on this PC. / Oh, I'm sorry. I'm LANETTE. / Honestly, I'm glad to meet you--it's great you're using the Storage System. / If you could, please visit me at home. My house is on ROUTE 114.

FortreeCity_Text_SawGiganticPokemonInSky: No one believes me, but I saw this gigantic POKéMON in the sky. / It seemed to squirm as it flew toward ROUTE 131. / By the way… Sniff… Um… You, uh…smell singed. / Were you at a volcano or something?

FortreeCity_Text_TreesGrowByDrinkingRain: The ground absorbs rainwater, and trees grow by drinking that water… / Our FORTREE CITY exists because there's both water and soil.

FortreeCity_Text_SomethingBlockingGym: I want to go to the POKéMON GYM, but something's blocking the way. / After all the bother I went through training on ROUTE 120…
FortreeCity_Text_ThisTimeIllBeatWinona: I've got my pride-and-joy POKéMON with me. This time, I'll beat WINONA.

FortreeCity_Text_BugPokemonComeThroughWi: Living on top of trees is okay. / But sometimes BUG POKéMON come in through windows. It can be really startling.

FortreeCity_Text_EveryoneHealthyAndLivel: The CITY consists of homes built on trees. / Perhaps because of that lifestyle, everyone is healthy and lively. / Why, even myself--I feel as if I've grown thirty years younger.

FortreeCity_Text_PokemonThatEvolveWhenTr: There are POKéMON that evolve when you trade them! That's what I heard.

FortreeCity_Text_SomethingUnseeable: Something unseeable is in the way.

FortreeCity_DecorationShop_Text_Merchand: Merchandise you buy here is sent to your own PC. / That's fantastic! I wish they could also deliver me home like that.

FortreeCity_DecorationShop_Text_BuyingDe: I'm buying a pretty desk and I'm putting my cute DOLLS on it. / If I don't, when I decorate my SECRET BASE, my DOLLS will get dirty or poked with splinters.

FortreeCity_Gym_Text_WinonaPostBattle: Though I fell to you, I will remain devoted to BIRD POKéMON.
FortreeCity_Gym_Text_ExplainAerialAce: TM40 contains AERIAL ACE. / Its speed… No POKéMON should be able to avoid it. / … … … … … …

FortreeCity_Gym_Text_JaredPostBattle: A TRAINER has to be smart to keep up with unexpected turns of events. / Do you have the smarts to get to our LEADER?

FortreeCity_Gym_Text_FlintPostBattle: WINONA is cute and she's strong. She's the ultimate LEADER! / Blush…

FortreeCity_Gym_Text_AshleyPostBattle: Thanks to WINONA, the people of FORTREE can live without fear.

FortreeCity_Gym_Text_EdwardoPostBattle: The world is huge, and there are countless tough TRAINERS. / I'm going to keep training and make myself even stronger.

FortreeCity_Gym_Text_GymGuideAdvice: Yo, how's it going, CHAMPION- bound [PLAYER]? / FORTREE GYM LEADER WINONA is a master of FLYING-type POKéMON. / She's waiting at the back of this GYM, behind the rotating doors. / She's waiting for new challengers who are trying to take wing! / Okay, go for it!
FortreeCity_Gym_Text_GymGuidePostVictory: You did it! You've achieved liftoff!

FortreeCity_Gym_Text_HumbertoPostBattle: You'd better watch it! Don't get distracted staring at WINONA or you'll go crashing down in a heap!

FortreeCity_Gym_Text_DariusPostBattle: Sure, you beat me all right. But you'd better watch it! Our LEADER WINONA's POKéMON are all business.

FortreeCity_House1_Text_YouWillTradeWont: Wrooooaaar! I need it! I have to get me a ! I'll do anything for it! / …Uh… Did you hear that? My shout from the bottom of my heart? / Having heard that, you will trade your for my , won't you?
FortreeCity_House1_Text_MonYouTakeCare: Oh, yeah, right on! / , welcome! , you take care!
FortreeCity_House1_Text_GoingToMakeVolbe: I'm going to make VOLBEAT super strong from this moment on! / I hope you do the same with PLUSLE!

FortreeCity_House1_Text_TradingMemoriesW: Trading POKéMON with others… / It's as if you're trading your own memories with other people.

FortreeCity_House2_Text_CoinInWhichHand: Let this old woman see if your hidden power has awoken… / I hold a coin in my hand. / Now, tell me, have I palmed it in the right hand? Or in the left?
FortreeCity_House2_Text_CorrectTryAgainW: Oh! Yes, correct! / We shall try again. / In which hand have I palmed the coin? The right or left?
Oh! Yes, correct! / We shall try again. / In which hand have I palmed the coin? The right or left?
FortreeCity_House2_Text_YourHiddenPowerH: Oh! Splendid! Your hidden power has awoken! / Here, take this and awaken the hidden power of your POKéMON.
FortreeCity_House2_Text_ExplainHiddenPow: HIDDEN POWER is a move that changes with the POKéMON.
FortreeCity_House2_Text_HiddenPowersArou: People… POKéMON… / Their hidden powers are aroused by living in natural environments…

FortreeCity_House3_Text_MetStevenHadAmaz: While speaking about POKéDEXES, I remembered something. / I met this TRAINER, STEVEN, when I was searching for rare stones. / Hoo, boy, he had some amazing POKéMON with him. / They weren't just rare, they were trained to terrifying extremes! / He might even be stronger than the GYM LEADER in this town…

FortreeCity_House3_Text_OhYouHavePokedex: What's that thing you have there? / … … … … … … / Oh, it's called a POKéDEX? It's really awesome!

FortreeCity_House4_Text_BringsWorldClose: By being together with POKéMON, people make more and more friends. / And that brings the world closer together. I think it's wonderful!

FortreeCity_House4_Text_FriendsFarAwayTh: Thanks to my WINGULL, I have friends who live far away.
FortreeCity_House4_Text_WelcomeWingullTa: Good! Welcome back, WINGULL! / Huh? What is this? What is it holding? / A MENTAL HERB? It must have picked it up somewhere. / But I'm not a TRAINER, so you can have it.
FortreeCity_House4_Text_AskedWingullToRu: Heheh, I asked my WINGULL to run an errand for me.

FortreeCity_House5_Text_TreeHousesAreGre: The tree houses of FORTREE are great! / I think it's the number one town for living together with POKéMON.

FortreeCity_House5_Text_AdaptedToNature: POKéMON and people have adapted to nature for survival. / There's no need to make nature conform to the way we want to live.

FortreeCity_Mart_Text_SuperRepelBetter: SUPER REPEL lasts a long time, and it gets the job done. / It's much better than an ordinary REPEL.

FortreeCity_Mart_Text_StockUpOnItems: I always stock up on more items than I'm sure I'll need. / You never know what might happen. Better to be safe than sorry!

FortreeCity_Mart_Text_RareCandyMakesMonG: A RARE CANDY makes a POKéMON grow immediately by one level.

FortreeCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_GoToSa: Listen, kid, are you working on a POKéDEX? / Hmm… Go to the SAFARI ZONE. That's my suggestion.

FortreeCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Record: Have you done anything at the RECORD CORNER? / It's pretty neat. It mixes and matches the records of TRAINERS. / I don't know quite how it works, but it's cool. It's exciting, even!

FortreeCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_DoYouK: Oh, wow, you have a POKéNAV! And it's just like mine! / Do you know about POKéNAV's MATCH CALL system? / Access it, and you can chat with registered TRAINERS anytime. / It also shows you which TRAINERS want a rematch with you. / It's really nifty! Those DEVON guys sure know what they're doing!

GraniteCave_1F_Text_GetsDarkAheadHereYou: Hey, you. It gets awfully dark ahead. It'll be tough trying to explore. / That guy who came by earlier… STEVEN, I think it was. / He knew how to use FLASH, so he ought to be all right, but… / Well, for us HIKERS, helping out those that we meet is our motto. / Here you go, I'll pass this on to you.
GraniteCave_1F_Text_ExplainFlash: Teach that hidden move FLASH to a POKéMON and use it. / It lights up even the inky darkness of caves. / But, to use it, you need the GYM BADGE from DEWFORD's POKéMON GYM.

GraniteCave_StevensRoom_Text_ImStevenLet: My name is STEVEN. / I'm interested in rare stones, so I travel here and there. / Oh? A LETTER for me?
GraniteCave_StevensRoom_Text_ThankYouTak: STEVEN: Okay, thank you. / You went through all this trouble to deliver that. I need to thank you. / Let me see… I'll give you this TM. / It contains my favorite move, STEEL WING.
GraniteCave_StevensRoom_Text_CouldBecome: STEVEN: Your POKéMON appear quite capable. / If you keep training, you could even become the CHAMPION of the POKéMON LEAGUE one day. That's what I think. / I know, since we've gotten to know each other, let's register one another in our POKéNAVS. / … … … … … …
GraniteCave_StevensRoom_Text_IveGotToHur: Now, I've got to hurry along.

InsideOfTruck_Text_BoxPrintedWithMonLogo: The box is printed with a POKéMON logo. / It's a POKéMON brand moving and delivery service.
The box is printed with a POKéMON logo. / It's a POKéMON brand moving and delivery service.
The box is printed with a POKéMON logo. / It's a POKéMON brand moving and delivery service.

JaggedPass_Text_EricPostBattle: Yes, I did lose at POKéMON… / But, when it comes to the love of the mountains, I have you beat!

JaggedPass_Text_EthanPostBattle: If I had an ACRO BIKE, I'd be able to jump ledges.

JaggedPass_Text_DianaPostBattle: Did you know? / Some people cleverly ride their bicycles up this horribly bumpy pass.

JaggedPass_Text_GruntIntro: Wah! What are you doing here? / What am I doing in a place like this? / What business is it of yours?
JaggedPass_Text_GoWhereverYouWant: Okay, oh-kay! I admit it--you're strong! / Don't worry about me. Go wherever you want!

JaggedPass_Text_AutumnPostBattle: What is that odd rock protrusion a little up the hill from here?

JaggedPass_Text_JulioPostBattle: My bicycle bounced around so much, my rear end's sore…

LavaridgeTown_Text_OhYouLikeHotSprings: Oh, you like hot springs, do you? / That's surprising for one as young as you.

LavaridgeTown_Text_HotSpringsNeverRunDry: We draw as much hot water as we need, and yet the hot springs never run dry. / Isn't it magical? / These hot springs appear near active volcanoes. Veins of water under the ground are heated by magma to well up as hot springs.

LavaridgeTown_Text_PokemonNippedBackside: Being buried in this hot sand is… Sigh… / So warm and heavenly… / Eh? Gyaah! Ouch! / A POKéMON nipped my backside!

LavaridgeTown_Text_BatheInHotSpringsEver: I bathe in the hot springs every day. / I want to become a beautiful and strong GYM LEADER like FLANNERY.

LavaridgeTown_Text_IfPokemonInHotSprings: If people put POKéMON in hot springs, it might be seriously strange. / Why, it might be an electric bath, or a bubble bath, or even a lava bath…

LavaridgeTown_Text_HotSpringsClaims: They're claiming that these hot springs are good for calming nervous tension, relieving aching muscles, solving romantic problems, and attracting money…

LavaridgeTown_Text_HaveEggWillYouTakeIt: I have here an EGG. / I'd hoped to hatch it by covering it in hot sand by the hot springs. But that doesn't seem to be enough… / I've heard it would be best if it were kept together with POKéMON and carried about. / You are a TRAINER, yes? And your POKéMON radiate vitality. / So, what say you? Will you take this EGG to hatch?
LavaridgeTown_Text_HopeYoullWalkPlentyWi: Good! I hope you'll walk plenty with this here EGG!
LavaridgeTown_Text_EverySoOftenEggFoundA: Every so often, an EGG will be found at the POKéMON DAY CARE. / Or at least that's how the rumor goes.

LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F_Text_FlanneryPostBa: Your power reminds me of someone… / Oh! I know! You battle like NORMAN, the GYM LEADER of PETALBURG.
LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F_Text_ExplainOverhea: That TM50 contains OVERHEAT. / That move inflicts serious damage on the opponent. / But it also sharply cuts the SP. ATK of the POKéMON using it. It might not be suitable for longer battles.

LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F_Text_ColePostBattle: Being buried in hot sand promotes circulation. / It's effective for healing pain in your joints.

LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F_Text_GeraldPostBatt: The temperature of magma is 392 degrees. / Your POKéMON beat me, so they should easily survive in magma.

LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F_Text_AxlePostBattle: Haaah… Whew… / If you spend too much time buried in hot sand, it tuckers you out…

LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F_Text_DaniellePostBa: I'm going to be a pretty and strong TRAINER just like FLANNERY.

LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F_Text_GymGuideAdvice: Hey, how's it going, CHAMPION- bound [PLAYER]? / LAVARIDGE's GYM LEADER FLANNERY uses FIRE-type POKéMON. / Her passion for POKéMON burns stronger and hotter than a volcano. / Don't get too close to her--you'll burn! Hose her down with water and then go for it!
LavaridgeTown_Gym_1F_Text_GymGuidePostVi: Yow! That was a scorching-hot battle!

LavaridgeTown_HerbShop_Text_WelcomeToHer: Welcome to the HERB SHOP, home of effective and inexpensive medicine!

LavaridgeTown_HerbShop_Text_YouveComeToL: You've come to look at herbal medicine in LAVARIDGE? / That's rather commendable. / I like you! Take this!
LavaridgeTown_HerbShop_Text_ExplainCharc: That CHARCOAL I gave you, it's used for making herbal medicine. / It also does wonders when held by a POKéMON. / It intensifies the power of FIRE-type moves.

LavaridgeTown_HerbShop_Text_HerbalMedici: Herbal medicine works impressively well. But your POKéMON will dislike you for it. It must be horribly bitter!

LavaridgeTown_House_Text_WifeWarmingEggI: My wife's warming an EGG in the hot springs. This is what she told me. / She left two POKéMON with the DAY CARE. And they discovered that EGG!

LavaridgeTown_Mart_Text_XSpeedFirstStrik: Use X SPEED to add to a POKéMON's SPEED in battle. / That will help it get in the first strike--a decided advantage!

LavaridgeTown_Mart_Text_LocalSpecialtyOn: On MT. CHIMNEY's peak, there's a local specialty that you can buy only there. / Give it to a POKéMON--it will be elated.

LavaridgeTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_HotS: It's sort of magical how just sitting in a hot-spring pool can invigorate. / I wish I could let my POKéMON soak, too.

LavaridgeTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Trai: I think POKéMON get closer to their TRAINERS if they spend time together. / The longer the better. That's what I think.
Hohoho! Hey, kid, you can reach the hot springs from here. / If POKéMON are getting rest, so too should their TRAINERS.

LilycoveCity_Text_TeamAquaBeenTrainingWa: TEAM AQUA's been training their WAILMER in the cove. / We SAILORS can't get our boats out to sea with them in the way!
LilycoveCity_Text_SomeonePuntedTeamAquaO: Ahoy, did you know? / Someone punted TEAM AQUA out of the way for us! / That got the WAILMER out of the cove, so we can get our boats out again.

LilycoveCity_Text_StrangeCaveInCove: Have you seen that strange cave in the cove at the edge of town?
LilycoveCity_Text_GoingToMoveDeleterForH: I'm going to teach my POKéMON some new moves for entering a CONTEST. / So, I'm going to see the MOVE DELETER and make it forget HM moves.

LilycoveCity_Text_ContestHallInTown: There's a POKéMON CONTEST HALL right in this here town. / That means well-raised POKéMON will come from all over the country. / My heart swells with excitement!

LilycoveCity_Text_ImFromKanto: I came from KANTO. / The HOENN region is beautiful with all its water and verdant nature. / Hunh? Wait a second… / Could there be rare POKéMON that live only in this area?

LilycoveCity_Text_ImArtDealer: I'm an ART DEALER. / I am a buyer and seller of fine art, especially paintings. / I've heard that the MUSEUM here has magnificent works on exhibit…

LilycoveCity_Text_SomeoneStoleMyPokemon: I was taking a relaxing snooze at the seaside inn to the sound of waves… / When someone stole my POKéMON! / Who's the abductor? TEAM AQUA? Is it TEAM AQUA?
LilycoveCity_Text_MissingPokemonCameBack: My missing POKéMON… It came back without me noticing!

LilycoveCity_Text_SeaRemainsForeverYoung: Even as we grow old and wrinkled, the sea remains forever young with the vivid brilliance of life… / Fwohoho fwohohohoho…

LilycoveCity_Text_SixtyYearsAgoHusbandPr: It was sixty years ago that my husband proposed to me here. The sea remains as beautiful as ever. / Mufufufu mufufufufufu…

LilycoveCity_Text_TeamAquaRenovatedCaver: Hm, you know of the peculiar cavern in this cove? / That had been a natural formation, but then that TEAM AQUA lot came along and made their renovations. / They call themselves the “nature-loving TEAM AQUA”! / But what they do and what they say don't match at all!
LilycoveCity_Text_TeamAquaLotGoneForGood: That cave in the cove… / I didn't notice it right away, but it's completely empty now. / That TEAM AQUA lot, they must have gone away for good.

LilycoveCity_Text_WailmerLeapOutOfWater: There! WAILMER! Leap out of the water now!
LilycoveCity_Text_GetLostMessingUpTraini: Hunh? What do you want? / You're messing up our training, so can you, like, get lost?

LilycoveCity_Text_IfWorldBecomesOurs: If this whole wide world becomes ours, TEAM AQUA's, it will be a happier place for POKéMON, too.

LilycoveCity_Text_MovedLootIntoHideoutTo: Fufufu… / We moved more loot into our secret HIDEOUT today… / Wh-who are you?! I was just talking to myself!

LilycoveCity_Text_ChanceToDoBigThings: I'm just a GRUNT, so I don't know what the BOSS is thinking… / But being on TEAM AQUA, I know I'll get the chance to do big things! / Wh-who are you?! I was just talking to myself!

LilycoveCity_Text_DontGoNearCaveInCove: Hey, you! / Don't go near the cave in the cove! / Why? You don't need a reason why! I'm an adult, so you just listen to me!

LilycoveCity_Text_DoYouKnowAboutBerryBle: Do you know about the machine BERRY BLENDER?

LilycoveCity_Text_HoneymoonVowToSeeRareP: On our honeymoon, we vowed to see as many rare POKéMON as we can. / So we were delighted to see a rare POKéMON as soon as we arrived. / I mean, we are totally happy!

LilycoveCity_Text_JustArrivedAndSawRareP: We just arrived here on our honeymoon vacation. / We happened to see a DRAGON-type POKéMON flying way up in the sky. / Do cool POKéMON like that live in the HOENN region?

LilycoveCity_Text_HeardTowerCalledSkyPil: I heard there's a tower somewhere out on the sea routes. / It's called the SKY PILLAR, I hear.

LilycoveCity_Text_SawTallTowerOnRoute131: I saw this tall tower somewhere around ROUTE 131. / Could that possibly be…?

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_TodayWonSm: This POKéMON won the BEAUTY CONTEST here before. / Well, guess what? Today, I made it win a SMARTNESS CONTEST! / My abilities scare even me…

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_EnteredBun: I've entered a bunch of CONTESTS, so I'm seeing how things work. / If you're in a COOLNESS CONTEST, cool moves go over as appeals. / But smart moves and cute moves don't go over well, for instance.

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_ManWhoWonE: That young man who won earlier had a whole bunch of different S. / Can you win if you had that many of those things?

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_GiveItBest: MC: Okay, SMART POKéMON and their TRAINERS, are you ready?! / Give it your best showing! Let's appeal!

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_AreYouEnjo: JUDGE: Are you enjoying this CONTEST? / Come back with three friends, and all of you may enter a CONTEST!

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_EnteredWro: Ayayayay… I entered the wrong CONTEST. / I entered this tough POKéMON in the SMARTNESS CONTEST… / Come on, wow them with a smart-looking ROCK SMASH.

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_RaisedMonT: I've spent many a year, and all my wisdom besides, raising this POKéMON to be smart. / It won't be easily bested by some young pup's POKéMON. / My dear wife, are you seeing this?

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_IfMonPulls: There it is! / If my POKéMON pulls a smart move next, the audience's excitement will peak!

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_DontApprec: Oh, dear, no! / My darling ZUBAT's LEECH LIFE is so cute I kept using it over and over! / But these mean people don't appreciate it at all!

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_StillLoveS: When all's said and done, I still love SMARTNESS CONTESTS. / That intellectual green color… It's so… So… Cool.

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_AllSeemToU: Even when TRAINERS enter the same kind of POKéMON, they all seem to use different moves for appeals. / It's just like the way people have different styles for battling.

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_AreYouEnte: MC: Are you entering the BEAUTY CONTEST, too? Good luck!

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_EveryPokem: JUDGE: Ah, every POKéMON here is a model of pristine beauty! / Why, I almost forgot to score them!

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_EyesWillBe: A POKéMON this beautiful… There isn't another one like it. / Everyone's eyes will be glued to my beauty.

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_OverdidGro: Waaaah! / I brushed and groomed my POKéMON carefully for this CONTEST… / But I overdid it… My POKéMON's coat turned all scraggly… / What should I do?

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_JudgeWontS: This AURORA BEAM is so dazzling, the JUDGE won't be able to see it. / Uh, wait a second… That'll be meaningless, then!

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_PokemonLoo: This pretty POKéMON looks just like me when I was younger. / Right when I said that, my husband spewed the coffee he was drinking. / Did I say something funny?

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_WinBeautyC: You know, if I win at a BEAUTY CONTEST, sure it makes me happy. More than usual, anyway.

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_CantWinOnB: You can't always win on just beauty alone. / You have to groom your POKéMON so it's nice and glossy like mine.

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_GanderAtAl: Wahahahah! / Will you take a gander at all those pretty POKéMON! I just love this sort of glitz!

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_PokemonSma: I think the POKéMON look smarter than their TRAINERS. By a lot.

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_InTheMiddl: MC: Uh-oh! Hello! We're in the middle of a CONTEST! / Please enter at our registration counter and come out, okay?

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_SuchCharmi: JUDGE: Oh, such charming and cute appeals! / Oh, my goodness! What a perfectly adorable WATER SPORT appeal!

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_MyAzurillW: Oh, no… My sweet AZURILL was distracted by another POKéMON.

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_NeverWonBa: My POKéMON has never won in a battle, but put it in a CONTEST and look out!

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_PetalDance: My POKéMON's PETAL DANCE is a marvel of elegance. / I won't let anyone disturb its performance.

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_MyMonAppea: Everyone's POKéMON are very cute. / However, if my POKéMON were to make a cute appeal… / I'm sure that it would be so much cuter than the others.

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_MyChildIsI: My child is in this CONTEST.
LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_ComeOnDear: Come on, dear. Go for it! Your POKéMON is the best!

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_ThatGirlTh: I think that girl over there is the cutest of the lot. / What's that? They're judging POKéMON by their looks?

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_WantCuteMo: Ohh, seeing all these cute POKéMON, they make we want to get my own! / I'm going to go catch some!

LilycoveCity_ContestHall_Text_IsntThisPl: Whoa, isn't this place humongous! / The tension in the air… It's not like a CONTEST hall in the sticks.

LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_MasterRan: Hoo, boy… Master Rank CONTESTS, here I come. / The world will know that my dearest POKéMON is the cutest being in all existence. The time has come! Uheheheh.

LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_WholeVari: You can see a whole variety of POKéMON here. / That's why I make this place a regular part of my daily stroll.

LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_ContestFe: Wow, coming out to a CONTEST is a feast for these eyes! / Would you look at all the POKéMON that just scream to be painted?

LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_LavishedC: Day in and day out, I lavished my care on this POKéMON. / Its condition is peaking. Today, victory is mine!

LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_ToughCont: The TOUGHNESS CONTEST is like extreme, man! / Those muscular appeals… Cascading sweat… I swoon!

LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_MadePokeb: I made S with Mom, Dad, and Big Sister. They turned out great! / I bet you can make smoother, better S if you have more people.

LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_LadyGaveM: Yippee! / The lady at the reception counter gave me a case for S!
LilycoveCity_ContestLobby_Text_MakePokeb: Make S and put them in there. / When you make a , everyone has to put in a different BERRY.

LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F_Text_Guest: Hm, so they doubled the guests by using POKéMON as attractions? / Hm, well, maybe I should make a cute POKéMON our inn's mascot. / I wonder if that will attract more guests to stay with us?
LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F_Text_NoGue: Oh, sorry, sorry! I was too involved in watching TV! / Since that TEAM AQUA came to town, the tourists have been staying away.
LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F_Text_House: Amazing! A house-sitting POKéMON caught a burglar? / That's something. If we had a tough POKéMON as a security guard… / We would be able to provide our guests with greater safety.
LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F_Text_Bette: Oh, sorry, sorry! I was too involved in watching TV. / Oh, yes. A big group of guests arrived a little while ago. / They booked in as GAME FREAK, so I guess they must make games. / Uh-oh, I'd better get working on their dinner!
LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F_Text_MonFo: Amazing! You're telling me a POKéMON found someone's lost item? / That's something. If we had some smart POKéMON like that… / We could recover anything that our guests mislaid…
LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_1F_Text_Heard: Oh, sorry, sorry! I was too involved in watching TV! / I heard that someone busted the TEAM AQUA HIDEOUT. / Thanks to that, we just booked a reservation from a big group. / It was a company called… Uh… GAME something…

LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F_Text_ShowM: I'm the GAME DESIGNER. / Oh, is that right? You're working on a POKéDEX? / It's tough trying to complete it, but don't give up. / If you do complete it, please come show me.
LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F_Text_Fille: Wow! That's awesome! Yep, it's totally awesome! / This POKéDEX is completely filled! You really must love POKéMON! / I'm so impressed! / Let me give you something in recognition of your feat!

LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F_Text_ImThe: I'm the GRAPHIC ARTIST! Aren't the POKéMON of HOENN interesting?

LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F_Text_Girls: The girl TUBERS, they're cute, hey? To battle against a cute TUBER… / Whoop, it's so awesome! / And the TWINS! Aren't they cute? A 2-on-2 battle with TWINS… / Whoop, it's unbearably fun!

LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F_Text_ImThe: Me? You're talking to me? I'm the PROGRAMMER. / I wonder what the SLOTS are like here.

LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F_Text_Never: You never know when and where people will challenge you. / That's why I never leave home without my GAME BOY ADVANCE.

LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F_Text_SeaBr: The sea breeze tickles my heart. It feels wonderful here!

LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F_Text_Snooz: SCOTT: … … … … … … … … … … Zzz… / … … … … … Huh?! Oh, sorry, sorry! I was snoozing! / I came to check out this POKéMON CONTEST thing. / I have to admit, it does look quite entertaining, but… / Consider me a purist--I prefer battles and tough TRAINERS. / But that's just me. / [PLAYER], I hope you'll enjoy everything like the GYMS, CONTESTS, BATTLE TENT, the whole works!
LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F_Text_Conte: SCOTT: I think it does take strategy to win a CONTEST. / Devising CONTEST strategies is one way of becoming a better TRAINER, I'd say.

LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_1F_Text_IBu: Whenever I come to the DEPARTMENT STORE, I always end up buying all sorts of things because it's so fun.

LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_1F_Text_Mom: Today, my mom is going to buy me some nice furniture.

LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_1F_Text_Buy: I'm buying something for my AZUMARILL as a reward for winning a CONTEST.

LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_2F_Text_Lea: Learn to use items properly. That's basic, really.

LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_2F_Text_Goo: My husband is waiting at home. What would make a good gift for him?

LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_2F_Text_Sto: I'm leaving on a long journey soon. I need to stock up on items.

LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_3F_Text_Ite: For quickly toughening up POKéMON, items are the best. / PROTEIN boosts ATTACK, and CALCIUM raises SP. ATK.

LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_3F_Text_Wan: I want my POKéMON to have more endurance. / I'm trying to decide whether to raise DEFENSE with IRON, or SP. DEF with ZINC.

LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_3F_Text_Gav: I gave a CARBOS to my POKéMON, and its SPEED went up.

LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_4F_Text_Att: Hmm… / An attacking move… Or a defensive move… / It's no easy matter to decide which TM moves should be taught to POKéMON…

LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_4F_Text_Fif: There are so many different kinds of TM moves. / A catalog I read said there are fifty different kinds.

LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_4F_Text_Pok: I'd like to get all the different TMs, but a POKéMON learns only four moves.

LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_5F_Text_Get: I'm not big enough to raise POKéMON, so I'm getting a cute DOLL instead.

LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_5F_Text_Pla: This place is full of cute DOLLS. / I should buy some for me, instead of just for my children.

LilycoveCity_DepartmentStore_5F_Text_Clo: I think they closed the rooftop because the weather is wild today.

LilycoveCity_DepartmentStoreRooftop_Text: Don't they have set dates for their clear-out sales? / I watch TV, but they never show any commercials.

LilycoveCity_Harbor_Text_FerryUnavailabl: I beg your pardon? You're looking for a ship? / I'm sorry, the ferry service isn't available at present…
LilycoveCity_Harbor_Text_MayISeeYourTick: Hello, are you here for the ferry? May I see your TICKET?
LilycoveCity_Harbor_Text_FlashTicketWher: [PLAYER] flashed the TICKET. / Perfect! That's all you need! / And where would you like to go?

LilycoveCity_Harbor_Text_SailorFerryUnav: Until they finish making the ferry, we sailors have nothing to do… / I wish they'd get a move on, the folks at the SHIPYARD in SLATEPORT.
LilycoveCity_Harbor_Text_SailorFerryAvai: The ferry S.S. TIDAL is finally in operation. / The folks at the SHIPYARD in SLATEPORT must've worked extra hard. / Well, it's my turn to get busy now!

LilycoveCity_House1_Text_PokemonPartners: POKéMON are partners to people. They aren't our tools. / Unfortunately, there are some people who fail to understand that…

LilycoveCity_House2_Text_NotAwakeYetHave: Huh? What? What's that? / I'm not near awake yet… You can have this…
LilycoveCity_House2_Text_SleepIsEssentia: Yawn… / Sleep is essential for good health… Sleep and regain health…

LilycoveCity_House3_Text_LearnFromMaster: Oh, my, my! Are you traveling alone? But you're so young! Good for you! / I'm sure my kids could learn a thing or two from you! / Me? I'm a master of S. / If I get serious just a little, why, I can concoct great S. / Would you like to learn from me, a master of S?
LilycoveCity_House3_Text_ExplainPokebloc: Oh, good! You're a smart soul! This is a bit long, so listen up! / Are you ready? / If you look at S, you should see that they are rated on how they feel. / The lower the feel rating, the better it is. Don't forget this! / A good has a low feel rating and a high level. / A POKéMON can eat more good S than ordinary ones, too. / And this is important. / If you want to make smooth S, use different kinds of BERRIES. / Don't be stingy--the kinds of BERRIES affect the smoothness of S. / And another thing. / The more people blending BERRIES, the smoother the S. / That's why you should talk to other people and make S together. / That's about all you need to know to make good S. / If everyone had POKéMON they love, smooth S, and a loving family, the world would be a happier place. / Don't give up, dear!

LilycoveCity_House3_Text_HappyToHaveQuad: When my wife gave birth to quadruplets, you bet I was shocked. / But, now, seeing them play together, it makes me happy.

LilycoveCity_House4_Text_MysteriesAtBott: This planet's biggest mysteries are at the bottom of the sea. / Somebody said that, but I don't know…

LilycoveCity_House4_Text_UnderwaterTrenc: There's a deep underwater trench between MOSSDEEP and SOOTOPOLIS. / That's what someone told me, anyway.

LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Welc: Welcome to LILYCOVE MUSEUM. / Please take the time to enjoy our collection of fantastic artwork featuring POKéMON.

LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_ImCu: I'm the CURATOR of this MUSEUM of fine arts. / It's heartening to see someone so young as you in our MUSEUM. / Have you viewed our collection of paintings already?
