LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Must: Battling with POKéMON is fun, I'll grant you that. / But one mustn't forget our love for the fine arts.

LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_This: This ART MUSEUM… Well, you could see many fantastic paintings. / And the CURATOR is a wonderful person. / Among artists like myself, this MUSEUM is an inspiration.
This lady is pretty! She's like Mommy!
This POKéMON is adorable! Just like our little boy!

LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Hear: I'd heard that this ART MUSEUM got in some new paintings. / So, naturally I hurried over. / Are the new paintings up on the second floor?

LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_AimT: I aim to see many great paintings here and learn from them. / I have this dream of one day having my artwork exhibited here.

LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Muse: The ART MUSEUM has become a favorite tourist destination. / It's great for LILYCOVE… No, great for the HOENN region! / This is what I've heard--a lone TRAINER procured all the paintings upstairs.

LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_1F_Text_Cura: Lately, the CURATOR has been unusually cheerful. / I bet something good happened for him. Definitely.

LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_Wish: I wish to fill this exhibit hall with modern and vibrant paintings of POKéMON.
LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_Hono: Ah, so good to see you, [PLAYER]! / It's an honor to have you visit us on your busy journeys. / Please, relax and do enjoy your visit with us.

LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_NewP: I've been away awhile, so the new paintings up here surprised me. / I wish someone would paint my POKéMON this pretty.
Well… So this is where they show the topical POKéMON paintings. / I see, these new paintings are indeed rather amusing.

LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_Thes: Wow, is that right? These paintings are of your POKéMON. / Isn't that just the ultimate joy for a TRAINER?

LilycoveCity_MoveDeletersHouse_Text_ICan: Uh… Oh, yes, I'm the MOVE DELETER. / I can make POKéMON forget their moves. / Would you like me to do that?

LilycoveCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_HowMa: I wonder how many kinds of POKéMON there are in the world. / It'd be great to cross seas and trade POKéMON with people far away.

LilycoveCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Heard: I've been hearing about some rotten scoundrels who steal POKéMON and rip off METEORITES.
LilycoveCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Haven: Those rotten scoundrels who steal POKéMON and rip off METEORITES… / I haven't seen them around recently.

LilycoveCity_PokemonTrainerFanClub_Text_: I can't help it, I can only get to like BRAWLY…
I hate to say this, but the TRAINER everybody's talking about is , no question about it! / That TRAINER's power… It's out of the ordinary.
NORMAN battled with more power, charisma, and showmanship than you. / Even though people may say that you're strong… / You've still got a long way to go compared to your father.
is really cool… / Everyone thinks so, right, right?
is so wickedly cool… I want to shake hands with my hero.
You're a pretty decent TRAINER, I think. / But I also think that is number one right now. / That's just my opinion. Don't worry about it too much.
Among the recently hot TRAINERS, is the standout. / That toughness, it's simply not normal. / You're doing okay, but you're not in the same class as .
Yes, I see strength in your eyes. / But! / You still haven't realized your potential.

LittlerootTown_Text_IfYouGoInGrassPokemo: Um, um, um! / If you go outside and go in the grass, wild POKéMON will jump out!
LittlerootTown_Text_GoodLuckCatchingPoke: Are you going to catch POKéMON? Good luck!
LittlerootTown_Text_YouSavedBirch: You saved PROF. BIRCH! I'm so glad!

LittlerootTown_Text_CanUsePCToStoreItems: If you use a PC, you can store items and POKéMON. / The power of science is staggering!

LittlerootTown_Text_BirchSpendsDaysInLab: PROF. BIRCH spends days in his LAB studying, then he'll suddenly go out in the wild to do more research… / When does PROF. BIRCH spend time at home?

LittlerootTown_Text_WearTheseRunningShoe: MOM: [PLAYER]! [PLAYER]! Did you introduce yourself to PROF. BIRCH? / Oh! What an adorable POKéMON! You got it from PROF. BIRCH. How nice! / You're your father's child, all right. You look good together with POKéMON! / Here, honey! If you're going out on an adventure, wear these RUNNING SHOES. / They'll put a zip in your step!
LittlerootTown_Text_SwitchShoesWithRunni: [PLAYER] switched shoes with the RUNNING SHOES.
LittlerootTown_Text_ExplainRunningShoes: MOM: [PLAYER], those shoes came with instructions. / “Press the B Button while wearing these RUNNING SHOES to run extra-fast! / “Slip on these RUNNING SHOES and race in the great outdoors!”
LittlerootTown_Text_ComeHomeIfAnythingHa: … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … / To think that you have your very own POKéMON now… Your father will be overjoyed. / …But please be careful. If anything happens, you can come home. / Go on, go get them, honey!

RivalsHouse_1F_Text_LikeChildLikeFather: Like child, like father. / My husband is as wild about POKéMON as our child. / If he's not at his LAB, he's likely scrabbling about in grassy places.
RivalsHouse_1F_Text_ShouldGoHomeEverySoO: I think it's wonderful for people to travel with POKéMON. / But you should go home every so often to let your mother know you're okay. / She might not say it, but I'm sure she worries about you, [PLAYER].
RivalsHouse_1F_Text_WentOutToRoute103: Oh, [RIVAL] went out to ROUTE 103 just a little while ago. / Like father, like child. [RIVAL] can't stay quietly at home.

RivalsHouse_1F_Text_DoYouHavePokemon: Hi, neighbor! / Do you already have your own POKéMON?

RivalsHouse_2F_Text_ItsRivalsPokeBall: It's [RIVAL]'s POKé BALL! / Better leave it right where it is.

LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchsLab_Text_B: Hunh? PROF. BIRCH? / The PROF's away on fieldwork. Ergo, he isn't here. / Oh, let me explain what fieldwork is. / It is to study things in the natural environment, like fields and mountains, instead of a laboratory. / The PROF isn't one for doing desk work. He's the type of person who would rather go outside and experience things than read about them here.
The PROF isn't one for doing desk work. He's the type of person who would rather go outside and experience things than read about them here.
PROF. BIRCH: [RIVAL]? Gone home, I think. / Or maybe that kid's scrabbling around in tall grass again somewhere… / If you or your POKéMON get tired, you should get some rest at home.

LittlerootTown_ProfessorBirchsLab_Text_Y: PROF. BIRCH: The FIRE POKéMON CYNDAQUIL caught your eye! / You're as sharp as ever! / So the CYNDAQUIL is your choice?
PROF. BIRCH: The WATER POKéMON TOTODILE is your choice! / You know how to pick a good one. / So, you'll take the TOTODILE?
PROF. BIRCH: The GRASS POKéMON CHIKORITA is your choice! / You sure know what you're doing. / So, you'll take the CHIKORITA?

MagmaHideout_1F_Text_Grunt1PostBattle: Okay, I'll try to put a little more effort into things from now on…

MagmaHideout_1F_Text_Grunt2PostBattle: I won't tell you after all. You'll find out when you get there! / It'd be better if you saved surprises to the end, don't you think?

MagmaHideout_2F_1R_Text_Grunt4PostBattle: I've already lost. / Do I really need to keep running around in a circle?

MagmaHideout_2F_1R_Text_Grunt5PostBattle: Actually, I'm no expert at battling…

MagmaHideout_2F_1R_Text_Grunt14PostBattl: If you suffer from chills, you should join TEAM MAGMA.

MagmaHideout_2F_1R_Text_Grunt3PostBattle: Maybe it would've been better if I did just let you go unchallenged…

MagmaHideout_2F_2R_Text_Grunt8PostBattle: I'm getting this feeling that our plan is going to end in failure…

MagmaHideout_2F_2R_Text_Grunt7PostBattle: You just happened to win this time, but that doesn't matter. / TEAM MAGMA's goal is about to be reached!

MagmaHideout_2F_2R_Text_Grunt6PostBattle: Don't you get lonely for the sea being in a place like this?

MagmaHideout_2F_2R_Text_Grunt15PostBattl: We dug up something beyond belief! And, we got the BLUE ORB! / All that's left is for our leader to… Fufufu… Fwahahaha!

MagmaHideout_3F_1R_Text_Grunt9PostBattle: Do you think it's odd that we're wearing hoods in this magma-filled volcano?

MagmaHideout_3F_1R_Text_Grunt16PostBattl: Listen to me. TEAM MAGMA is right! / Don't listen to TEAM AQUA. Don't believe their lies!

MagmaHideout_3F_2R_Text_Grunt10PostBattl: You know, losing to you cleared my mind. / The next time I see our leader, I'm going to ask him about what we do.

MagmaHideout_4F_Text_Grunt11PostBattle: I wonder if GROUDON even has a tail?

MagmaHideout_4F_Text_Grunt12PostBattle: MAXIE, sir! An intruder is headed your way!

MagmaHideout_4F_Text_TabithaPostBattle: …And while you wasted time with me, MAXIE should have awakened GROUDON…

MagmaHideout_4F_Text_MaxieAwakenGroudon: MAXIE: GROUDON… / Nothing could awaken you from your sleep bathed in magma… / This BLUE ORB is what you sought. Wasn't it? / I have brought you the BLUE ORB. Let its shine awaken you! / And show me… Show me the full extent of your power!
MagmaHideout_4F_Text_MaxieGroudonWhatsWr: MAXIE: GROUDON! What's wrong? / Wasn't the BLUE ORB the key? / GROUDON! Where have you gone…
MagmaHideout_4F_Text_MaxieOhItWasYou: MAXIE: Oh, so it was you? / I've seen you poking around uninvited here and there… / I get it now! You must have pulled a cheap stunt!
MagmaHideout_4F_Text_MaxieImGoingAfterGr: MAXIE: There has to be some reason why GROUDON fled… / That's what you're trying to say, aren't you? / … … … … … … … … … … … … / Humph… You think I didn't know that? / With GROUDON gone, there is no longer any need for this blasted volcano. / I am going after GROUDON, so this is where we part!

MauvilleCity_Text_NurseHurtMonBackToHeal: You know, it's cool to have POKéMON battles and stuff… / But if your POKéMON gets hurt, you have to nurse it back to health.

MauvilleCity_Text_PokemonCanJumpYouOnBik: Even if you're riding a BIKE, wild POKéMON could jump you.

MauvilleCity_Text_AllSortsOfPeopleComeTh: The roads of this town stretch north and south, and east and west. / Because of that, we get all sorts of people coming through.

MauvilleCity_Text_RydelVeryGenerous: Have you been to RYDEL'S CYCLES yet? / RYDEL, the owner, is a very generous man.

MauvilleCity_Text_ExplainTV: Hi, do you check out TV at all? / They've added a bunch of cool new shows recently. / TV is so cool. I've seen my friends on TV just out of the blue. / And, sometimes, they even put you on TV without telling you. / I wish I would be on TV sometime. / That's why I think you should check out TVs whenever you can.
MauvilleCity_Text_BeenCheckingOutTV: Hi, have you been checking out TVs?

MauvilleCity_Text_WallyWantToChallengeGy: WALLY: Aww, UNCLE, please? / I want to challenge this GYM and see how much better I've become. / Please? May I, please?
MauvilleCity_Text_UncleYourePushingIt: UNCLE: Now hold on, WALLY. / Since you started living with POKéMON, you have grown quite a lot stronger. / But don't you think you're pushing it to suddenly challenge a GYM?
MauvilleCity_Text_WallyWeCanBeatAnyone: WALLY: I'm not pushing it. / If I combine forces with RALTS, we can beat anyone!
MauvilleCity_Text_WallyWillYouBattleMe: WALLY: Oh! Hi, [PLAYER]! / I've gotten a lot stronger since we met. / [PLAYER], I want you and my UNCLE to understand that. / [PLAYER], please, will you have a battle with me?
MauvilleCity_Text_WallyPleaseBattleMe: WALLY: [PLAYER], please! Battle with me, please.

MauvilleCity_Text_UncleHesTooPeppy: UNCLE: It's because of POKéMON that this boy's got more pep, I suppose… But he's become a bit too peppy…
MauvilleCity_Text_UncleCanYouBattleWally: UNCLE: [PLAYER], was it? On WALLY's behalf, can I ask you to battle with him just this once? / I don't think he's going to listen to any reason the way he is now.

MauvilleCity_Text_WattsonNeedFavorTakeKe: WATTSON: Oh, [PLAYER]! You look like you have a lot of zip! That's a good thing, wahahahaha! / Fine! I've decided! I need a favor, [PLAYER]! / MAUVILLE CITY has an underground sector called NEW MAUVILLE. / [PLAYER], I'd like you to go there and switch off the GENERATOR. / The GENERATOR has been running a bit haywire. It's getting unsafe. / Here, this is the KEY to get into NEW MAUVILLE.
MauvilleCity_Text_WattsonWontBeChallenge: WATTSON: Don't you worry about it. It won't be a challenge to you. / The entrance to NEW MAUVILLE is just a short SURF away from ROUTE 110. / That's it, then, you have my trust! Wahahahaha!
MauvilleCity_Text_WattsonYoungTakeCharge: WATTSON: Wahahahaha! / It pleases me to no end to see the young step up and take charge!

MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_RydelGreeting: Well, well, what have we here? A most energetic customer! / Me? You may call me RYDEL. I'm the owner of this cycle shop.
MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_DidYouComeFro: RYDEL: Your RUNNING SHOES… They're awfully filthy. / Did you come from far away?
MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_WantToSwitchB: RYDEL: Oh? Were you thinking about switching BIKES?

MauvilleCity_BikeShop_Text_HandbooksAreI: I'm learning about BIKES while I work here. / If you need advice on how to ride your BIKE, there're a couple handbooks in the back.

MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_CoinsAreNee: COINS are needed to play here in the GAME CORNER.

MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_RouletteOnl: This ROULETTE thing… It's rather demanding. / Win or lose, it's only by luck.

MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_WereYouLook: Were you looking for COINS? / It's ¥1000 for 50 COINS. Would you like some?
MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_DontNeedCoi: Oh… You don't need COINS, then? Good luck on your adventure!

MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_ExchangeCoi: Welcome. / You can exchange your COINS for prizes here.

MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_GotTwoOfSam: I made a mistake and got two of the same DOLLS. / Would you like one of them?
MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_CantWinJack: There's a prize I want, but I can't win the jackpot.

MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_NeedCoinCas: Hey, kid, if you want to play here, you need a COIN CASE. / I think the young lady next door had one. Go see her!

MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_RouletteTab: The ROULETTE tables have different rates. / Check your COINS if you're going to pick a table.

MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_EasyToLoseT: It's easy to lose track of time in here. I should get back to work.

MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_ExchangeCoi: Welcome. / You can exchange your COINS for prizes here.

MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_UpTo3CoinsC: Up to three COINS can be used to play the SLOTS.

MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_DifficultTo: It's very difficult to make it stop right on “7.” / If it stops on “7” during the REEL TIME bonus game, you'll receive extra COINS.

MauvilleCity_GameCorner_Text_HeresSomeSl: Here's some information for you about the SLOTS. / The more lightning bolts you stock, the more REEL TIME chances you get. / In a game with the maximum five REEL TIME chances… / It is possible to receive four regular bonuses, then a big bonus. / That would total 660 COINS, but it's very difficult to get.

MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_WattsonPostBattle: I swell with optimism, seeing a promising young TRAINER like you!
MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_ExplainShockWave: That TM34 there contains SHOCK WAVE. / It's a trustworthy move that never misses! You can count on it! / … … … … … …

MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_ShawnPostBattle: WATTSON, our GYM LEADER, has been around for a long, long time. / He was battling even before your daddy was born, that tough coot.

MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_VivianPostBattle: I've heard that MAUVILLE was founded by WATTSON. / He was a TRAINER long before we became TRAINERS. He must know all sorts of things!

MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_BenPostBattle: WATTSON says he likes setting up little traps with switches.

MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_KirkPostBattle: POKéMON and rock, it's all about heart, whoa-yeah!

MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_GymGuideAdvice: Hey, how's it going, CHAMPION- bound [PLAYER]? / WATTSON, the LEADER of MAUVILLE GYM, uses ELECTRIC-type POKéMON. / If you challenge him with WATER-type POKéMON, he'll zap them! Bzzt! / And, he's put in switch-controlled doors all over his GYM! Eccentric! / Hey, go for it!
MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_GymGuidePostVictor: Whoa, you're electrifying! You've powered the door open!

MauvilleCity_Gym_Text_AngeloPostBattle: MAUVILLE GYM's WATTSON has a shiny forehead. It makes me happy!

MauvilleCity_House1_Text_ImRockSmashDude: Woohoo! / I hear people call me the ROCK SMASH GUY, but I find that sort of degrading. / I think I deserve a bit more respect, like maybe the ROCK SMASH DUDE. / Woohoo! / Anyways, your POKéMON look pretty strong. / I like that! Here, take this HIDDEN MACHINE!
MauvilleCity_House1_Text_ExplainRockSmas: That HM contains ROCK SMASH. / If you come across large boulders that block your path… / Well, use that HM move and smash them right out of your way! / Yes, sir! Smash rocks aside, I say! Woohoo!
MauvilleCity_House1_Text_MonCanFlyOutOfS: Oh, yes, if you smash a rock, a POKéMON could come flying out of hiding. / Woohoo!

MauvilleCity_House2_Text_BuyHarborMailAt: If I had a BIKE, it'd be easy to cycle to SLATEPORT for some shopping. / I'd be able to buy HARBOR MAIL at the POKéMON MART in SLATEPORT…
MauvilleCity_House2_Text_UseCoinCaseAtGa: That COIN CASE can be used at the GAME CORNER.

MauvilleCity_Mart_Text_ItemsToTemporaril: There are items that temporarily elevate the stats of POKéMON. / The ones I know you use in battle are X ATTACK and X DEFEND… / I do believe that there are others like them.

MauvilleCity_Mart_Text_DecisionsDetermin: Use a certain move, or use an item instead… / The TRAINER's decisions determine how battles turn out, I think.

MauvilleCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_ManOv: That man over there, he says weird things! / He's funny in a weird way. I doubt I'll forget about him!

MauvilleCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_MyDat: When I accessed the RECORD CORNER, the data for what's hot in DEWFORD got updated. / Now that bit of data is the same as my friend's!

MauvilleCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Recor: A RECORD CORNER opened upstairs in the POKéMON CENTER. / I don't know what it's about, but it sounds fun. I'll go check it out!

MauvilleCity_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_Young: Did you know that you can link battle at the COLOSSEUM here? / They put up your record on the wall for everyone to see. / It's embarrassing if you lose more often than you win…

MeteorFalls_1F_1R_Text_MeetProfCozmo: I… I'm COZMO… I'm a PROFESSOR… / TEAM MAGMA asked me to guide them to METEOR FALLS… / But they tricked me. They even took my METEORITE away… / And then another similar bunch, TEAM AQUA showed up. / After that… I don't understand any of it. / But that TEAM MAGMA… / What are they going to do with that METEORITE at MT. CHIMNEY?
MeteorFalls_1F_1R_Text_WhatsTeamMagmaDoi: PROF. COZMO: But that TEAM MAGMA… / What are they going to do with that METEORITE at MT. CHIMNEY?

MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_NicolasPostBattle: The road ahead remains long and harsh. / When will my POKéMON and I become the best?

MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_JohnPostBattle: JOHN: We've been married for fifty years. / Come to think of it, I've yet to beat my dear wife in a battle.

MeteorFalls_1F_2R_Text_JayPostBattle: JAY: Fifty years of marriage… / If we ever argued, we always settled it with a POKéMON battle…

MeteorFalls_StevensCave_Text_ShouldKnowH: STEVEN: Oh, wow, [PLAYER]. I'm amazed you knew where to find me. / Do you, uh…maybe think of me as just a rock maniac? / No, that can't be right. / We battled alongside each other at the SOOTOPOLIS SPACE CENTER. / You should have a very good idea about how good I am. / Okay, [PLAYER], if you're going to mount a serious challenge, expect the worst!
MeteorFalls_StevensCave_Text_MyPredictio: STEVEN: Come to think of it, ever since our paths first crossed in GRANITE CAVE in DEWFORD, I had this feeling. / I thought that you would eventually become the CHAMPION. / My predictions usually come true. / And where will you go from here? / … … … … … … … … … … … … / Fufufu, even I couldn't tell you that.

MirageTower_4F_Text_TakeRootFossil: You found the ROOT FOSSIL. / If this FOSSIL is taken, the ground around it will likely crumble away… / Take the ROOT FOSSIL anyway?

MirageTower_4F_Text_TakeClawFossil: You found the CLAW FOSSIL. / If this FOSSIL is taken, the ground around it will likely crumble away… / Take the CLAW FOSSIL anyway?

MossdeepCity_Text_MossdeepTargetedByMagm: I heard from a SAILOR buddy that TEAM AQUA set up shop in LILYCOVE. / I also heard that someone came along and wiped the floor with them! / But MOSSDEEP here's been targeted by that TEAM MAGMA. / If you want to know what they're up to, go visit the SPACE CENTER.
MossdeepCity_Text_FeelReliefOnLand: I'm a SAILOR, so the sea's obviously more important to me. / But you know? When I get back on land after a long voyage, I do feel relief!

MossdeepCity_Text_LifeNeedsSeaToLive: All life needs the sea to live, even though it makes its home on the land. / Life, having run its course, becomes soil and returns to the land. / And the sea is always connected to the land. / Yes, like the very shoreline here.

MossdeepCity_Text_SpaceCenterReceivedLet: The island's SPACE CENTER has been launching huge rockets. / There's been some kind of an uproar over a letter they received recently.
MossdeepCity_Text_SpaceCenterLaunchingRo: The island's SPACE CENTER has been launching huge rockets.

MossdeepCity_Text_WailmerWatching: Around MOSSDEEP, you can see wild WAILMER. / It's called, uh… What was it now… / WAI, WAI, WAI… / WAILMER watching!

MossdeepCity_Text_NiceIfWorldCoveredByFl: Wouldn't it be nice? / If the whole world was covered in plants and flowers like this island?

MossdeepCity_Text_SurfExhilarating: A voyage on a ship is fine. / But crossing the sea with POKéMON using SURF… / Now that's an exhilarating trip! Wouldn't you agree, youngster?

MossdeepCity_Text_SpecialSpaceCenterRock: This rock has a special meaning to the people at the SPACE CENTER. / They put it here as their wish for their rockets to fly safely. / When you make a wish, what do you use? Do you wish upon a star? / I use a wish tag to make it happen. That's what I do.

MossdeepCity_Text_WantKingsRockStevenGav: I got this from STEVEN, but I don't know what it's good for. / I think it's called KING'S ROCK. Do you want it?
MossdeepCity_Text_YouCanKeepIt: Why would you want it? You're weird. / You can keep it, but keep it a secret from STEVEN.
MossdeepCity_Text_StevensHouseOverThere: STEVEN's house is right over there!

MossdeepCity_Text_ScottSomethingWrongWit: SCOTT: [PLAYER], feeling good? I'm doing great! / I'd heard MOSSDEEP's GYM LEADER is pretty strong, so I decided to come take a look-see for myself. / But there's something wrong about this town. / People are going on about a warning letter and the SPACE CENTER… / I don't think it concerns me in any way, though.

MossdeepCity_Text_SootopolisNewGymLeader: Ahh… It feels great letting the waves wash over my feet… / Speaking of the waves, you know that island city SOOTOPOLIS? / I think the GYM there had a new LEADER come in. / People tell me the new LEADER once mentored WALLACE.

MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_TateAndLizaPostBat: TATE: Looks like the bond between you and your POKéMON is far stronger than the bond that we share as twins. / LIZA: You will become even stronger! We've battled you, so we know.
MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_ExplainCalmMind: TATE: That TM04 contains… LIZA: CALM MIND! / TATE: It raises SP. ATK and… LIZA: It raises SP. DEF! / TATE: It's a move that's perfect… LIZA: For PSYCHIC POKéMON! / … … … … … …

MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_PrestonPostBattle: The indecisive lose. That's my warning to you.

MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_BlakePostBattle: A POKé BALL was too heavy to lift psychically. But this dust bunny… / Whoooooooooooooooh! … … … … … … / No, I'm not cheating! I didn't blow on it! Honestly!

MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_MauraPostBattle: A bright future awaits those who have worked diligently. / For those who lazed idly, there is only despair at the end. / What goes around comes around…

MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_SamanthaPostBattle: You will wage a terrifically intense battle with our GYM LEADERS… / The result… You won't hear it from me!

MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_VirgilPostBattle: If there are prodigies in the world, then our GYM LEADERS are them! / However, you may be even more talented than them…

MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_HannahPostBattle: I'm not going to get down on myself for losing. I just need to train harder. / Positive thinking--that's my strong point!

MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_GymGuideAdvice: Yo, how's it going, CHAMPION-bound [PLAYER]? / The GYM LEADERS here use PSYCHIC-type POKéMON. / If you go up against them with FIGHTING- or POISON-type POKéMON, they'll inflict horrible damage! / Plus, they'll come at you with outstanding combination attacks. / If you want to win, you'll need to show them how tight you are with your POKéMON. Go for it!
MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_GymGuidePostVictor: Wow, you're astounding! You're one great TRAINER!

MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_TateAndLizaPostBat: TATE: Looks like the bond between you and your POKéMON is far stronger than the bond that we share as twins. / LIZA: You will become even stronger! We've battled you, so we know.
MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_ExplainCalmMind: TATE: That TM04 contains… LIZA: CALM MIND! / TATE: It raises SP. ATK and… LIZA: It raises SP. DEF! / TATE: It's a move that's perfect… LIZA: For PSYCHIC POKéMON! / … … … … … …

MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_NatePostBattle: I… I don't let defeat rattle m-me, however b-badly.

MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_SylviaPostBattle: How dare you beat me… / It won't be my fault if something horrible befalls you…

MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_CliffordPostBattle: It seems that I could not overcome your youthful energy.

MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_MaceyPostBattle: Humph! You may be strong, but you're not suitable for the PSYCHIC type! / The way you battle is somehow brutal!

MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_KathleenPostBattle: Your vitality is contagious! Get away from me quickly!

MossdeepCity_Gym_Text_NicholasPostBattle: All right! I think I'll develop a special invincible POKéMON power next.

MossdeepCity_House1_Text_ItLikesXPokeblo: It likes S, doesn't it? / No, I'm positive of it! It definitely likes S!

MossdeepCity_House1_Text_HusbandCanTellP: My husband can tell what kind of S a POKéMON likes at a glance.

MossdeepCity_House2_Text_SisterMailsBoyf: My little sister exchanges MAIL with her boyfriend in FORTREE. / I don't envy her one bit at all.

MossdeepCity_House2_Text_PokemonCarriesM: Even though I can't see my friend in FORTREE, my POKéMON carries MAIL back and forth for us. / I'm not lonesome, even though we're apart.

MossdeepCity_House3_Text_YouWantSuperRod: Hey there, TRAINER! A SUPER ROD really is super! / Say all you want, but this baby can catch POKéMON off the seafloor! / What do you think? You want it, don't you?
MossdeepCity_House3_Text_SuperRodIsSuper: You bet, you bet! After all, a SUPER ROD is really super!
MossdeepCity_House3_Text_TryDroppingRodI: If there's any water, try dropping in your ROD and see what bites!
MossdeepCity_House3_Text_GoAfterSeafloor: Go after the seafloor POKéMON with your SUPER ROD.

MossdeepCity_House4_Text_BrotherLikesToF: My little brother says he likes to go find people's SECRET BASES.
MossdeepCity_House4_Text_BrotherLikesToV: My little brother says he likes to visit people's SECRET BASES and have POKéMON battles.

MossdeepCity_House4_Text_YouMadeSecretBa: Was it you who made a SECRET BASE near ?

MossdeepCity_Mart_Text_ReviveIsFantastic: REVIVE is fantastic! / Give it to a fainted POKéMON, and the POKéMON will arise. / But be careful, REVIVE doesn't restore the used-up PP of moves.

MossdeepCity_Mart_Text_MaxRepelLastsLong: MAX REPEL keeps all weak POKéMON away. / Out of all the REPEL sprays, it lasts the longest.

MossdeepCity_Mart_Text_NetAndDiveBallsRa: The NET and DIVE BALLS are rare POKé BALLS that are only made in MOSSDEEP. / A NET BALL is effective against BUG-type and WATER-type POKéMON. / A DIVE BALL works best on POKéMON at the bottom of the sea.

MossdeepCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_GymLe: The GYM LEADERS in this town are a formidable duo. / Their combination attacks are, like, excellent and wow!

MossdeepCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Abili: Depending on the special abilities of POKéMON, some moves might change or not work at all.

MossdeepCity_PokemonCenter_2F_Text_Woman: If I win a whole lot of link battles and show everyone how good I am, I might get a fan following!

MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_RocketL: A rocket launch demands perfection. Not even a 1% margin of error is allowed. / Even if it's 99% okay, the whole thing is useless if 1% happens to be no good. / Despite that, we never stop trying. Why? It's a dream that never ends.

MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_FoundTh: I was taking a stroll down the beach when I found this. / It's not anything I need, so you can have it.
MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_HoennFa: The HOENN region has been famous for its meteor showers for a long time.

MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_Rockets: A giant chunk of metal bursts through the skies and flies into space… / It boggles my mind!
MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_MagmaWa: A giant chunk of metal bursts through the skies and flies into space… / But TEAM MAGMA wants to spoil that dream of mine! / I'm not having any of that!

MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_DidPoke: Some people claim that POKéMON came from space. Could it be true?
MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_AquaSho: TEAM AQUA should take care of TEAM MAGMA! / But if they did that, TEAM AQUA will become bold and brazen, won't they?

MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_Grunt3P: Don't think you're on a roll just because you've beaten me!

MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_Grunt1P: Okay, I get it already! The next time, we'll come unannounced.

MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_Grunt4P: What are we going to do with the rocket fuel? / How would I know? Ask our leader upstairs!

MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_Grunt2I: Our leader said no one, but no one, gets past me!
MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_Grunt2P: Please, tell our leader that I never abandoned my post. That I stayed to the bitter end…

MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_MagmaIn: This is… An intent-to-steal notice? / “To the staff of the SPACE CENTER: How are you? We are doing fine. / “We will soon visit you to take your rocket fuel. / “Please don't try to stop us. We will take the fuel no matter what. / “Let there be more land! TEAM MAGMA”

MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_1F_Text_StevenM: STEVEN: [PLAYER], have you read that proclamation already? / TEAM MAGMA is coming after the rocket fuel on this island. / I don't know what they'd need it for, but they can't be allowed to take it. / I'll keep an eye on things for a while longer. / In the meantime, why don't you go check out the town?

MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_2F_Text_WishOrd: I wish ordinary people could go into space one day…
MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_2F_Text_DoesMag: TEAM MAGMA… Do they want to go to space, too?

MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_2F_Text_Wouldve: If only I was a little younger, I would have liked being an astronaut… / No… It's not too late! I can and will try!
MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_2F_Text_MagmaCa: If TEAM MAGMA takes the rocket fuel, I won't be able to go to space! / They can't be allowed to get away with such an outrage!

MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_2F_Text_Mossdee: MOSSDEEP has mainly sunny weather, and its winds are stable. / It's an ideal location for launching rockets.
MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_2F_Text_WhyWoul: Why would TEAM MAGMA want to steal our rocket fuel in the first place?

MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_2F_Text_StevenW: STEVEN: TEAM MAGMA… / What's the point of stealing rocket fuel?
MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_2F_Text_MaxieUs: MAXIE: Fufufu… Since you're so curious, you deserve an explanation. / We're going to jettison the entire load into MT. CHIMNEY! / With GROUDON gone, we have no need for that slag heap of a mountain! / So we'll use the fuel's power to make the volcano erupt! / It will be savage!
MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_2F_Text_StevenA: STEVEN: [PLAYER]! You're going to help me? / Let's go into battle together! Are you ready?
MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_2F_Text_StevenH: STEVEN: Then, hurry! Get ready quickly!

MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_2F_Text_Grunt6P: Three of us here, and look at the sorry mess we got ourselves into.

MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_2F_Text_Grunt5P: Are we being useful to our leader at all?

MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_2F_Text_Grunt7P: We three losing like this… We look worse than usual by triple!

MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_2F_Text_WellTak: Hehehe! / We come all the way here to get some fuel, and we're interfered with again! / If you're going to mess with us too, we'll take care of you at the same time!

MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_2F_Text_MaxieDo: MAXIE: Clear out of the way! Don't you dare interfere!

MossdeepCity_StevensHouse_Text_Underwate: STEVEN: Apparently, there's an underwater cavern between MOSSDEEP and SOOTOPOLIS. / You know, the one that CAPT. STERN found in his submarine.

MossdeepCity_StevensHouse_Text_TakeBallC: [PLAYER] checked the POKé BALL. / It contained the POKéMON BELDUM. / Take the POKé BALL?

MossdeepCity_StevensHouse_Text_LetterFro: It's a letter. / … … … … … … / To [PLAYER]… / I've decided to do a little soul- searching and train on the road. / I don't plan to return home for some time. / I have a favor to ask of you. / I want you to take the POKé BALL on the desk. / Inside it is a BELDUM, my favorite POKéMON. / I'm counting on you. / May our paths cross someday. / STEVEN STONE

MtChimney_Text_ArchieGoStopTeamMagma: ARCHIE: Grr, [PLAYER]! I should've guessed you'd show up! / See for yourself what the fanatics of TEAM MAGMA are up to! / They're trying to inject the stolen METEORITE's power into the volcano! / Doing something like that will cause the volcano's eruption!
MtChimney_Text_ArchieIHaveMyHandsFull: ARCHIE: Grrr… / I want to stop that MAXIE, but I can't! / Not when I have my hands full battling three opponents at once!

MtChimney_Text_MeteoriteWillActivateVolc: The power contained in the METEORITE… / By amplifying its power with this machine, MT. CHIMNEY's volcanic activity will instantly intensify… / Its energy will grow deep inside the crater and… Fufufu…
MtChimney_Text_MaxieIntro: MAXIE: Hm? Who are you? / … … … … … … … … … … … … / I'd heard ARCHIE bemoaning a child who's been meddling in TEAM AQUA's affairs. / It must be you he meant. / Humph! So you're thinking of interfering with us, TEAM MAGMA? / Now you listen. Long ago, living things used the land to live and grow. / That is why land is all important! It is the cradle of all! / That is why TEAM MAGMA is dedicated to the expansion of the land mass. / It is for further advancement of humankind and POKéMON! / And for that, we need the power of what sleeps within this mountain… / Oh! There was no need for you to learn that much. / But, no matter! I'll teach you the consequences of meddling in our grand design!
MtChimney_Text_MaxieYouHaventSeenLastOfM: MAXIE: But, enough. I will back off this time. / But don't think that this is the last you've seen of TEAM MAGMA. / Fufufu… / Even without the METEORITE, if we obtain that ORB… Fufufu…
MtChimney_Text_ArchieThankYou: ARCHIE: [PLAYER]! Thank you! / With your help, we thwarted TEAM MAGMA's destructive plan! / But… You… Whose side are you on? / Ah, it doesn't matter. / We will remain vigilant and keep up our pursuit of TEAM MAGMA. / [PLAYER], we shall meet again!

MtChimney_Text_TabithaPostBattle: BOSS, hurry! Give it the METEORITE's energy! / Hehehe…

MtChimney_Text_AquasNameSimilar: We're TEAM MAGMA! / They're TEAM AQUA! / It totally annoys me that they'd use a name like ours!

MtChimney_Text_LessHabitatForWaterPokemo: If they expand the land, there'll be less habitats for WATER POKéMON!

MtChimney_Text_MagmaOutnumbersUs: Darn… TEAM MAGMA outnumbers us! We can't keep up with them!

MtChimney_Text_MagmasNameSimilar: We're TEAM AQUA! / They're TEAM MAGMA! / It burns me up that they'd use such a confusing name!

MtChimney_Text_LavaCookiesJust200: LAVA COOKIES are MT. CHIMNEY's local specialty. / Try one. It's just ¥200.

MtChimney_Text_KeepMakingMoreLand: We're going to keep making more land!

MtChimney_Text_YouBetterNotMessWithUs: You'd better not mess with us! / We're trying to awaken that thing for the benefit of everyone!

MtChimney_Text_TeamAquaAlwaysMessingWith: That annoying TEAM AQUA… They always mess with our plans!

MtChimney_Text_Grunt2PostBattle: Our BOSS says, “It will make everyone happy.” / But why does everyone keep getting in our way?

MtChimney_Text_ShelbyPostBattle: Well, well, I've lost. I can't call myself an EXPERT now, can I?

MtChimney_Text_MelissaPostBattle: The heat of MT. CHIMNEY warms me up, baby!

MtChimney_Text_SheilaPostBattle: Like I said, I've finally made it to MT. CHIMNEY. It would be a shame if I only do a little sightseeing… / I want to get in some battles and buy COOKIES as souvenirs.

MtChimney_Text_ShirleyPostBattle: I'll have to take another dip in the hot springs. Want to join me? / Just joking!

MtChimney_Text_Grunt1PostBattle: A kid like you, you ought to be splashing about in the waves!

MtChimney_Text_SawyerPostBattle: I think I need a dip in LAVARIDGE HOT SPRING with the locals!

MtChimney_CableCarStation_Text_CableCarR: The CABLE CAR is ready to go down. Would you like to be on it?

MtPyre_1F_Text_TakeThisForYourOwnGood: All sorts of beings wander the slopes of MT. PYRE… / There is no telling what may happen. Take this. It's for your own good.
MtPyre_1F_Text_ExplainCleanseTag: Have a POKéMON hold that CLEANSE TAG. / It will help ward off wild POKéMON.

MtPyre_1F_Text_ComeToPayRespects: Did you come to pay your respect to the spirits of departed POKéMON? / You must care for your POKéMON a lot.

MtPyre_1F_Text_RestingPlaceOfZigzagoon: This is the final resting place of my ZIGZAGOON. I cherished it…

MtPyre_2F_Text_MarkPostBattle: People don't come here often, so I thought there'd be rare POKéMON.

MtPyre_2F_Text_MemoriesOfSkitty: Memories of my darling SKITTY… My eyes overflow thinking about it.

MtPyre_2F_Text_TumbledFromFloorAbove: Ooch, ouch… There are holes in the ground here and there. / I didn't notice and took a tumble from the floor above.

MtPyre_2F_Text_DezPostBattle: DEZ: We're lovey-dovey, so we don't care if we lose!

MtPyre_2F_Text_LukePostBattle: LUKE: Well, we lost but that's okay! I'm right here by your side. We'll make it through this dare!

MtPyre_2F_Text_ZanderPostBattle: I get freaked out every time I see anything move… / I shouldn't have come here to train…

MtPyre_2F_Text_LeahPostBattle: Our family has been TRAINERS here since my great-grandmother's time… / It is my duty to protect this mountain…

MtPyre_3F_Text_WilliamPostBattle: My psychic powers have surely grown several times, but…

MtPyre_3F_Text_KaylaPostBattle: This means my training is still not enough… / I've got to keep working toward the summit… / Go, me!

MtPyre_3F_Text_GabriellePostBattle: POKéMON no longer of this world. POKéMON that are with you now. / And the POKéMON that you will meet in the future… / They are all to be equally cherished. Please remember that.

MtPyre_6F_Text_ValeriePostBattle: Perhaps the power is from the spirits of POKéMON in fitful sleep here…

MtPyre_6F_Text_CedricPostBattle: I had this feeling that a lost TRAINER would be panicked and easy to beat. / It's dirty and I won't try it again…

MtPyre_Summit_Text_WillYouHearOutMyTale: MT. PYRE is where we calm the spirits of POKéMON that have passed on… / This is a high place where one can see all of HOENN… / The disembodied spirits of POKéMON must find solace here… / Is it coincidence that you are here… / Will you hear out my tale? A tale long told in the HOENN region?
MtPyre_Summit_Text_HearTheNewLegendOfHoe: It is my role to pass on the legends of HOENN to future generations. / And the crisis that just ended in SOOTOPOLIS rewrote a legend… / Have you the time to hear the new legend of HOENN?

MtPyre_Summit_Text_OrbsHaveBeenTaken: The BLUE ORB and RED ORB taken by those sinister men… / They must never be apart… I fear something terrible will happen…
MtPyre_Summit_Text_SuperAncientPokemonTa: The embodiments of the land, sea, and the sky… / That is said to be the identities of the super-ancient POKéMON… / In the same way that we humans and POKéMON have life, our world, too, is alive… / The super-ancient POKéMON have taught us that…
MtPyre_Summit_Text_GroudonKyogreAwakened: Oh, my goodness… / You say that both GROUDON and KYOGRE have been awakened? / It is said that the BLUE ORB and the RED ORB quelled the rage of the two POKéMON… / It is also said that the true owner of the ORBS still exists. / However, no one knows who, or what exactly, the ORBS belong to. / It could be a human, or perhaps a POKéMON, but no one knows.

MtPyre_Summit_Text_Grunt1PostBattle: Yeah, so you are strong… But there're a lot of us!

MtPyre_Summit_Text_Grunt2PostBattle: You don't know anything! So why are you messing with us?

MtPyre_Summit_Text_Grunt3PostBattle: Heh, it doesn't matter! We bought ourselves some time! / The BOSS should have snatched what he was after!

MtPyre_Summit_Text_Grunt4PostBattle: We have a great combination going with us members and our leader.

OldaleTown_Text_SavingMyProgress: I want to take a rest, so I'm saving my progress.

OldaleTown_Text_IWorkAtPokemonMart: Hi! I work at a POKéMON MART. / Can I get you to come with me?
OldaleTown_Text_PotionExplanation: A POTION can be used anytime, so it's even more useful than a POKéMON CENTER in certain situations.

OldaleTown_Text_DiscoveredFootprints: I just discovered the footprints of a rare POKéMON! / Wait until I finish sketching them, okay?
OldaleTown_Text_FinishedSketchingFootpri: I finished sketching the footprints of a rare POKéMON. / But it turns out they were only my own footprints…

OldaleTown_House1_Text_LeftPokemonGoesOu: When a POKéMON battle starts, the one at the left of the list goes out first. / So, when you get more POKéMON in your party, try switching around the order of your POKéMON. / It could give you an advantage.

OldaleTown_House2_Text_PokemonLevelUp: When POKéMON battle, they eventually level up and become stronger.

OldaleTown_House2_Text_YoullGoFurtherWit: If the POKéMON with you become stronger, you'll be able to go farther away from here.

OldaleTown_Mart_Text_PokeBallsAreSoldOut: The clerk says they're all sold out. I can't buy any POKé BALLS.
OldaleTown_Mart_Text_ImGoingToBuyPokeBal: I'm going to buy a bunch of POKé BALLS and catch a bunch of POKéMON!

OldaleTown_Mart_Text_RestoreHPWithPotion: If a POKéMON gets hurt and loses its HP and faints, it won't be able to battle. / To prevent your POKéMON from fainting, restore its HP with a POTION.

OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Trainer: That PC in the corner there is for any POKéMON TRAINER to use. / Naturally, that means you're welcome to use it, too.

OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Pokemon: POKéMON CENTERS are great! / You can use their services as much as you like, and it's all for free. You never have to worry!

OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Wireles: The POKéMON WIRELESS CLUB on the second floor was built recently. / But they say they're still making adjustments.
OldaleTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_TradedI: The POKéMON WIRELESS CLUB on the second floor was built recently. / I traded POKéMON right away.

PacifidlogTown_Text_FastRunningCurrent: The sea between PACIFIDLOG and SLATEPORT has a fast-running tide. / If you decide to SURF, you could end up swept away somewhere else.

PacifidlogTown_Text_SkyPillarTooScary: The SKY PILLAR? / …Oh, you must mean that tall, tall tower a little further out. / If you asked me, I wouldn't climb it. It's too scary to get up that high. / Life at sea level in PACIFIDLOG, that suits me fine.

PacifidlogTown_Text_NeatHousesOnWater: See, isn't it neat? These houses are on water! / I was born here!

PacifidlogTown_House1_Text_RegiStory: In the HOENN region, there are three POKéMON that represent the power of rock, ice, and steel. / Each of them is said to hide away deep inside caves. / That's the story I heard when I was just a little kid.

PacifidlogTown_House1_Text_SixDotsOpenTh: “Six dots open three doors.” / Grandpa used to say that, but I don't know what he meant.

PacifidlogTown_House2_Text_GetGoodTMInXD: Oh, yes. In about or so days, I should be getting a good TM or two. / You should come see me then. I'll give you a TM that's suitable for your POKéMON.
PacifidlogTown_House2_Text_ChairmansYoun: Er-hem! / I am the POKéMON FAN CLUB's most important person, the CHAIRMAN's younger brother. / I'm here enjoying my vacation with POKéMON, yes, indeed.
PacifidlogTown_House2_Text_ViciousPokemo: It has a vicious look to it. / A frightening POKéMON like that deserves a TM like this.
PacifidlogTown_House2_Text_ExplainReturn: If a POKéMON likes you a lot, RETURN's power is enhanced. / If it doesn't like you, FRUSTRATION's power goes up.

PacifidlogTown_House2_Text_VeryFriendlyW: It appears to be very friendly with the TRAINER.

PacifidlogTown_House2_Text_DoesntLikeTra: It doesn't appear to like the TRAINER very much.

PacifidlogTown_House3_Text_IsThatAPokede: Is that a POKéDEX? / Did you get to meet a lot of different POKéMON? / I wish I was like you.

PacifidlogTown_House3_Text_WillingToTrad: Check out this ! / It's the that I caught yesterday to celebrate my birthday! / Oh, I can see that you want it! After all, it's priceless! / I'll tell you what. I might be willing to trade it for a .
PacifidlogTown_House3_Text_ItsSubtlyDiff: Oh, so this is a ? / It's sort of like a , and yet it's subtly different. / Thank you!
PacifidlogTown_House3_Text_ReallyWantedT: I know I could go looking for one on my own, but… / But I really wanted to get a BAGON that another TRAINER caught…

PacifidlogTown_House4_Text_PeopleSawHigh: People were saying they saw a POKéMON flying high above HOENN. / Is it flying around all the time? Doesn't it need to rest somewhere?

PacifidlogTown_House4_Text_SkyPokemon: A sky POKéMON! A sky POKéMON!

PacifidlogTown_House5_Text_CantSeeMirage: I can't see MIRAGE ISLAND today…

PacifidlogTown_House5_Text_MirageIslandA: MIRAGE ISLAND… / It must become visible and invisible depending on the weather conditions that make mirages appear. / Or is it really appearing and disappearing?

PacifidlogTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Anc: The ancestors of the people in PACIFIDLOG were said to have been born on boats and then lived and died aboard them. / I understand that they lived that way because they were searching for something.

PacifidlogTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Wha: What color is your TRAINER CARD? Mine's copper!

PacifidlogTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_OnC: PACIFIDLOG TOWN floats on top of a colony of CORSOLA. / If I told you that, would you believe me?

PetalburgCity_Text_WhereIsWally: Where has our WALLY gone? / We have to leave for VERDANTURF TOWN very soon…

PetalburgCity_Text_WaterReflection: My face is reflected in the water. / It's a shining grin full of hope… / Or it could be a look of somber silence struggling with fear… / What do you see reflected in your face?

PetalburgCity_Text_FullPartyExplanation: Let's say you have six POKéMON. If you catch another one… / It is automatically sent to a STORAGE BOX over a PC connection.

PetalburgCity_Text_AreYouRookieTrainer: Hiya! Are you maybe… A rookie TRAINER? / Do you know what POKéMON TRAINERS do when they reach a new town? / They first check what kind of GYM is in the town.

PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_DadYoureHereWithY: DAD: Hm? / Well, if it isn't [PLAYER]! So you're all finished moving in? / I'm surprised that you managed to get here by yourself. / Oh, I see. You're with your POKéMON. / Hm… Then I guess you're going to become a TRAINER like me, [PLAYER]. / That's great news! I'll be looking forward to it!

PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_MaryPostBattle: There are some even stronger TRAINERS waiting for you. / The left is the DEFENSE ROOM, and the right is the RECOVERY ROOM. / Your POKéMON's ATTACK power will be on trial either way.
PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_MaryPostBadge: Do you know what we're trying to achieve as TRAINERS? / We're striving to become soul mates with our POKéMON.

PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_RandallPostBattle: Go on to the next room where a new challenge awaits you. / At the left is the CONFUSION ROOM. / The right door leads to the DEFENSE ROOM.
PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_RandallPostBadge: Whomever you beat, and whomever you may lose to, you never shirk from training yourself and your POKéMON. / That's what I think being a GYM LEADER is all about.

PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_ParkerPostBattle: The next room is the STRENGTH ROOM. Can you withstand brute force?
PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_ParkerPostBadge: After you beat our LEADER, the training has become a lot tougher.

PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_AlexiaPostBattle: I think you've taught me a valuable lesson here. / Now, go on! The left door goes to the STRENGTH ROOM. / The right door opens to the ONE-HIT KO ROOM. / Both of them have TRAINERS who are skilled at offense.
PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_AlexiaPostBadge: Hi! Have you tried using SURF?

PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_GeorgePostBattle: I should have expected no less from our LEADER's kid. / No, wait! A TRAINER's abilities are earned only through effort. / I lost because my own efforts weren't enough. / Go on! The ONE-HIT KO ROOM is next.
PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_GeorgePostBadge: I'm going to keep training at GYMS. One day, I'll become a LEADER.

PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_JodyPostBattle: The way you use your POKéMON… It's like your father's style. / Go on through! The GYM LEADER, your father, is waiting!
PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_JodyPostBadge: Sure, it's fine to make your POKéMON stronger. / But what decides the winner? / Why, it's the feelings TRAINERS have for their POKéMON.

PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_BerkePostBattle: Your father really is strong. He's a TRAINER worth my respect. / And, I sense the same glow coming from you as your father. / I hope that you'll stage a terrific battle with your father!
PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_BerkePostBadge: Since your dad became the LEADER, the TRAINERS of PETALBURG CITY have become a lot tougher.

PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_GymGuideAdvice: Hey, how's it going, CHAMPION- bound [PLAYER]? / The doors in this GYM open when you beat the awaiting TRAINERS. / Whoops! The doors in this room are already open, so don't attack me! / The TRAINERS of PETALBURG GYM use all kinds of items. / The door at the left leads to the SPEED ROOM. / The door at the right leads to the ACCURACY ROOM. / The room's name will be on the door, so choose carefully. / Once you've chosen the door… Well, hey, go for it!
PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_GymGuidePostVicto: [PLAYER]! Whoa! You've overcome even your own father! / Like, whoa! What a stunning turn of events!

PetalburgCity_House1_Text_GoOnAdventure: Sigh… / I wish I could go on an adventure with some POKéMON… / Crawl through some damp grass… Climb rocky, rugged mountains… / Cross the raging seas… Wander about in dark caves… / And, sometimes, even get a little homesick… / It must be fabulous to travel!

PetalburgCity_House1_Text_TravelingIsWon: Traveling is wonderful! / When I was young, I roamed the seas and the mountains!

PetalburgCity_House2_Text_NormanBecameGy: NORMAN became our town's new GYM LEADER. / I think he called his family over from somewhere far away.

PetalburgCity_House2_Text_BattledNormanO: I battled NORMAN once, but, whew, he was way too strong. / How would I put it? / I just got the feeling that he lives for POKéMON.

PetalburgCity_Mart_Text_TakeSomeAntidote: Do you have any ANTIDOTES with you? / If you walk around with a poisoned POKéMON, it will lose HP until it faints. Take some ANTIDOTES with you.

PetalburgCity_Mart_Text_RepelIsUseful: Do you use REPEL? It keeps POKéMON away, so it's useful when you're in a hurry.

PetalburgCity_Mart_Text_WeakWillGrowStro: Even if a POKéMON is weak now, it will grow stronger. / The most important thing is love! Love for your POKéMON!

PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_PCSt: That PC-based POKéMON Storage System… / Whoever made it must be some kind of a scientific wizard!

PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Oran: When my POKéMON ate an ORAN BERRY, it regained HP!

PetalburgCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Many: There are many types of POKéMON. / All types have their strengths and weaknesses against other types. / Depending on the types of POKéMON, a battle could be easy or hard.

PetalburgCity_WallysHouse_Text_ThanksFor: You're… Ah, you must be [PLAYER], right? / Thank you for playing with WALLY a little while ago. / He's been frail and sickly ever since he was a baby. / We've sent him to stay with my relatives in VERDANTURF TOWN for a while. / The air is a lot cleaner there than it is here. / What's that? Where's WALLY? He's already left, our WALLY. / I wonder where he could have gotten by now?
PetalburgCity_WallysHouse_Text_YouMetWal: Oh? You met WALLY in EVER GRANDE CITY? / Oh, [PLAYER], don't be silly. / He may have gotten healthy, but he can't go somewhere far away like that all by himself.
PetalburgCity_WallysHouse_Text_WallyIsCo: WALLY's coming home soon. I'm looking forward to that.
PetalburgCity_WallysHouse_Text_WonderHow: I wonder how our WALLY is doing?

PetalburgCity_WallysHouse_Text_WallyWasR: WALLY was really happy when he told us that he caught a POKéMON. / It's been ages since I've seen him smile like that.
PetalburgCity_WallysHouse_Text_WallyLeft: I want you to keep this a secret from my husband… / But our WALLY left VERDANTURF TOWN without telling anyone. / You know, WALLY is frail, but he's surprisingly strong-willed. / I'm sure that he'll come back safe and sound one day!

PetalburgWoods_Text_StayOutOfTallGrass: Yo, there! Your POKéMON doing okay? / If your POKéMON are weak and you want to avoid battles, you should stay out of tall grass.

PetalburgWoods_Text_ImOutOfPokeBalls: I caught a bunch of POKéMON. Now I'm out of POKé BALLS.

PetalburgWoods_Text_PeopleRespectYou: If you have a big BUG POKéMON, people respect you for it.

PetalburgWoods_Text_HiddenItemsExplanati: Sometimes, there are things on the ground even if you can't see them. / That's why I always check where I'm walking.

PetalburgWoods_Text_TryUsingThisItem: Oh, neat! That's the BADGE from RUSTBORO GYM! / You must be a TRAINER. You should try using this item.
PetalburgWoods_Text_MiracleSeedExplanati: It's a MIRACLE SEED. If a POKéMON holds that item, its GRASS-type moves become stronger. / Besides MIRACLE SEED, I think there are other convenient items for POKéMON to hold.

Route101_Text_TakeTiredPokemonToPokeCent: If POKéMON get tired, take them to a POKéMON CENTER. / There's a POKéMON CENTER in OLDALE TOWN right close by.

Route101_Text_YouSavedMe: PROF. BIRCH: Whew… / I was in the tall grass studying wild POKéMON when I was jumped. / You saved me. Thanks a lot! / Oh? / Hi, you're [PLAYER]! / This is not the place to chat, so come by my POKéMON LAB later, okay?

Route101_Text_WildPokemonInTallGrass: Wild POKéMON will jump out at you in tall grass. / If you want to catch POKéMON, you have to go into the tall grass and search.

Route102_Text_ImNotVeryTall: I'm…not very tall, so I sink right into tall grass. / The grass goes up my nose and… Fwafwafwafwafwa… / Fwatchoo!

Route102_Text_CatchWholeBunchOfPokemon: I'm going to catch a whole bunch of POKéMON!

Route103_Text_ShortcutToOldale: If you cross the sea from here, it'll be a shortcut to OLDALE TOWN. / Fufufu, that's useful, isn't it?

Route103_Text_ShouldHaveBroughtPotion: My POKéMON is staggeringly tired… I should have brought a POTION…

Route104_Text_WhatsItLikeAtBottomOfSea: The sea, huh? / I wonder what it's like at the bottom of the sea?

Route104_Text_BrineyLivesInSeasideCottag: That seaside cottage is where MR. BRINEY lives. / He was once a mighty sailor who never feared the sea, however stormy.

Route104_Text_ThrowBallAtWeakenedPokemon: If you're going to throw a POKé BALL, weaken the wild POKéMON first. / It will be easier to catch if it's been poisoned, burned, or lulled to sleep.

Route104_Text_OnlyThrowBallAtWildPokemon: You're a thief if you try to steal someone else's POKéMON. / You should throw POKé BALLS only at wild POKéMON.

Route104_Text_ImNotATrainer: Oh, no, I'm not a TRAINER. / But that's right, if TRAINERS lock eyes, it's a challenge to battle. / If you don't want to battle, stay out of their sight.

Route104_Text_DontNeedThisTakeIt: This FLOWER SHOP started selling saplings recently. / It made me so happy, I went overboard shopping. / I don't need this WHITE HERB anymore. Would you take it, please?
Route104_Text_FlowerShopSellingSaplings: This FLOWER SHOP started selling saplings recently. / It made me so happy, I went overboard shopping. Where should I put them?

Route104_Text_LikeFillingMouthWithSeedsT: I like filling my mouth with seeds, then spitting them out fast! / You can have this, so you try it out! / Use it on a POKéMON, and it will learn a move for firing seeds rapidly.
Route104_Text_TMsAreOneTimeUse: A word of advice! / A TM, TECHNICAL MACHINE, is good only for one-time use. / Once you use it, it's gone. Think twice before using it!

Route104_MrBrineysHouse_Text_WaitUpPeeko: MR. BRINEY: Hold on, lass! Wait up, PEEKO!
Route104_MrBrineysHouse_Text_ItsYouLetsS: Hm? You're [PLAYER]! You saved my darling PEEKO! We owe so much to you! / What's that? You want to sail with me? / Hmhm… / You have a LETTER bound for DEWFORD and a package for SLATEPORT, then? / Quite the busy life you must lead! / But, certainly, what you're asking is no problem at all. / You've come to the right man! We'll set sail for DEWFORD.
Route104_MrBrineysHouse_Text_NeedToMakeD: MR. BRINEY: Ahoy! I know exactly what you want to say! / You're to deliver a LETTER to DEWFORD and a package to SLATEPORT. / What you need me to do is no problem at all--I'm the man for the job! / First, we'll set sail for DEWFORD.
Route104_MrBrineysHouse_Text_NeedToDeliv: MR. BRINEY: Ahoy! I know exactly what you want to say! / You're to deliver a package to CAPT. STERN in SLATEPORT. / What you need me to do is no problem at all--I'm the man for the job! / First, we'll set sail for DEWFORD.
Route104_MrBrineysHouse_Text_WhereAreWeB: MR. BRINEY: Ahoy! For you, I'll go out to sea anytime! / Now, my friend, where are we bound?
Route104_MrBrineysHouse_Text_SetSailForD: MR. BRINEY: DEWFORD it is, then! / Anchors aweigh! PEEKO, we're setting sail, my darling!

Route109_Text_BrineySailToDewfordQuestio: MR. BRINEY: I thought you're supposed to deliver the DEVON GOODS. / Would you like to sail back to DEWFORD, then?
Route109_Text_BrineyWhereAreWeBound: MR. BRINEY: Ahoy! For you, I'll go out to sea anytime! / Now, my friend, where are we bound?
Route109_Text_BrineyDewfordItIs: MR. BRINEY: DEWFORD it is, then! / Anchors aweigh! PEEKO, we're setting sail, my darling!

Route109_Text_ChillAtMyPapasSpot: Yo, TRAINERS! Whether you're hot to trot, or cool cat not, chill at my papa's spot!

Route109_Text_SandCastleTakingLongTime: Our sand castle's taking a long time to make.

Route109_Text_WereGoingToMakeBigCastle: We're going to get all the sand from the beach and make a big castle! / And then we're going to be a king and queen. / We'll let you be a servant.

Route109_Text_LittleKidsDartAround: Little kids can dart around so quickly… / You don't dare take your eyes off them for an instant. It's very taxing. / Mine are with my POKéMON, so they should be okay, but…

Route109_Text_ZigzagoonPicksUpLitter: The water around these parts is clean. / But, I get my ZIGZAGOON to pick up litter from the shoreline at times. / Dirty water becomes rain and joins our rivers, which we drink from… / If we pollute the sea, it all comes back to haunt us eventually.

Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_SeashoreHous: I'm the owner of the SEASHORE HOUSE. But you can call me MR. SEA! / What I love above all is to see hot POKéMON battles. / Let me see that your heart burns hot! / If you can defeat all the TRAINERS here, I'll reward your efforts.
Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_WantToBuySod: Want to buy some SODA POP? POKéMON love it! / Just ¥300 a bottle! Buy some!
Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_TakeTheseSod: You're scorching hot! Those battles blazed! I'm more than just satisfied! / As thanks for showing me your hot streak, I want you to take these. / It's half a dozen bottles of SODA POP!
Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_ShowMeSomeHo: Show me some hot matches! / I run this SEASHORE HOUSE just for that reason alone!

Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_DwaynePostBa: Whenever I'm in SLATEPORT, I enjoy hot battles and ice-cold SODA POP!

Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_SimonPostBat: If one of my POKéMON knew the move for carrying me across water on its back, I could get rid of this inner tube.

Route109_SeashoreHouse_Text_JohannaPostB: Whew, I'm all thirsty. Maybe I'll have a SODA POP.

Route110_Text_WhichShouldIChoose: Which should I choose? / Make a beeline for MAUVILLE on CYCLING ROAD, or take the low road and look for POKéMON?

Route110_Text_BikeTechniques: Learning techniques will make BIKE riding even more fun. / There are some places that you can reach only by using a BIKE technique.

Route110_Text_WalkOnTheLowRoad: I don't have a BIKE, so I'll take a leisurely walk on the low road.

Route110_Text_YouGotBikeFromRydel: Oh, hey, you got that BIKE from RYDEL! / Oh, it's glaringly obvious. It says right on your bike… / RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, / RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, / RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, / RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, / RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL… That name's everywhere. / You should ride it around all over the place--it's good advertising!

Route110_Text_TwoRoads: The two roads, one above, one below… / A road each for people and POKéMON. Perhaps that is right and fair.

Route110_Text_HairStreamsBehindMe: How do you like the way my raven- colored hair streams behind me? / I grew my hair out just for that.

Route110_Text_RideBikeAtFullSpeed: Wouldn't it be great to ride a BIKE at full speed on CYCLING ROAD?

Route110_Text_AlwaysAimHigher: Regardless of the results, I count on seeing more challenges from you. Always aim higher!

Route110_Text_WeCantTalkAboutAquaActivit: TEAM AQUA's activities… We can't talk about them yet.

Route110_Text_KickUpARuckus: I want to get going to SLATEPORT and kick up a ruckus!

Route110_Text_MyFirstJobInAqua: This is my first job after joining TEAM AQUA. It's a little scary.

Route110_Text_AquaActionsBringSmiles: TEAM AQUA's actions should bring smiles to people's faces!

Route110_SeasideCyclingRoadNorthEntrance: On CYCLING ROAD, you can go all out and cycle as fast as you'd like. / It feels great to go that fast, but try not to crash into anyone!

Route110_SeasideCyclingRoadSouthEntrance: On CYCLING ROAD, you can go all out and cycle as fast as you'd like. / It feels great to go that fast, but try not to crash into anyone!

Route110_TrickHouseEnd_Text_YouveMadeItT: Aak! You've made it to me? Hmmm… You're sharp!

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle1_Text_SallyPos: I never get tired of hacking and slashing!

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle1_Text_EddiePos: I lost my way, I lost a battle, and I'm now even more lost… I can't get out…

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle1_Text_RobinPos: You're strong! Just who are you?

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_TedPostB: Can I get you to push all the buttons for me?

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_PaulPost: The TRICK MASTER rigged all the tricks in this house all by himself.

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle2_Text_GeorgiaP: You're strong, aren't you? Maybe even enough to be a GYM LEADER!

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_JustinPo: It's full of doors here! It's too small and dark in here! Help!

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_MarthaPo: I know I'm weak! And, I have no sense of direction!

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle3_Text_AlanPost: I don't get it. How many traps are in this house? / You may be the one to solve that.

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle4_Text_CoraPost: Wouldn't you agree? You would go anywhere if TRAINERS were there.

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle4_Text_PaulaPos: Has anyone made it to the end?

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle4_Text_YujiPost: It's not good enough to be brawny… You have to use your head. Be brainy!

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle5_Text_Mechadol: CLICKETY-CLACK… MECHADOLL 1 AM I! / IF YOU ANSWER QUIZZES CORRECTLY, THEN YOU WILL GO TO MECHADOLL 5. THEN YOU CAN OBTAIN THE SECRET CODE.
CLICKETY-CLACK… MECHADOLL 2 AM I! / MECHADOLL 1'S QUIZ DIFFICULTY LEVEL IS SET TOO LOW.
CLICKETY-CLACK… MECHADOLL 3 AM I! / MATTERS OF MONEY ARE MY SOLE FOCUS.
CLICKETY-CLACK… MECHADOLL 4 THAT IS ME! / MY QUIZ IS AN OBJECT OF BEAUTY.
CLICKETY-CLACK… MECHADOLL 5 AM I! / THE MASTER'S BEST AND PROUDEST ACHIEVEMENT AM I.

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle6_Text_SophiaPo: I'm sure having a good time checking this place out. / It's a challenge I've found worth repeating!

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle6_Text_BennyPos: Ehehehe… I guess I lost because I was trying to cheat.

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle6_Text_Sebastia: You don't seem to be affected at all. Or do you have your poker face on?

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_JoshuaPo: I wish I could appear and disappear as if I were smoke, too.

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlexisPo: You're solving all the puzzles in the TRICK HOUSE. That's the feeling I get.

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_Patricia: I've circled the same spot over ten times now… It's ill fortune…

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_AlvaroPo: Well, anyway, we both picked a weird place to get acquainted. / As one weirdo to another, let's do our best!

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_MarielaP: Humph! I'm not upset! Not me!

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle7_Text_EverettP: I was hoping to switch places with you when I beat you, but…

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle8_Text_VincentP: You've beaten the POKéMON LEAGUE CHAMPION? That's too much!

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle8_Text_LeroyPos: Seeing someone like you should please the TRICK MASTER.

Route110_TrickHousePuzzle8_Text_KeiraPos: It's a miracle that you beat me. You can brag about it.

Route111_Text_BattleOurFamily: Hello! I take it you're a traveler. / How's this? What do you say to taking on our family of four in a series of POKéMON battles?
Route111_Text_IsThatSo: Is that so? Drop in, if you change your mind!

Route111_Text_ToughToKeepWinningUpTheRan: If you don't raise your POKéMON some more, it could be tough to keep winning up through the ranks. / I've heard the POKéMON LEAGUE's ELITE FOUR are far stronger than any GYM LEADER.

Route111_Text_WinstrateFamilyDestroyedMe: I challenged the WINSTRATE family, but four matches in a row is tough going… They destroyed me.

Route111_Text_ShouldBeMirageTowerAroundH: There should be a tower made of sand around here somewhere. / But for some reason, it can be seen sometimes, and sometimes not. / That's why I call it the MIRAGE TOWER.
Route111_Text_MirageTowerClearlyVisible: I see it! The tower of sand! / The sand tower they called a mirage is clearly visible! / But it looks so fragile… It could crumble away anytime… / I want to go inside it, but I can't get my courage up for it…

Route111_Text_MauvilleUncleToldMeToTakeR: Oh, no! / My uncle in MAUVILLE told me to take ROCK SMASH with me if I was going to ROUTE 111! / My uncle? He lives across from the bike shop in MAUVILLE.

Route111_OldLadysRestStop_Text_RestUpHer: Oh, dear, dear. Aren't your POKéMON exhausted? / If you'd like, rest up here. That's a fine idea! You should do that.

Route111_WinstrateFamilysHouse_Text_Stro: Mommy is stronger than Daddy. / I'm stronger than Mommy. / And Grandma's stronger than me! / But my big brother is even stronger than Grandma.

Route111_WinstrateFamilysHouse_Text_MySo: You're the first TRAINER I've seen who deploys POKéMON so masterfully. / But, I should tell you--my son is stronger than you. / He even took the POKéMON LEAGUE challenge, I'll have you know.

Route111_WinstrateFamilysHouse_Text_Like: We use this MACHO BRACE to more effectively strengthen our POKéMON in training. / Since you've beaten all of us here, I don't know if you need it, but we would like you to have our MACHO BRACE.
Route111_WinstrateFamilysHouse_Text_Pass: When it comes to POKéMON battles, we tend to be pretty passionate.

Route111_WinstrateFamilysHouse_Text_Gran: There's no question that you're strong. / But if you were to battle my grandson, you'd end up crying in frustration. / He's much stronger than any TRAINER our family knows. / He must be challenging the POKéMON LEAGUE CHAMPION by now. / Knowing my grandson, he could be the CHAMPION already!
My grandson must be challenging the POKéMON LEAGUE CHAMPION by now. / Knowing my grandson, he could be the CHAMPION already!

Route112_Text_LeaderGoingToAwakenThing: Hey, man, is our leader really going to awaken that thing?
Route112_Text_YeahWeNeedMeteorite: Sounds like it, yeah. But I heard we need a METEORITE to do it.
Route112_Text_OhThatsWhyCrewWentToFallar: Oh, I get it now. That's why the rest of the crew went out to FALLARBOR.
Route112_Text_CantLetAnyonePassUntilThey: You got it. And until they come back, we're not to let anyone pass, right.

Route112_Text_LeaderGoingToAwakenThing: Hey, man, is our leader really going to awaken that thing?
Route112_Text_YeahWeNeedMeteorite: Sounds like it, yeah. But I heard we need a METEORITE to do it.
Route112_Text_OhThatsWhyCrewWentToFallar: Oh, I get it now. That's why the rest of the crew went out to FALLARBOR.
Route112_Text_CantLetAnyonePassUntilThey: You got it. And until they come back, we're not to let anyone pass, right.

Route112_Text_NotEasyToGetBackToLavaridg: Eh, I'd like to get to MAUVILLE, but if I went down these ledges, it'd be no easy matter to get back to LAVARIDGE.

Route112_CableCarStation_Text_CableCarRe: The CABLE CAR is ready to go up. Would you like to be on it?

Route113_Text_FunWalkingThroughAsh: It's fun walking through the volcano's ashes on the ground and grass. / You can see where you walked--it's really neat!

Route113_Text_AshCanBeFashionedIntoGlass: Wahahaha! Today's technology is a wondrous thing! / Take this volcanic ash here. It can be fashioned into glass.

Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_GoCollectAsh: This area is covered in volcanic ash, huff-puff! / I'm specially gifted, huff-puff. / I make glass out of volcanic ash and make items, huff-puff. / Go collect ashes with this, huff-puff.
Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_ExplainSootS: Just take that SOOT SACK and walk through piles of ash, huff-puff. / And it will fill up with the volcanic ash, huff-puff. / Once you think you've collected a good amount, come see me, huff-puff.

Route113_GlassWorkshop_Text_FunToBlowGla: It's fun to blow a glass flute while my boss is talking. / Huff-huff! Puff-puff!

Route114_Text_AllMyMonDoesIsRoarTakeThis: All my POKéMON does is ROAR… No one dares to come near me… / Sigh… If you would, please take this TM away…
Route114_Text_ExplainRoar: TM05 contains ROAR. A ROAR sends POKéMON scurrying.

Route114_FossilManiacsHouse_Text_HaveThi: My big brother's the FOSSIL MANIAC… He's a nice guy who loves FOSSILS… / He loves digging holes, too… He dug this hole by himself… / You can have this, so you can DIG holes just like my big brother…
Route114_FossilManiacsHouse_Text_DigRetu: If you make a POKéMON DIG inside a cave, you're returned to the entrance…

Route114_FossilManiacsTunnel_Text_LookIn: I'm the FOSSIL MANIAC… I'm a nice guy who loves FOSSILS… / Do you want a FOSSIL? / But the FOSSILS around these parts all belong to me… None for you… / If you can't bear to go without a FOSSIL, look in a desert where there are boulders and sand that may hide FOSSILS…
Route114_FossilManiacsTunnel_Text_Fossil: FOSSILS are so… Wonderful… It's so dreamy…

Route114_LanettesHouse_Text_EverythingCl: LANETTE: Oh! [PLAYER]! / I'm sorry everything is so cluttered… When I get engrossed in research, things end up this way… / This is embarrassing… Please keep this a secret in exchange for this.
Route114_LanettesHouse_Text_OrganizeYour: May I offer advice about my POKéMON Storage System? / You should organize your BOXES so you can tell which POKéMON are in them.

Route115_Text_NeverKnowWhenCavePokemonWi: Exploring a cave isn't like walking on a road. / You never know when wild POKéMON will appear. It's full of suspense.

Route116_Text_ScoundrelMadeOffWithPeeko: Ohhh, what am I to do? / We were on our walk, PEEKO and I, when we were jumped by an odd thug… / The scoundrel made off with my darling PEEKO! / Wrrrooooooaaaar! PEEKO!

Route116_Text_ThankYouTokenOfAppreciatio: Oh! It's you! / You're that person who not only helped me in PETALBURG WOODS, but also got back my stolen package and then even graciously delivered it to SLATEPORT! / CAPT. STERN informed us that the package arrived, too! / I thank you very, very much! / Why, if I were a rain cloud, I would shower you with gratitude and hail you as a hero! / For you, the most wonderful TRAINER, I bear good news! / Recently, our company developed a new kind of POKé BALL. / As a token of our appreciation, this is our gift to our wonderful TRAINER!
Route116_Text_TokenOfAppreciation: As a token of our appreciation for your delivering our package, I have a gift of a new kind of POKé BALL for our most wonderful TRAINER!
Route116_Text_NewBallAvailableAtMart: Our new POKé BALL will be available at the POKéMON MART in RUSTBORO. / Please do try it out! Thank you and bye-bye!

Route116_Text_WantToDigTunnel: Nnn… Roar! / I want to dig that tunnel!
Route116_Text_GoonHightailedItOutOfTunne: Nnn… Roar! / That goofy goon hightailed it out of the tunnel! I can go back to digging!
Route116_Text_DiggingTunnelWhenGoonOrder: Nnn… Roar! What's going on? / I was digging the tunnel without any tools when some goon ordered me out! / That tunnel's filled with POKéMON that react badly to loud noises. They could cause an uproar. / That's why we stopped using heavy equipment for tunneling… / I'm worried that the goon will do something stupid and startle the POKéMON into an uproar.

Route116_Text_CanYouHelpMeFindGlasses: I dropped my glasses… Can you help me find them?

Route116_TunnelersRestHouse_Text_WeHadTo: That RUSTURF TUNNEL there… / At first, we had a huge work crew boring through rock with the latest machinery. But, we had to stop. / It turns out that we would have had a negative effect on wild POKéMON in the area. / So, we've got nothing to do but loll around here doing nothing.

Route116_TunnelersRestHouse_Text_GetToVe: To get to VERDANTURF without using this TUNNEL, you'd have to cross the sea to DEWFORD, sail on to SLATEPORT, then travel through MAUVILLE.
Route116_TunnelersRestHouse_Text_TunnelH: Did you hear? The TUNNEL to VERDANTURF has gone through! / Sometimes, if you hope strongly enough, dreams do come true.

Route116_TunnelersRestHouse_Text_ManDigg: There's a man digging his way to VERDANTURF all by his lonesome. He's desperate to get through. / He says that if he digs little by little without using machines, he won't disturb POKéMON, and he'll avoid harming the natural environment. / I wonder if he made it through yet.

Route117_Text_ArentTheseFlowersPretty: What do you think? Aren't these flowers pretty? / I planted them all!

Route117_Text_DayCarePokemonHadNewMove: I left my POKéMON at the DAY CARE. / When I got it back, it had a new move that I didn't teach it. I was really, really surprised.

Route118_Text_CanCrossRiversWithSurf: Even if there isn't a boat, you can cross rivers and the sea if you have a POKéMON that knows SURF. / POKéMON can be counted on to do so much!

Route118_Text_YouAgreeGoodRodIsGood: Hmm! A GOOD ROD is really good! / Wouldn't you agree?
Route118_Text_TryCatchingMonWithGoodRod: Try catching all sorts of POKéMON with your GOOD ROD.

Route119_Text_StayAwayFromWeatherInstitu: We're standing lookout here. / Hey, you! Stay away from the WEATHER INSTITUTE. It's not safe.

Route119_Text_DontGoNearWeatherInstitute: Lookout duty is surprisingly boring. / Hey, you! Please don't go near the WEATHER INSTITUTE.

Route119_Text_ThoughtFlyByCatchingBirdMo: I thought you FLY by catching a whole flock of BIRD POKéMON, and then hanging on to them somehow. / But it turns out there's an HM move called FLY! / I wish I'd known about that a long time ago…

Route119_Text_TallGrassSnaresBikeTires: Tch… It's a no-go… / The tall grass snares BIKE tires. There's no way you can cycle here.

Route119_Text_CanYourMonMakeSecretBase: Can your POKéMON use its SECRET POWER on a big pile of grass and make a SECRET BASE?

Route119_House_Text_RumorAboutCaveOfOrig: I heard about a cave called the CAVE OF ORIGIN. / People rumor that the spirits of POKéMON are revived there. Could something like that really happen?

Route119_WeatherInstitute_1F_Text_Grunt1: Our BOSS knows everything. / But I'm just a GRUNT. What would I know about what he's thinking?

Route119_WeatherInstitute_1F_Text_Grunt4: Oh, no… I'll catch an earful for losing to a kid… / I should just take a nap in the bed…

Route119_WeatherInstitute_1F_Text_WhatWe: Hello! We've been saved by your actions! / What I don't understand is what on earth the AQUAS were up to.

Route119_WeatherInstitute_1F_Text_Notici: On the 2nd floor of the INSTITUTE, we study the weather patterns over the HOENN region. / We've been noticing temporary and isolated cases of droughts and heavy rain lately…
Route119_WeatherInstitute_1F_Text_ProfSt: The PROFESSOR loves rain. That's a fact. / But if it keeps raining, people will be in trouble. That's another fact. / And thus, the PROFESSOR is studying if the rain can be put to good use.

Route119_WeatherInstitute_1F_Text_WowYou: Wow, you're really strong! / I wish I could be a POKéMON TRAINER like you!

Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F_Text_Grunt2: If the POKéMON they made here can control the weather freely, then we of TEAM AQUA definitely need it!

Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F_Text_Grunt3: You don't have any idea what we of TEAM AQUA are working towards! You stay out of our way!

Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F_Text_Shelly: It's bad enough to have TEAM MAGMA blunder about, but now there's you! / What makes you want to sniff around in our business, anyway?

Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F_Text_Changi: I've been researching rain for many years, but it's ridiculous to think that humans can freely change the weather.
Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F_Text_Thanks: Thanks! Thanks to you, we're safe! / It might be an odd way of thanking you, but take this POKéMON.
Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F_Text_Groudo: I track weather patterns over the HOENN region. / Presently, a drought has been recorded in . / Could that mean, somewhere near …

Route119_WeatherInstitute_2F_Text_Grunt5: Humph, so what? What we want… / What we really want isn't here… Ihihihihi…

Kecleon_Text_SomethingUnseeable: Something unseeable is in the way.

Route120_Text_StevenGreeting: STEVEN: Hm? [PLAYER], hi. It's been a while. / There's something here that you can't see, right? / Now, if I were to use this device on the invisible obstacle… / No, no. Rather than describing it, I should just show you. That would be more fun. / [PLAYER], are your POKéMON ready for battle?
Route120_Text_StevenReadyForBattle: STEVEN: [PLAYER], are your POKéMON ready for battle?
Route120_Text_StevenShowMeYourPower: STEVEN: [PLAYER], show me your true power as a TRAINER!
Route120_Text_StevenUsedDevonScope: STEVEN used the DEVON SCOPE. / An invisible POKéMON became completely visible! / The startled POKéMON attacked!
Route120_Text_StevenGiveDevonScope: STEVEN: I see… Your battle style is intriguing. / Your POKéMON have obviously grown since I first met you in DEWFORD. / I'd like you to have this DEVON SCOPE. / Who knows, there may be other concealed POKéMON.
