Route120_Text_StevenGoodbye: STEVEN: [PLAYER]. / I enjoy seeing POKéMON and TRAINERS who strive together. / I think you're doing great. / Well, let's meet again somewhere.

Route121_Text_AheadLoomsMtPyre: Ahead looms MT. PYRE… / It is a natural monument to the spirits of departed POKéMON…

Route123_Text_LoveGrassMonsHaveAny: I love GRASS-type POKéMON! / Do you have any GRASS-type POKéMON?
Route123_Text_YouLikeGrassMonsTooHaveThi: Oh? / You like GRASS-type POKéMON, too, don't you? / I'm so happy, you can have this! It's a token of our friendship.
Route123_Text_CheckTreesWithMyGrassMon: I check trees with my GRASS-type POKéMON. I'm like a tree doctor.

Route124_DivingTreasureHuntersHouse_Text: I'm the DIVING TREASURE HUNTER! / I'm the awesome dude who makes deep-sea dives to gather treasures resting at the bottom.
Tell me, have you seen any SHARDS of tools made in ancient times?
Oh, hey! That… That's a SHARD! I'm looking for those! / Oh, man, you've got to trade that with me! I'll give you something good!
What do you want to trade?

RustboroCity_Text_GymLeaderIsntEasyWithF: I challenged the GYM LEADER, but… / It's not going to be easy winning with my FIRE-type POKéMON… / FIRE-type POKéMON don't match up well against ROCK-type POKéMON…

RustboroCity_Text_WeShortenItToDevon: The DEVON CORPORATION… We all just shorten it to DEVON. / That company makes all sorts of convenient products.
RustboroCity_Text_SneakyLookingManWentAr: Hm? A sneaky-looking man? / Come to think of it, yes, a shady- looking guy went around the corner.

RustboroCity_Text_CatchRarePokemonIfIGoT: POKéMON TRAINER'S SCHOOL! / If I go to this school, will I be able to catch rare POKéMON easily?

RustboroCity_Text_WowYouHavePokemon: Wow, you have POKéMON with you, too. / When I get bigger, I'm going to go places with POKéMON, too.

RustboroCity_Text_MrBrineyWalksInTheTunn: The old sailor MR. BRINEY lives in a cottage by the sea. / He goes for walks in the tunnel every so often.
RustboroCity_Text_MrBrineyLovesPeeko: The old sailor MR. BRINEY lives in a cottage by the sea. / He said he was going shopping in SLATEPORT for his pet, PEEKO. / That old sea dog, he must really love that PEEKO.

RustboroCity_Text_HaveYouChallengedGym: Have you taken the POKéMON GYM challenge? / When you get that shiny GYM BADGE in hand, I guess TRAINERS begin to realize what is required of them.
RustboroCity_Text_HeyThatsRustborosGymBa: Hey, that's RUSTBORO's GYM BADGE! / Out of all the POKéMON GYM BADGES, RUSTBORO's is the coolest, I'd say.

RustboroCity_Text_PokemonCanChangeLookFr: If a POKéMON gains experience in battles, it can sometimes change in the way it looks.

RustboroCity_Text_PokemonChangeShape: A POKéMON changes shape? If one did that, I would be shocked!

RustboroCity_Text_ShadyCharacterTookOffT: That shady character, I think he took off towards the tunnel over there.
RustboroCity_Text_YouGotItThankYou: Oh! How did it go? The DEVON GOODS? / You did! You got them back! / You really are a great TRAINER! / I know! As my thanks, I'll give you another GREAT BALL!
RustboroCity_Text_PleaseComeWithMe: Excuse me, please! Please come with me!

RustboroCity_Text_YoureNewAroundHere: Oh? Who might you be? You're a new face around these parts. / Have you just transferred into the POKéMON TRAINER'S SCHOOL?

RustboroCity_Text_TradePokemonGrowFast: A POKéMON you get in a trade from someone grows fast. / But if you don't have certain GYM BADGES, it may not obey you…

RustboroCity_Text_YouCanHave2On2Battle: Did you know this? / You can have a 2-on-2 battle even if you're not with another TRAINER. / If you catch the eyes of two TRAINERS when you have two or more POKéMON, they'll both challenge you. / Don't you think it'd be cool if you could beat two TRAINERS by yourself?

RustboroCity_CuttersHouse_Text_YouCanPut: That determined expression… That limber way you move… And your well-trained POKéMON… / You're obviously a skilled TRAINER! / No, wait, don't say a word. I can tell just by looking at you. / I'm sure that you can put this HIDDEN MACHINE to good use. / No need to be modest or shy. Go on, take it!
RustboroCity_CuttersHouse_Text_ExplainCu: That HIDDEN MACHINE, or HM for short, is CUT. / An HM move is one that can be used by POKéMON outside of battle. / Any POKéMON that's learned CUT can chop down thin trees if the TRAINER has earned the STONE BADGE. / And, unlike a TM, an HM can be used more than once.

RustboroCity_CuttersHouse_Text_DadHelped: When they were expanding the city of RUSTBORO, my dad helped out. / He made his POKéMON use CUT to clear the land of trees.

RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F_Text_ThoseShoe: Hey, those RUNNING SHOES! They're one of our products! / It makes me happy when I see someone using something we made.
RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F_Text_SoundsLik: It sounds like they've recovered the ripped-off DEVON GOODS.
RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F_Text_RobberWas: That stolen parcel… / Well, sure it's important, but it's not anything that anyone can use. / In my estimation, that robber must not have been very bright.

RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F_Text_OnlyAutho: I'm sorry, only authorized people are allowed to enter here.
RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F_Text_YoureAlwa: Hi, there! You're always welcome here!
RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F_Text_HowCouldW: It's beyond stupid. How could we get robbed?

RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F_Text_WelcomeTo: Hello and welcome to the DEVON CORPORATION. / We're proud producers of items and medicine that enhance your life.
RustboroCity_DevonCorp_1F_Text_StaffGotR: One of our research staff stupidly got robbed of an important parcel.

RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F_Text_DeviceFor: We're developing a device for talking with POKéMON. / But we haven't had much success…

RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F_Text_Developin: I'm developing new kinds of POKé BALLS… / But I haven't made much headway…
RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F_Text_WeFinally: We finally made new kinds of POKé BALLS! / The REPEAT BALL makes it easier to catch POKéMON you've caught before. / The TIMER BALL gets better at catching POKéMON the longer a battle runs. / Both are proudly developed by the DEVON CORPORATION. / Please give them a try!

RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F_Text_IMadePoke: I made the POKéNAV! / As an engineer, I feel blessed to have made something so great!
RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F_Text_WowThatsA: Oh, wow! That's a POKéNAV! / It came about as a result of our PRESIDENT's desire to learn about the feelings of POKéMON. / Would you like me to describe its features in detail? / No, no. I think you'll find out just by trying the POKéNAV out.

RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F_Text_DeviceToV: I'm trying to develop a device that visually reproduces the dreams of POKéMON… / But it's not going well.

RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F_Text_DevelopDe: I've been trying to develop a device that resurrects POKéMON from fossils… / And, it's working!

RustboroCity_DevonCorp_2F_Text_DevelopNe: I'm trying to develop a new feature for the POKéNAV… / But it's not going well.

RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F_Text_CountingO: MR. STONE: I'm counting on you!
RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F_Text_NotFamili: MR. STONE: Since my youth, I've immersed myself in work. / Consequently, I'm not familiar with trends and that sort of thing. / But do young people all want to be TRAINERS in the POKéMON LEAGUE?
RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F_Text_ThankYouF: MR. STONE: You delivered my LETTER? Thank you kindly! / This is my way of thanking you. It should help you, a TRAINER.
RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F_Text_ExplainEx: MR. STONE: A POKéMON holding that EXP. SHARE will be given some of the EXP Points from battle. / It will get EXP Points even if it didn't actually battle. / I would say EXP. SHARE is quite useful for raising weak POKéMON.

RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F_Text_VisitCapt: If you visit the SHIPYARD in SLATEPORT, you should go see CAPT. STERN.
RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F_Text_RepeatAnd: DEVON's new products, the REPEAT BALL and TIMER BALL, have become hugely popular among TRAINERS.

RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F_Text_CountingO: MR. STONE: I'm counting on you!
RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F_Text_NotFamili: MR. STONE: Since my youth, I've immersed myself in work. / Consequently, I'm not familiar with trends and that sort of thing. / But do young people all want to be TRAINERS in the POKéMON LEAGUE?
RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F_Text_ThankYouF: MR. STONE: You delivered my LETTER? Thank you kindly! / This is my way of thanking you. It should help you, a TRAINER.
RustboroCity_DevonCorp_3F_Text_ExplainEx: MR. STONE: A POKéMON holding that EXP. SHARE will be given some of the EXP Points from battle. / It will get EXP Points even if it didn't actually battle. / I would say EXP. SHARE is quite useful for raising weak POKéMON.

RustboroCity_Flat1_1F_Text_EveryPokemonH: Every POKéMON has a special ability that it can use.

RustboroCity_Flat1_2F_Text_ComingUpWithM: Oh, it's so hard every day… / What's hard? You need to ask? / It's trying to figure out what to make for meals every day. / It really isn't easy coming up with meals every day.

RustboroCity_Flat2_1F_Text_DevonWorkersL: DEVON CORPORATION's workers live in this building.

RustboroCity_Flat2_2F_Text_DevonWasTinyI: Way back in the old days, DEVON was just a teeny, tiny company.

RustboroCity_Flat2_2F_Text_MyDaddyMadeTh: My daddy's working at the CORPORATION. / My daddy made this! But I can't use it, so you can have it.
RustboroCity_Flat2_2F_Text_GoingToWorkAt: My daddy's working at the CORPORATION. / When I grow up, I'm going to work for DEVON, too.

RustboroCity_Flat2_3F_Text_PresidentColl: DEVON's PRESIDENT likes to collect rare stones.

RustboroCity_Flat2_3F_Text_PresidentsSon: I think the PRESIDENT's son also collects rare stones.

RustboroCity_Gym_Text_RoxannePostBattle: Since you are so strong, you should challenge other GYM LEADERS. / By battling many TRAINERS, you should learn many things.
RustboroCity_Gym_Text_ExplainRockTomb: That TECHNICAL MACHINE, TM39, contains ROCK TOMB. / It not only inflicts damage by dropping rocks, it also lowers SPEED. / If you use a TM, it instantly teaches the move to a POKéMON. / Remember, a TM can be used only once, so think before you use it.

RustboroCity_Gym_Text_JoshPostBattle: You haven't seen anything of the ROCK type's terrifying power!

RustboroCity_Gym_Text_TommyPostBattle: ROXANNE is stronger than me by several times. / You'd better be on your guard!

RustboroCity_Gym_Text_GymGuideAdvice: Yo, how's it going? / Listen, my friend! Would you like to become the CHAMPION? / I'm no TRAINER, not me, but I can sure give you winning advice. / That's settled, then! We'll aim for the POKéMON CHAMPIONSHIP together! / It's your job as a TRAINER to collect GYM BADGES, am I right? / But GYM LEADERS aren't pushovers! / And that's where I come in! I'm here to provide expert advice! / ROXANNE, the GYM LEADER, is a user of ROCK-type POKéMON. / The ROCK type is very durable, but it can't stand WATER-type and GRASS-type moves. / Come see me afterwards, if you beat the GYM LEADER. / Well, go for it!
RustboroCity_Gym_Text_GymGuidePostVictor: Whoa! What a breathtaking victory! My cheering must've worked! / Great! Check your TRAINER CARD. / The STONE BADGE you got should be properly recorded on it. / In other words… / You've climbed the first step on the stairs to the CHAMPIONSHIP! / That's got to feel awesome!

RustboroCity_Gym_Text_MarcPostBattle: I have to hand it to our LEADER. / It took smarts and sense for her to pick the ROCK type at her young age.

RustboroCity_House1_Text_IllTradeIfYouWa: Huh? My POKéMON is cute? Sure, I knew that. / But if you really want, I'm willing to trade it to you. / I'll trade you my for a if you want.
RustboroCity_House1_Text_PleaseBeGoodToM: Eheheh… Please be good to my POKéMON.
RustboroCity_House1_Text_AnyPokemonCanBe: Any POKéMON can be cute if you raise it with care and kindness.

RustboroCity_House1_Text_AllSortsOfPlace: In all sorts of places, there are all sorts of POKéMON and people. / I find that fascinating, so I go to all sorts of places.

RustboroCity_House2_Text_TrainerSchoolEx: The TRAINER'S SCHOOL is excellent. / If you study there, you could even become a GYM LEADER.

RustboroCity_House2_Text_RoxanneKnowsALo: ROXANNE, the GYM LEADER, really knows a lot about POKéMON. / She's really strong, too!

RustboroCity_House3_Text_IGivePerfectlyS: For my own POKéMON, I give them perfectly suited nicknames! / It's my expression of, uh… originality, yes, that's it!

RustboroCity_House3_Text_NamingPikachuPe: But giving the name PEKACHU to a PIKACHU? It seems pointless. / I suppose it is good to use a name that's easy to understand, but…

RustboroCity_Mart_Text_ShouldBuySuperPot: My POKéMON evolved. It has a lot of HP now. / I should buy SUPER POTIONS for it instead of ordinary POTIONS.

RustboroCity_Mart_Text_BuyingHealsInCase: I'm buying some PARLYZ HEALS and ANTIDOTES. / Just in case I run into SHROOMISH in PETALBURG WOODS.

RustboroCity_Mart_Text_GettingEscapeRope: I'm getting an ESCAPE ROPE just in case I get lost in a cave. / I just need to use it to get back to the entrance.

RustboroCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Pokem: My POKéMON has a NAIVE nature, and my friend's has a JOLLY nature. / It's fascinating how POKéMON have personalities!

RustboroCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_MaleA: Just like people, there are male and female POKéMON. / But no one seems to have any idea how they're different.

RustboroCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_HMCut: The man next door gave me an HM! / I used it to teach my POKéMON how to CUT down skinny trees.

RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_TradingR: I'm trading POKéMON with my friend right now.

RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_AlwaysWa: I always wanted a SEEDOT, and I'm finally getting one!

RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_Pokemont: POKéMON can hold items, but they don't know what to do with man-made items like POTION and ANTIDOTE.

RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_Confused: You know how some POKéMON moves can confuse a POKéMON? / A confused POKéMON will sometimes attack itself without meaning to. / But once it leaves battle, it will return to normal.

RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_PokemonH: A POKéMON holding a BERRY will heal itself… / There are many kinds of items that POKéMON can hold… / Boy, it sure is hard taking notes down…

RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_Students: Students who don't study get a little taste of my QUICK CLAW. / Whether or not you are a good student will be evident from the way you use this item.
RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_ExplainQ: A POKéMON holding the QUICK CLAW will occasionally speed up and get to move before its opponent. / There are many other items that are meant to be held by POKéMON. / Just those alone will give you many topics to study!

RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_ScottMet: Hello? Didn't we meet before? I think back in PETALBURG CITY. / Let me introduce myself. My name's SCOTT. / I've been traveling everywhere in search of outstanding TRAINERS. / More specifically, I'm looking for POKéMON battle experts. / So, what brings you to this SCHOOL? Are you a TRAINER, too? / The first thing you should do is to have a POKéMON learn the move CUT. / If I remember correctly, someone in this town has CUT.
RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_StudentT: SCOTT: Hmm… / The talent levels of the students here are unknown. The potential's there.
RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_ScottMet: Hello? Didn't we meet before? I think back in PETALBURG CITY. / Let me introduce myself. My name's SCOTT. / I've been traveling everywhere in search of outstanding TRAINERS. / More specifically, I'm looking for POKéMON battle experts. / Oh, what's that? It's a STONE BADGE, isn't it? / That's pretty impressive, I'd say, for a starting TRAINER like yourself. / But, you know, I would've loved to see you in battle. / It's hard to tell what you're like as a TRAINER from a LEAGUE BADGE.
RustboroCity_PokemonSchool_Text_ScottSto: SCOTT: Oh, what's that? / It's a STONE BADGE, isn't it? That's pretty impressive, I'd say. / But, you know, I would've loved to see you in battle. / It's hard to tell what you're like as a TRAINER from a LEAGUE BADGE.

RusturfTunnel_Text_WhyCantTheyKeepDiggin: … … / Why can't they keep digging? Is the bedrock too hard? / My beloved awaits me in VERDANTURF TOWN just beyond here… / If RUSTBORO and VERDANTURF were joined by this tunnel, I could visit her every day… / But this… What am I to do?
RusturfTunnel_Text_ToGetToVerdanturf: To get from RUSTBORO to VERDANTURF, you need to go to DEWFORD, then pass through SLATEPORT and MAUVILLE…

RusturfTunnel_Text_GruntIntro: Grah, keelhaul it all! / That hostage POKéMON turned out to be worthless! / And to think I made a getaway… In this tunnel to nowhere! / Hey! You! So you want to battle me?
RusturfTunnel_Text_GruntTakePackage: This is plain not right… / The BOSS told me this would be a slick-and-easy job to pull. / All I had to do was steal some package from DEVON. / Tch! You want it back that badly, take it!
RusturfTunnel_Text_PeekoGladToSeeYouSafe: PEEKO! Am I glad to see you're safe!
RusturfTunnel_Text_ThankYouLetsGoHomePee: PEEKO owes her life to you! / They call me MR. BRINEY. And, you are? / … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … … / Ah, so you are [PLAYER]! I sincerely thank you! / Now, if there's anything that troubles you, don't hesitate to tell me! / You can usually find me in my cottage by the sea near PETALBURG WOODS. / Come, PEEKO, we should make our way home. / PEEKO: Pihyoh!

RusturfTunnel_Text_MikePostBattle: They halted development here to protect POKéMON, right? There's a feel-good story!

RusturfTunnel_Text_BoyfriendOnOtherSideO: On the other side of this rock… My boyfriend is there. / He… He's not just digging the tunnel to come see me. / He works his hands raw and rough for the benefit of everyone.

SeafloorCavern_Entrance_Text_HearMagmaNe: Hey! I remember your face! / If you're here, it must mean that you're about to mess with us again! / A punk like you, do you really think you can take on TEAM AQUA? / I'd say you're too early by about a trillion years! / You're a perfect fit for the likes of TEAM MAGMA! / Speaking of TEAM MAGMA, I hear they were spotted near MOSSDEEP. / That bunch of goons, they sure don't look good near the sea!

SeafloorCavern_Room1_Text_Grunt1PostBatt: I want to get a promotion so I can boss around the GRUNTS…

SeafloorCavern_Room1_Text_Grunt2PostBatt: That submarine we jacked, man, it's brutal as a ride. It's way too tight in there!

SeafloorCavern_Room3_Text_ShellyPostBatt: Ahahahaha! You're so darn strong. / It's terribly disappointing that you're not a TEAM AQUA member. / You could have enjoyed the fabulous world our BOSS has promised as one of us…

SeafloorCavern_Room3_Text_Grunt5PostBatt: You know, we don't dare question the motives of our leader. / But here you are, just some punk, going up against our BOSS. / Maybe… You must be something…

SeafloorCavern_Room4_Text_Grunt3PostBatt: I can't find the way out! / I'm not afraid. Don't get me wrong!

SeafloorCavern_Room4_Text_Grunt4PostBatt: My partner forgot the map in that submarine! / How's that for being useless?

ShoalCave_LowTideLowerRoom_Text_CanOverc: The penetrating cold around these parts is an impediment to training. / But with focus, one can overcome! / With this FOCUS BAND, buckle down and withstand the cold!

SlateportCity_Text_BushedHikingFromMauvi: Whew… I'm just bushed… / I hiked over from MAUVILLE CITY. But, boy, this city's huge. / If I'd known this, I would've ridden my BIKE here.

SlateportCity_Text_EveryoneCallsHimCaptS: STERN, the fellow who built the MUSEUM, also happens to be the leader of an undersea exploration team. / So, everyone calls him CAPT. STERN.

SlateportCity_Text_GoingToCompeteInBattl: Wroooar! I'm going to compete in the BATTLE TENT, too! / But before that, I need to catch some POKéMON!

SlateportCity_Text_WhatsLongLineOverTher: What is that over there? That long line…
SlateportCity_Text_VisitedMuseumOften: When I was a child, I visited the MUSEUM often. / I used to dream about the mysteries of the sea after seeing the exhibits.

SlateportCity_Text_QuitPushing: Hey, there! Quit pushing! This is the line, can't you see?

SlateportCity_Text_SeaweedFullOfLife: Ooh, look at this! / The seaweed you can get around these parts is fresh and full of life. / Why, it looks like it can even rear up and attack!

SlateportCity_Text_HowTownIsBornAndGrows: Where the water is clean, the fruits of bountiful harvest gather. / And where people gather, a market soon starts. / That is how a town is born and grows.

SlateportCity_Text_SlateportWonderfulPla: Shopping where you can breathe the scent of the ocean… / SLATEPORT is such a wonderful place!
SlateportCity_Text_BuyBricksSoDecorWontG: If you put DOLLS or CUSHIONS on the floor, they'll get dirty. / I'm going to buy some BRICKS so my DOLLS and CUSHIONS won't get dirty when I leave them out.

SlateportCity_Text_BigSmileForCamera: TY: Okay, CAPT. STERN, a big smile for the camera!

SlateportCity_Text_MostInvaluableExperie: GABBY: I see, I see. You've had a most invaluable experience…

SlateportCity_Text_SternMoveAheadWithExp: CAPT. STERN: Yes, indeed. We intend to move ahead with our exploration.
SlateportCity_Text_GabbyWonderfulThanksF: GABBY: That's wonderful, CAPT. STERN! Thank you for taking the time from your busy schedule to talk to us. / We hope we can interview you again with news of more discoveries!
SlateportCity_Text_SternWhewFirstIntervi: CAPT. STERN: Whew… / That was my first time to be filmed for TV. That was nerve-wracking.
SlateportCity_Text_OhPlayerWeMadeDiscove: Oh! [PLAYER]! You're looking great! / We made a huge discovery on our last seafloor exploration. / We found an underwater cavern on ROUTE 128. / We think it's the habitat of a POKéMON that's said to have been long extinct.
SlateportCity_Text_AquaWillAssumeControl: Fufufu… CAPT. STERN, I presume. / We of TEAM AQUA will assume control of your submarine! / Your objections are meaningless! We expect your total cooperation! / Fufufu… Just watch and learn what TEAM AQUA has planned!
SlateportCity_Text_SternWhatWasAllThat: CAPT. STERN: What was that all about? / It sounded like someone using a megaphone… / Where did it come from?
SlateportCity_Text_FromHarborTryingToTak: It's from the HARBOR! / The submarine! They're trying to take it!

SlateportCity_Text_SeaIsSoWet: The sea is just so vast… / Could the sea have been made by the tears shed by POKéMON?

SlateportCity_Text_SinkOldBoats: Do you know what they do with old ships that become too creaky to sail? / They sink them in the sea so they become habitats for POKéMON.

SlateportCity_Text_BuyTooMuch: Whenever I visit here, I get carried away and buy too much.

SlateportCity_Text_BattleTentBuiltRecent: Recently, a BATTLE TENT was built in SLATEPORT. / GYMS are fun, but the BATTLE TENT's awesome in its own way. / You should go find tough POKéMON for the BATTLE TENT!

SlateportCity_Text_GetNameRaterToHelpYou: If you want to change your POKéMON's nickname, you'll have to get the NAME RATER to help you.

SlateportCity_Text_CantChangeTradeMonNam: Any POKéMON you get in a trade, you can't change its nickname. / The original TRAINER's love for that POKéMON is in the nickname.

SlateportCity_Text_AquaHasPolicy: TEAM AQUA has a policy of assembling and dispersing at the operation site.

SlateportCity_Text_BossIsBrilliant: Our BOSS is brilliant. / What would he want to do with a MUSEUM now?

SlateportCity_Text_WonderIfLighthouseSta: The light of the lighthouse reaches dozens of miles away. / I wonder if it doesn't startle POKéMON in the sea.

SlateportCity_Text_PleaseGiveItThisEffor: Went for it stupendously! / As its reward, please give it this EFFORT RIBBON.

SlateportCity_Text_EnergyGuruSellWhatYou: I'm the ENERGY GURU! I'll go for it and sell you what you need!

SlateportCity_Text_WhatsNewSchemeIWonder: What's the new scheme, I wonder? / Our BOSS is scary when he's mad, so I'd better not screw things up…

SlateportCity_Text_ShouldTakeItAll: If there's something we need in the MUSEUM, we should take it all!

SlateportCity_Text_DontButtIn: Hey, you there! Don't butt in!

SlateportCity_Text_RemindsMeOfLongLineFo: A long line, huh? / It reminds me of the times I lined up to buy smash-hit games…

SlateportCity_Text_WhyAreWeLiningUp: Why are we even lining up and paying? We should just march in!

SlateportCity_Text_IllReadSignForYou: You want to read this sign? I'll read it for you!
SlateportCity_Text_SaysSomethingLikeSeaI: Let's see… / Um… I think it says something like “the life in the sea is endless.” / Yup, I'm pretty sure that's what it says.

SlateportCity_Text_ShouldveBroughtMyGame: Grumble… / I should've brought my Game Boy Advance so I wouldn't get bored in line… / Grumble…

SlateportCity_Text_HotSpringsAfterOperat: When this operation's over, I'll take you to a hot spring spa! / That's what our leader said. I can't wait!

SlateportCity_Text_ExplainBerries: If a wild POKéMON gets hurt, it heals itself by chewing on BERRIES. / Did you know that? / Somebody saw that and got the idea of making medicine from BERRIES. / Did you know that? / To turn BERRIES into medicine, they must be crushed into powder. / Did you know that? / You seem to have an interest in BERRIES! / I've got something good for someone like you.
SlateportCity_Text_ExplainBerryPowder: I recently had machines installed at POKéMON CENTERS for crushing BERRIES. / The BERRY CRUSH machines are at the DIRECT CORNER upstairs. / Did you know? / Could you make BERRY POWDER for me using those machines? / I can make you all sorts of medicine if you bring me lots of BERRY POWDER.
SlateportCity_Text_BroughtMeSomeBerryPow: Have you brought me some BERRY POWDER?
SlateportCity_Text_ExchangeWhatWithIt: What would you like to exchange it with?

SlateportCity_BattleTentLobby_Text_Could: So, like, I couldn't find myself any POKéMON that were, like, for me. / So, I figured, like, hey, I should file a complaint to the guy there? / And he wouldn't hear me out, like, hey! So, like, total bummer, man! / Hey, like, you! Zip it, you know? Just, you know, take this!
SlateportCity_BattleTentLobby_Text_Expla: That's, like, TM41, you know? Hey, it's TORMENT, you hearing me? / Like, it won't let the other guy use the same move twice in a row, see? / Hey, now, you listen here, like, I'm not laying a torment on you!

SlateportCity_BattleTentLobby_Text_IllTr: I don't really like BUG POKéMON, but maybe I'll try using some for a change of pace. / Who knows, I might even get to like them!

SlateportCity_BattleTentLobby_Text_Battl: You can battle all you want here even if you don't have any tough POKéMON.

SlateportCity_BattleTentLobby_Text_NiceI: Wouldn't it be nice if they had more of a selection?

SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_FerryServiceUn: I beg your pardon? You're looking for a ship? / I'm sorry, the ferry service isn't available at present…
SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_MayISeeYourTic: Hello, are you here for the ferry? May I see your TICKET?
SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_FlashedTicketW: [PLAYER] flashed the TICKET. / Perfect! That's all you need! / And where would you like to go?

SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_AbnormalWeathe: For a ship to sail safely, we need to know about the weather! / Speaking of weather, I heard something from a guy at the WEATHER INSTITUTE. / He was saying abnormal weather has been reported all over the place! / You should visit the WEATHER INSTITUTE and ask around!
SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_LoveToGoDeepUn: A journey to the bottom of the sea… I wonder what it'd be like? / I'd love to go deep underwater like that someday.

SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_SubTooSmallFor: I wanted to go with CAPT. STERN on the ocean floor exploration. / But the sub's too small for me. / If I squeezed in, there wouldn't be any room for the CAPTAIN…

SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_SameThugsTried: CAPT. STERN: Those thugs… / They're the same lot who tried to rob the DEVON GOODS at the MUSEUM.
SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_WontBeLongBefo: CAPT. STERN: Oh, yes. MR. BRINEY came to our SHIPYARD. / It won't be long now before we finish making the ferry!
SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_NeedDiveToCatc: CAPT. STERN: Trying to catch a submarine… It's impossible. / You would need a POKéMON that knows how to DIVE… / Perhaps if you went out to MOSSDEEP CITY… / A lot of divers live out there, so someone might teach you…
SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_TeamAquaLeftNe: CAPT. STERN: Oh, [PLAYER]… / Okay… So TEAM AQUA left before you could stop them… / Oh, no, don't blame yourself. You're not responsible for this. / Trying to catch a submarine… It's impossible for most people. / You would need a POKéMON that knows how to DIVE… / Perhaps if you went out to MOSSDEEP CITY… / A lot of divers live out there, so someone might teach you…
SlateportCity_Harbor_Text_FinishedMaking: CAPT. STERN: [PLAYER]! / We finally finished making the ferry S.S. TIDAL! / We couldn't have done it without your friend MR. BRINEY. / Please go for a short cruise on it!

SlateportCity_House_Text_NatureToDoWithS: My POKéMON has a HASTY nature. / It has higher SPEED compared to my other POKéMON. / Maybe their nature has something to do with the stat gains of POKéMON.

SlateportCity_House_Text_MustBeGoingToBa: You're a TRAINER, aren't you? / Since you came to SLATEPORT CITY, you must be going to the BATTLE TENT.

SlateportCity_Mart_Text_SomeItemsOnlyAtM: The MARKET does have some interesting merchandise. / But there are some items you can only get at a POKéMON MART.

SlateportCity_Mart_Text_GreatBallIsBette: A GREAT BALL is better than a POKé BALL at catching POKéMON. / With this, I should be able to get that elusive POKéMON…

SlateportCity_NameRatersHouse_Text_Pleas: Hi, hi! I'm the NAME RATER! I'm the fortune-teller of names! / I shall be pleased to rate your POKéMON's nickname.

SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Woul: If I ripped off the stuff here, would it make me rich?

SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_CanL: What I learn here, I can put to use on nefarious deeds…

SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_OurB: We were told to assemble here, so we did, but… / Our BOSS, the linchpin, isn't here.

SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Aqua: We, TEAM AQUA, exist for the good of all!

SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Rust: If our goons didn't bungle things in RUSTBORO, we wouldn't be here!

SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Didn: I didn't have ¥50, so it took a long time getting by the receptionist.

SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Lear: I want to learn about the sea and use that knowledge for battling.

SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Ster: I get all giddy and gooey when I see the sea! / For me, CAPT. STERN is the number one role model!

SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Must: The sea is vast without end, and infinitely deep… / There must be many POKéMON that we don't know about.

SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Want: I want a sea POKéMON. / I think it would feel cool and nice to hug.

SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Reme: Aiyeeeh! What are you doing here? / Me? I'm the TEAM AQUA member you thumped before, remember? Back in RUSTURF TUNNEL? / Here, take this! You have to forgive me!
SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_1F_Text_Hope: That TM, it suits you more than it does me. / Hope I never see you again! Wahahaha!

SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Than: Yes? If you're looking for STERN, that would be me. / Ah! Those must be the parts I ordered from MR. STONE of DEVON. / Thank you! That's great! We can prepare for our expedition now.
SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Well: Hehehe, hold it! We'll take those parts!
SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Ster: CAPT. STERN: Wh-what? Who are you people?
SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Were: We're TEAM AQUA! / Our BOSS wants those parts! Shut your yap and fork them over!
SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Boss: Oh, man, what a disaster… The BOSS is going to be furious…
SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_LetM: Humph, sniveling wimp! Let me take care of this!
SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Medd: Now what? If we don't get the parts, we're in for it! / Arrgh, I didn't count on being meddled with by some meddling kid!
SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Came: I came to see what was taking so long to snatch some parts, and you simps are held up by a mere child?
SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Arch: We are TEAM AQUA, and we love the sea! / And I am TEAM AQUA's leader, ARCHIE! / What makes you interfere with us? / …No! You can't be! You're not one of TEAM MAGMA? / Wait, that can't be right. You're not dressed for the part. / … … … … … … … … … … … … / POKéMON, people… All life depends on the sea. / So, TEAM AQUA is dedicated to the expansion of the sea. / Don't you agree? What we are doing is a magnificent undertaking. / Ah, fine… You're still too young to understand our noble objective. / But, I warn you, don't even consider interfering with our plans again. / The consequences will cost you dearly! / And don't you forget it!
SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Ster: CAPT. STERN: You're… Ah, okay, you're [PLAYER]… / Anyway, that was a tense situation! Thank you for saving us! / Oh, yes, I almost forgot that you even brought the parts from DEVON!

CAPT. STERN: Whoops! There's no time to lose! / We have to set out on our ocean-floor expedition really soon. / Thanks again, but now I've got to go! / Feel free to wander around and check out our facilities, though.

SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Remi: I saw a model of a ship here. / It reminded me of the ABANDONED SHIP near DEWFORD TOWN…

SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Dont: Don't you dare run around inside the MUSEUM!

SlateportCity_OceanicMuseum_2F_Text_Want: Wow, the submarine's awesome! I want to go for a ride!

SlateportCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Rais: Want a tip for battling? / I'd say it's raising different kinds of POKéMON in a balanced manner. / It's no good to make just one POKéMON strong. / If it has a type disadvantage, it might not stand a chance.

SlateportCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Trad: I trade POKéMON with my friends. / If a traded POKéMON is holding an item, it makes me twice as happy!

SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub_Text_Pokemo: If you keep letting a POKéMON faint in battle, it'll come to resent it. / Soon, it will become less trusting of the TRAINER. / In other words, it certainly won't like you very much.

SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub_Text_MonEnj: Do POKéMON enjoy having items used on them? / Mine acted really happy when I gave it some PROTEIN.

SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub_Text_ShowMe: I love seeing POKéMON that love their TRAINERS. / POKéMON are very sensitive to the feelings of their TRAINERS. / If you treat your POKéMON with love and care, they'll love you back. / When your POKéMON grow to love you, please come show me.
SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub_Text_TreatP: POKéMON are very sensitive to the feelings of their TRAINERS. / If you treat your POKéMON with love and care, they'll love you back.

SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub_Text_MeetCh: Er-hem! I am the CHAIRMAN of the POKéMON FAN CLUB! / Being the CHAIRMAN, I am naturally the most important! / No one can best me when it comes to raising POKéMON. No one! / Well, let me tell you about POKéMON CONTESTS. / They're events where one can show off POKéMON for the world to see! / However, they're held in far-off towns, so I cannot participate often enough. / That is why we gather here to show off our POKéMON, and have others show us theirs.
SlateportCity_PokemonFanClub_Text_LikeTo: The POKéMON of a TRAINER who has entered a POKéMON CONTEST… That, I would like to see.

SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_1F_Text_Can: Umm… If this goes here, and that goes over there… / Then where does this thing go? And what about that doohickey? / Aaargh! I can't make heads or tails of this!
SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_1F_Text_Mee: Hm? Hi, I'm DOCK. / CAPT. STERN commissioned me to design a ferry. / Oh! That there… Are they DEVON GOODS? / But, hmm… This won't do… / CAPT. STERN went off somewhere. He said he had some work to do. / Could I get you to go find CAPT. STERN and deliver that to him?
SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_1F_Text_Fer: DOCK: The ferry is finally ready! / The new S.S. TIDAL is truly a marvel of technology! / But, I get the feeling that we can make something even better. / You know, there's never an end to technology's march.
SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_1F_Text_Bri: DOCK: Hi! MR. BRINEY's joined us to lend us his help. / Thanks to the veteran sailor, the ferry is steadily coming together.
SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_1F_Text_Cou: DOCK: Shipbuilding is an art. / A lot of things can't be figured out just by calculating. / I really could use advice from a veteran who knows the seas…
DOCK: Where could CAPT. STERN have gone off to? / Could you go find CAPT. STERN and deliver that parcel to him?

SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_1F_Text_Sea: The seasons, the weather, where the moon sits in the sky… / These and other conditions make the sea change its expression. / That's right! The sea is like a living thing!

SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_1F_Text_Get: I get seasick real easily. So I get to help out here instead.

SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_1F_Text_Dec: MR. BRINEY: Ah, [PLAYER]! It's been too long! / Aye, since I met you, this old sea dog's been feeling frisky! / So I've decided to help DOCK make a ferry. / Aye, after all, a ferry would be able to carry a lot of people. / But, you know, that DOCK is really something special. / With his knack for technology and my experience, I'm sure that we can build one great ship, aye!

SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_2F_Text_Shi: Designing a large ship is more like making a big building than putting together a transportation vehicle.

SlateportCity_SternsShipyard_2F_Text_Flo: Don't you think it's strange that a ship made of heavy iron floats? / It floats because of a principle called buoyancy.

SootopolisCity_Text_CaveOfOriginPleaseLe: Who might you be? / This is the CAVE OF ORIGIN. / The spirits of POKéMON, becalmed at MT. PYRE, are said to be revived here. / Please leave.

SootopolisCity_Text_WeatherWentWild: The weather was clear this morning, but… / All of a sudden, dark clouds brewed up, rain started falling in sheets, and there was thunder and lightning, too. / The weather just went completely wild! / Is all of this because of those POKéMON?

SootopolisCity_Text_BigPokemonFighting: A big POKéMON is fighting with another big POKéMON! / Please, someone make them stop!

SootopolisCity_Text_GiantPokemonSuddenly: These giant POKéMON suddenly appeared in the middle of the city! / And, I've never seen them before! / Why are they smashing into each other like that? / Why can't they be friends, those POKéMON?
SootopolisCity_Text_WhereDidLegendariesG: GROUDON and KYOGRE… Where did they go? / Will they cause droughts or downpours somewhere else?

SootopolisCity_Text_NoOrdinaryTourist: Hm! You've come all the way to SOOTOPOLIS? You're no ordinary tourist. / But I suppose that doesn't make you an extraordinary tourist, either.

SootopolisCity_Text_SoThatsRayquaza: STEVEN: So that's RAYQUAZA… / It's incredible how the two rampaging POKéMON would flee from it in fear…
SootopolisCity_Text_InvolvedWithCrisisCo: STEVEN: Those POKéMON fighting… GROUDON… And KYOGRE… / The two super-ancient POKéMON were awakened from a long sleep… / And now they are smashing each other with their uncontrollable energy… / …[PLAYER]. / You being here now I'll take to mean that you're prepared to become involved in this crisis. / Well, then, there's someone that I'd like you to meet. / Come with me, please.
SootopolisCity_Text_DoesThisMakeYourFear: STEVEN: Listen, [PLAYER]. / Does seeing GROUDON and KYOGRE make you think POKéMON are to be feared? / But that's not true. POKéMON are really more… / …Why am I asking you this? You already know.
SootopolisCity_Text_HereWereAreHelpWalla: STEVEN: Okay, here we are! / Inside here you'll find someone named WALLACE. / I think you have what's needed to help him…
SootopolisCity_Text_MaxieArchieLeft: STEVEN: It looks like both MAXIE and ARCHIE have gone away somewhere. / Perhaps they've gone to MT. PYRE to return those ORBS…

SootopolisCity_Text_SootopolisSkyBeautif: SOOTOPOLIS sprang up as a town in the crater of a volcano. / If you look up at the sky, the lip of the crater is also visible. So, all you see is the sky in a circle. / But that's what makes the sky above SOOTOPOLIS the most beautiful.

SootopolisCity_Text_SeeingLegendWithOwnE: There's an ancient legend that claims the land and sea were shaped by a colossal battle between POKéMON. / Well, I'm seeing that happen with my very own eyes! / Whoa! I never expected to be witness to something this huge!

SootopolisCity_Text_SootopolisWillBeWrec: Oh, no! SOOTOPOLIS CITY will get wrecked!

SootopolisCity_Text_GoRedAndBlueMon: Go for it, red POKéMON! Don't back off, blue POKéMON!
SootopolisCity_Text_DoYouKnowMonNames: … … … … … … / Hi, do you know the names of those POKéMON fighting over there?

SootopolisCity_Text_TwoPokemonArentAngry: I just get this sense somehow that the two POKéMON aren't angry. / I think… They probably can't control their own power…

SootopolisCity_Text_GroudonPleaseStop: MAXIE: G… GROUDON… Please! Stop what you're doing! / I know the extent of your power now! / If you keep going, all HOENN, not just SOOTOPOLIS, will be utterly ruined!

SootopolisCity_Text_KyogreCalmDown: ARCHIE: KYOGRE! What's wrong?! Look over here! It's the RED ORB! Calm down! KYOGRE! / … … … … … … … … … … … … / It's no good! It's not responding at all!

SootopolisCity_Text_AquaMagmaDidntMeanHa: WALLACE: [PLAYER]… / The leaders of TEAM MAGMA and AQUA, I don't think they meant harm. / It wouldn't hurt to hear what they have to say for themselves.
SootopolisCity_Text_DazzledByMentor: WALLACE: I'm sure that you will be dazzled by my mentor's breathtakingly elegant battle style.
SootopolisCity_Text_ThankYouForHelpAccep: WALLACE: [PLAYER]… My eyes didn't deceive me. / Thanks to your help, SOOTOPOLIS… No, all of HOENN was saved. / On behalf of the people, I thank you. / This is a gift from me. Please accept it.
SootopolisCity_Text_ExplainWaterfallGoTo: That HIDDEN MACHINE contains WATERFALL. / If you have the RAIN BADGE, a POKéMON that has learned that HM move can force its way up waterfalls. / And where does one get the RAIN BADGE? You know, don't you? / That's right! You have to beat the SOOTOPOLIS GYM LEADER. / When you're all set to go, step through that door.

SootopolisCity_Gym_1F_Text_JuanPostBattl: The TRAINERS who have gathered all the GYM BADGES of HOENN should make way to the ultimate destination. / The POKéMON LEAGUE. / Travel to the easternmost reaches of HOENN, to the island EVER GRANDE. / There, you shall find the POKéMON LEAGUE.
SootopolisCity_Gym_1F_Text_ExplainWaterP: The TECHNICAL MACHINE I handed you contains WATER PULSE. / In use, it will occasionally confuse the target with ultrasonic waves. / … … … … … …
SootopolisCity_Gym_1F_Text_GoGetFortreeB: There remains but one BADGE to obtain in HOENN. / If you wish to challenge the POKéMON LEAGUE, you must obtain the last BADGE from the GYM in FORTREE.

SootopolisCity_Gym_1F_Text_GymGuideAdvic: Yo! How's it going, CHAMPION- bound [PLAYER]? / SOOTOPOLIS's GYM LEADER JUAN is a master of WATER-type POKéMON. / And, to get to JUAN, an icy floor will hamper your progress… / Listen, I'm sorry, but that's all the advice that I have for you. / The rest of the way, you have to go for it yourself!
SootopolisCity_Gym_1F_Text_GymGuidePostV: Yow! You've beaten even JUAN, who was supposedly the best in all HOENN! / Okay! Check out your TRAINER CARD. / If you've gotten all the BADGES, you're set for the POKéMON LEAGUE challenge!

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_AndreaPostBa: Watch what happens if you crack all the floor tiles.

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_ConniePostBa: I'll tell you something good. / If you want to reach JUAN, you need to walk on each floor tile once.

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BriannaPostB: You couldn't lay a finger on JUAN, I'm sure. Giggle…

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BridgetPostB: Rather than being satisfied by being in a strong GYM, I imagine training in other places will make you stronger. But above all, it looks more fun.

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_TiffanyPostB: This is really obvious, but how strong you are as a TRAINER has nothing to do with how young or old you are.

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_BethanyPostB: I wish I could forget about lost causes before I can manage an “Oops!”

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_CrissyPostBa: You might be good enough to avoid being wiped out in one hit by JUAN.

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_OliviaPostBa: I think you have potential. Why don't you stay and train with us?

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_DaphnePostBa: The grace you bring to battle is fabulous. / Oh… I'm so fortunate to have found POKéMON.

SootopolisCity_Gym_B1F_Text_AnnikaPostBa: I came to this GYM because JUAN praised me for my darling POKéMON. / Oh, if only I'd met JUAN years ago when I was younger…

SootopolisCity_House1_Text_DevelopedThis: For thirty years I've remained in SOOTOPOLIS honing my skills. / I developed a shattering TM. I bequeath it to you!
SootopolisCity_House1_Text_ExplainBrickB: TM31 contains BRICK BREAK! It's a move so horrible that I can't describe it.

SootopolisCity_House2_Text_DidYouKnowAbo: MT. PYRE… / At its peak are two orbs placed side by side. Did you know?

SootopolisCity_House3_Text_JuanHasManyFa: You're a POKéMON TRAINER, aren't you? / SOOTOPOLIS's JUAN has many fans. Even more than his student WALLACE! / Do you have any?
SootopolisCity_House3_Text_LonesomeTryWo: Oh, dear… That's a little lonesome. / Try working a little harder to get a fan following.

SootopolisCity_House3_Text_TrainerFanClu: Dedicated fans come over from even outside of HOENN. / It was really wild when I went to the TRAINER FAN CLUB in LILYCOVE.

SootopolisCity_House4_Text_AncientTreasu: Listen up, and I'll tell you something good. / There's supposed to be an ancient ruin in the sea around here. / There could be treasures just waiting to be discovered down there.

SootopolisCity_House4_Text_StrollUnderwa: Ancient treasures… / It would be nice if they existed, but even if they didn't, it would be so beautiful to take an underwater stroll with my POKéMON.

SootopolisCity_House5_Text_SootopolisMtP: There appears to be some connection between SOOTOPOLIS and MT. PYRE. / My friends and I did some research on it at the lab where I used to work.

SootopolisCity_House5_Text_BrotherUsedTo: My big brother used to study the sea.

SootopolisCity_House6_Text_FirstGuestInW: Hello! You're our first guest in a good while. / You've brightened up my day, so I'll give you a big WAILMER DOLL.

SootopolisCity_House7_Text_CityFromErupt: An underwater volcano erupted and forced itself up from the depths. / Its crater emerged from the sea and became filled with rainwater. / That's how SOOTOPOLIS CITY came into being.

SootopolisCity_House7_Text_CaveMadeToKee: The cave that links SOOTOPOLIS and the outside world… / It seems as if the cave was made to keep something from getting out. / Or am I just imagining things?

SootopolisCity_LotadAndSeedotHouse_Text_: Do you know the POKéMON LOTAD? It's rarely seen in SOOTOPOLIS. / I love, I mean love, big LOTAD! / My big brother says that SEEDOT is bigger. / But that's wrong! Everyone knows that LOTAD is a lot bigger. / Hunh? Do you have a LOTAD? P-p-please show me!

Do you know the POKéMON SEEDOT? It's hardly ever seen in SOOTOPOLIS. / Anyway, I love big SEEDOT. The bigger the better. / But my younger brother, he says that LOTAD is bigger. / That's silly. SEEDOT has to be bigger than that! / Huh? Do you have a SEEDOT with you? P-p-please, show me!

SootopolisCity_Mart_Text_TooScaryOutside: What… What is happening? / I really want to know, but it's too scary to go outside.
SootopolisCity_Mart_Text_PPUpIsGreat: PP UP is great! / It raises the POWER POINTS, the PP, of a POKéMON move.

SootopolisCity_Mart_Text_FullRestoreItem: Do you know FULL RESTORE? / Full restoration of HP! Eradication of all status problems! / It's truly an item of your dreams!

SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex: When I was young, I traveled the world as a POKéMON TRAINER. / Now that I've become an old buzzard, my only amusement is watching young TRAINERS battle.

SootopolisCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Eve: Everyone in town has taken refuge and won't come out of their homes. / Even I would rather not venture outside.
SootopolisCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Wal: WALLACE is rumored to be the toughest TRAINER in the whole HOENN region. / This town's GYM is led by the TRAINER who taught WALLACE. / But the ELITE FOUR… They're said to be even stronger than WALLACE's mentor. / How strong could they be?

SootopolisCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Are: Aren't POKéMON our friends? / Why are they going wild this way?
SootopolisCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Alw: Whenever, wherever, and whatever happens, I will always be friends with POKéMON. / Because it's fun to be with POKéMON!

SSTidalCorridor_Text_CanRestInCabin2: It'll be some time before we make land, I reckon. / You can rest up in your cabin if you'd like. Your cabin's No. 2. / The bed in there is soft and plushy. I can attest to how comfy it is!

SSTidalCorridor_Text_VisitOtherCabins: Go visit other cabins. TRAINERS bored of the boat trip will be itching to battle.

SSTidalCorridor_Text_BrineyWelcomeAboard: MR. BRINEY: Welcome aboard, [PLAYER]! / They made me honorary captain of the S.S. TIDAL! / You can call me CAPTAIN BRINEY now! / You know, I retired once before, but when I saw this majestic ship… / Let me just say, it stirred my sleeping soul as a sailor!

SSTidalLowerDeck_Text_PhillipPostBattle: We're the CLEANUP BROTHERS! / The old one dumps the detergent, and the young one does the scrubbing!

SSTidalLowerDeck_Text_LeonardPostBattle: We're the CLEANUP BROTHERS! / The old one dumps the detergent, and the young one does the scrubbing!

SSTidalRooms_Text_ColtonPostBattle: I get so excited imagining what kinds of POKéMON I'll get to see in the next CONTEST. The anticipation of it thrills!

SSTidalRooms_Text_MicahPostBattle: Friends need not be human. For me, POKéMON are treasured friends!

SSTidalRooms_Text_ThomasPostBattle: To be never ruffled in any situation is the GENTLEMAN's code of conduct.

SSTidalRooms_Text_JedPostBattle: JED: It's the first time that our lovey- dovey power couldn't prevail! You must be an awesome TRAINER!

SSTidalRooms_Text_LeaPostBattle: LEA: I can't believe it! Our lovey-dovey power failed… You must be an awesome TRAINER!

SSTidalRooms_Text_GarretPostBattle: Perhaps I shall get Father to acquire a yacht for me. A yacht for me and POKéMON!

SSTidalRooms_Text_NaomiPostBattle: A world cruise on a luxury liner has its charms, I must say… / But, I will admit there is an appealing side to touring HOENN by ferry.

SSTidalRooms_Text_NotSuspiciousTakeThis: Uh… Hi! I… I'm not acting suspicious! Uh… You can have this! For free! / It… Honestly, I didn't SNATCH it from someone! I'd never do such a thing! It's clean! You can use it!
SSTidalRooms_Text_ExplainSnatch: SNATCH steals the beneficial effects of certain moves before they can be used by a foe or ally.

TrainerHill_Entrance_Text_HopeYouGiveItY: I hope you give it your best.

TrainerHill_Entrance_Text_FriendsTryingT: Do you see the Time Board over there? / My friends and I are trying to see who can reach the top in the least time.
TrainerHill_Entrance_Text_DoYouKnowWhenT: Do you know when they're opening this place up? / I'm waiting here to be the first challenger ever!

TrainerHill_Entrance_Text_WhatSortOfTrai: Who knows what sort of TRAINERS and POKéMON combos are ahead? / All I know is that I'll knock aside anyone that stands in my way!
TrainerHill_Entrance_Text_CantWaitToTest: I heard tough TRAINERS come to this TRAINER HILL from all over. / I can't wait to test the waters! / I'll knock aside anyone that stands in my way!

Underwater_SeafloorCavern_Text_SubExplor: “SUBMARINE EXPLORER 1” is painted on the hull. / This is the submarine TEAM AQUA stole in SLATEPORT! / TEAM AQUA must have gone ashore here.
“SUBMARINE EXPLORER 1” is painted on the hull. / This is the submarine TEAM AQUA stole in SLATEPORT! / TEAM AQUA must have gone ashore here.
“SUBMARINE EXPLORER 1” is painted on the hull. / This is the submarine TEAM AQUA stole in SLATEPORT! / TEAM AQUA must have gone ashore here.
“SUBMARINE EXPLORER 1” is painted on the hull. / This is the submarine TEAM AQUA stole in SLATEPORT! / TEAM AQUA must have gone ashore here.

VerdanturfTown_Text_AirCleanHere: The way the winds blow, volcanic ash is never blown in this direction. / The air is clean and delicious here. Living here should do wonders for even frail and sickly people.

VerdanturfTown_Text_ManTryingToDigTunnel: My papa told me. / He says this tunnel is full of timid POKéMON. / They get all scared of loud noise and make a big uproar. / So they had to stop the big tunnel project. / But there's one man. He's trying to dig the tunnel by himself!
VerdanturfTown_Text_ManDugTunnelForLove: There was a man who dug a tunnel for a lady he loved. / I don't really get it, but hey!

VerdanturfTown_Text_GuyTryingToBustThrou: Did you see the cave next to the POKéMON MART? / There's a guy in there who's trying to bust up boulders so he can bust out through to the other side. / It'd be great if we could go through… It'll make it easy to visit RUSTBORO.
VerdanturfTown_Text_EasyToGetToRustboroN: That cave next to the POKéMON MART is now a tunnel to the other side. / It's great--it's easy to go shop for new DEVON products in RUSTBORO now.

VerdanturfTown_Text_MakeBattleTentDebut: My POKéMON and I, we've been riding a hot winning streak. / So I decided to make my BATTLE TENT debut in this town.

VerdanturfTown_BattleTentLobby_Text_Attr: My feelings toward my POKéMON… The attraction runs deep… / Oh, hi, you didn't see that, did you? Well, it doesn't matter. / How would you like this TM for your POKéMON?
My feelings toward my POKéMON… I'm sure the attraction is mutual! / They battle exactly the way I want them to!

VerdanturfTown_BattleTentLobby_Text_Taug: What kind of moves have you taught your POKéMON? / I think you would give yourself an advantage if they knew how to heal or protect themselves.

VerdanturfTown_BattleTentLobby_Text_Mons: If it doesn't like a certain move, a POKéMON will be reluctant to use it. / It doesn't matter how strong it is, either. / For example, a POKéMON with a GENTLE nature probably won't enjoy hurting its opponents. / If it can't seem to live up to its potential, it's probably failing at using a disliked move against its will.

VerdanturfTown_BattleTentLobby_Text_Scot: SCOTT: Hey there, [PLAYER]! I thought I might see you here. / A BATTLE TENT's a place where you can meet tough TRAINERS. / It doesn't matter what the rules are, or how battles are waged, either. / [PLAYER], I expect you to do the best you can!
SCOTT: I visit here regularly in hopes of seeing tough TRAINERS in action in whatever the situation.

VerdanturfTown_BattleTentLobby_Text_Gent: My big sister is gentle usually. But when she gets angry, she's really, really scary! / I bet a gentle POKéMON will be scary if it gets angry!

VerdanturfTown_FriendshipRatersHouse_Tex: Let me see your POKéMON. I'll check to see how much it likes you. / Oh. Your POKéMON…

VerdanturfTown_House_Text_TrainersGather: Far away, deep in EVER GRANDE CITY, is the POKéMON LEAGUE. / The TRAINERS who gather there are all frighteningly well skilled.

VerdanturfTown_House_Text_DefeatEliteFou: In the POKéMON LEAGUE, I think the rules say that you have to battle the ELITE FOUR all in a row. / If you lose to any of them, you have to begin your challenge again from the first one.

VerdanturfTown_Mart_Text_XSpecialIsCruci: For any POKéMON match, X SPECIAL is crucial. / It jacks up the power of some moves even though it's only for one battle.

VerdanturfTown_Mart_Text_NoStrategyGuide: They don't seem to sell any winning strategy guides for the BATTLE TENT… / It seems one must rely on one's own wits after all…

VerdanturfTown_Mart_Text_NestBallOnWeake: The NEST BALL works better on weakened POKéMON. / VERDANTURF is the only place you can buy it.

VerdanturfTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Fai: You can't consider yourself a real TRAINER if you don't have faith in your POKéMON. / Only those people who can believe in their battling POKéMON can win through to the very end.

VerdanturfTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Vis: The reason why anyone would visit VERDANTURF… / It's the BATTLE TENT. It goes without saying. / Or is there somebody here that you came to see?

VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_Stronger: WALLY: I lost to you, [PLAYER], but I'm not feeling down anymore. / Because I have a new purpose in life. Together with my RALTS, I'm going to challenge POKéMON GYMS and become a great TRAINER. / Please watch me, [PLAYER]. I'm going to be stronger than you. / When I do, I'm going to challenge you to another battle.
WALLY: Please watch me, [PLAYER]. I'm going to get stronger than you. / When I do, I'm going to challenge you to another battle.

VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_CanSeeGi: Thanks to you, I can see my girlfriend every day. Happy? You bet I am!

VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_WallysNe: UNCLE: Oh! [PLAYER]! WALLY's next door. / But, boy, there's something I have to tell you. / This natural environment is doing wonders for WALLY's health. / Maybe it's not just the environment. It could be POKéMON that are giving the boy hope.
VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_WallyGon: UNCLE: Is that right? WALLY's gone away that far all by himself… / Well, I have to give him credit--he is my little brother's son.
VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_WallySli: WALLY's gone away… He slipped off on his own…

VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_Daughter: My daughter's boyfriend is a very driven and passionate sort of person. / He's been digging a tunnel nonstop just so he can see my daughter. / My daughter's a little concerned, so she goes out to the tunnel a lot.
VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_WallyWas: WALLY was in EVER GRANDE? / His parents in PETALBURG would be astonished to hear that!
VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_IfAnythi: If anything were to happen to WALLY, I would never be able to look his parents in PETALBURG in the eye…
VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_Daughter: It's amazing. My daughter's boyfriend was digging the tunnel by hand! / It's so incredible!

VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_DontWorr: WANDA: Don't worry about WALLY. He'll be just fine. / I know my little cousin, and he has POKéMON with him, too.
VerdanturfTown_WandasHouse_Text_MeetWand: WANDA: You are? Oh, right, I get it! / You're the [PLAYER] who WALLY was telling me about. / I'm WALLY's cousin. Glad to meet you! / I think WALLY's become a lot more lively and healthy since he came here.

VictoryRoad_1F_Text_EdgarPostBattle: You've made it this far. Keep the momentum going and become the CHAMPION! If anyone can, it's you!

VictoryRoad_1F_Text_HopePostBattle: You seem to have the potential for becoming the CHAMPION.

VictoryRoad_1F_Text_AlbertPostBattle: I lost here… / That means I lack the qualifications to become the CHAMPION…

VictoryRoad_1F_Text_WallyPostEntranceBat: WALLY: I couldn't beat you today, [PLAYER], but one of these days, I'll catch up to you!

VictoryRoad_1F_Text_WallyPostBattle: WALLY: I couldn't beat you this time, too… But one of these days, [PLAYER], I'm going to catch up to you… / And challenge the POKéMON LEAGUE!

VictoryRoad_1F_Text_KatelynnPostBattle: Humph, go right on ahead. See if I care.

VictoryRoad_1F_Text_QuincyPostBattle: Getting through here safely--that's the final test for any TRAINER aiming to become the POKéMON CHAMPION. / That's why it's called the VICTORY ROAD.

VictoryRoad_B1F_Text_SamuelPostBattle: The POKéMON LEAGUE became distant again… What a letdown…

VictoryRoad_B1F_Text_ShannonPostBattle: By being together all the time, trust grows between POKéMON and TRAINERS.

VictoryRoad_B1F_Text_MichellePostBattle: You'll do fine, for sure! Your POKéMON are all eager to go!

VictoryRoad_B1F_Text_MitchellPostBattle: Even outside of battle, I sense incredible power emanating from you and your POKéMON.

VictoryRoad_B1F_Text_HallePostBattle: Sure, this is VICTORY ROAD. / But it's not all that different from the path you've taken so far. / Try to enjoy things the rest of the way!

VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_VitoPostBattle: I was better than everyone in my family. I've never lost before… / I've lost my confidence… Maybe I'll go home…

VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_OwenPostBattle: The rumors I heard, that tough little kid is from PETALBURG CITY.

VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_CarolinePostBattle: VICTORY ROAD and the POKéMON LEAGUE are long and grueling challenges. Beware of fatigue!

VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_JuliePostBattle: Gaze on your collected BADGES and remember the TRAINERS you've faced.

VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_DiannePostBattle: You do have guts! I like that! Keep it going!

VictoryRoad_B2F_Text_FelixPostBattle: I can't help getting all tense knowing that I'm nearing the POKéMON LEAGUE. / It's all I can do to feign calm.
